readouts.en: Quantify root-meristem size, EdU-labeled cell proliferation, cell length, root-hair density, and time-resolved primary- and lateral-root growth.

readouts.zh: 进行根部转录组或靶向表达分析，追踪干旱应答、细胞壁重塑、细胞周期、养分转运和氧化还原通路。
readouts.en: Use root transcriptomics or targeted expression assays to track drought response, cell-wall remodeling, cell-cycle, nutrient-transport, and redox pathways.

design.zh: 设置同龄持续灌水对照、干旱未复水对照和复水组；采用独立生物重复，并在复水前及6–72小时进行破坏性与非破坏性连续采样。记录盆土含水量和氧扩散状态，以排除复水引起的缺氧。
design.en: Include age-matched continuously watered controls, drought non-rewatered controls, and rewatered plants; use independent biological replicates and destructive plus non-destructive serial sampling before rewatering and from 6–72 h. Record substrate water content and oxygen status to exclude rewatering-induced hypoxia.

title.zh: 冷胁迫下拟南芥根中FRO6相关铁氧化还原稳态的条件性轨迹
title.en: Conditional trajectory of FRO6-associated iron-redox homeostasis in Arabidopsis roots under cold stress

summary.zh: 早期冷感知优先触发钙、ROS和激素信号；根中FRO6相关响应仅作弱而不确定的推断。
summary.en: Early cold perception primarily activates calcium, ROS, and hormonal signaling; a root FRO6-associated response is inferred only weakly and uncertainly.

text.zh: 膜流动性变化与短暂ROS脉冲出现；FRO6转录或还原活性尚未可可靠预测。
text.en: Membrane changes and transient ROS pulses emerge; FRO6 transcript or reductase activity cannot yet be predicted reliably.

text.zh: 根尖和成熟区尚无明显结构重塑，但局部氧化还原状态可能变得不均一。
text.en: Root-tip and mature-zone structure remains largely unchanged, although local redox states may become heterogeneous.

text.zh: 根生长表型通常尚接近同龄未处理植株。
text.en: Root-growth phenotype generally remains close to that of age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: FRO6的已知功能背景偏向叶/叶肉，向根组织外推有限。
text.en: Known FRO6 functional context is weighted toward leaf/mesophyll tissue, limiting transferability to roots.

summary.zh: 冷应答转录网络开始建立，细胞抗氧化与铁稳态调节可能被动员。
summary.en: Cold-responsive transcriptional networks begin to establish, potentially recruiting antioxidant and iron-homeostasis regulation.

text.zh: 冷响应基因与抗氧化系统倾向上调，而可利用铁和铁还原能力可能因需求重分配而双向变化。
text.en: Cold-response genes and antioxidant systems tend to rise, whereas available iron and ferric-reduction capacity may change in either direction as demand is redistributed.

text.zh: 根尖分裂区的代谢减速可能先于成熟区；组织尺度铁状态可能出现空间差异。
text.en: Metabolic slowing in the root meristem may precede that in mature tissue; tissue-scale iron status may become spatially differentiated.

text.zh: 可见根系性状变化仍可能很小。
text.en: Visible root-system trait changes are still likely minor.

text.zh: 未给出基因型、温度和根区信息，无法确定FRO6是否参与早期根响应。
text.en: Genotype, temperature, and root-zone information are unspecified, so early root involvement of FRO6 is unresolved.

summary.zh: 信号向代谢调节过渡，冷胁迫下的ROS清除、膜保护和金属配位需求增强。
summary.en: Signaling transitions toward metabolic regulation, increasing demand for ROS detoxification, membrane protection, and metal chelation under cold stress.

text.zh: 抗氧化缓冲和铁配位可能增强；若FRO6参与，活性更可能受底物、pH和还原力限制而非单向升高。
text.en: Antioxidant buffering and iron chelation may increase; if FRO6 participates, its activity is more likely constrained by substrate, pH, and reductant supply than to rise unidirectionally.

text.zh: 表皮、皮层和维管邻近细胞可呈不同氧化还原需求，根尖细胞周期可能放缓。
text.en: Epidermal, cortical, and vascular-adjacent cells may show distinct redox demands, while root-tip cell cycling may slow.

text.zh: 主根伸长速率可能开始轻度下降。
text.en: Primary-root elongation rate may begin to decline modestly.

text.zh: 该变化符合一般冷适应逻辑，但不能据此认定由FRO6驱动。
text.en: This pattern fits general cold acclimation but does not establish FRO6 as its driver.

summary.zh: 较稳定的冷适应状态逐步形成，资源从生长转向维持细胞稳态。
summary.en: A more stable cold-acclimation state progressively forms, reallocating resources from growth toward cellular maintenance.

text.zh: 渗透保护、抗氧化和铁-硫/血红素相关代谢的维持需求上升；FRO6表达可能保持不变、上调或受抑。
text.en: Maintenance demand rises for osmoprotection, antioxidation, and iron-sulfur/heme-related metabolism; FRO6 expression may remain unchanged, increase, or decline.

text.zh: 根尖增殖与细胞扩张总体受抑，组织呼吸和物质运输趋于保守。
text.en: Root-tip proliferation and cell expansion are broadly restrained, with tissue respiration and transport becoming more conservative.

text.zh: 累计主根长度开始落后于同龄未处理对照。
text.en: Cumulative primary-root length begins to lag behind the age-matched untreated control.

text.zh: 根生长抑制的预测较稳健，但FRO6方向仍因器官背景不匹配而不确定。
text.en: Predicted root-growth inhibition is more robust, but the FRO6 direction remains uncertain because of organ-context mismatch.

summary.zh: 代谢重编程持续，铁利用效率与氧化还原缓冲之间可能出现权衡。
summary.en: Metabolic reprogramming continues, potentially creating trade-offs between iron-use efficiency and redox buffering.

text.zh: 若细胞还原力受限，铁还原步骤可能下降；若缺铁样信号增强，局部还原能力则可能补偿性提高。
text.en: If cellular reductant supply is limited, ferric reduction may decrease; if iron-deficiency-like signaling intensifies, local reduction capacity may rise compensatorily.

text.zh: 根不同区域可能分化为维持型与持续生长型状态，铁相关转录响应未必同步。
text.en: Different root zones may diverge into maintenance-oriented and continued-growth states, with iron-related transcriptional responses not necessarily synchronized.

text.zh: 根系延伸和侧根起始倾向受到抑制。
text.en: Root extension and lateral-root initiation tend to be restrained.

text.zh: FRO6在根中的底物、细胞定位和调控关系未被本情景限定。
text.en: The scenario does not specify FRO6 substrate, cellular localization, or regulation in roots.

summary.zh: 适应与生长抑制并存；持续冷处理可使根部资源分配进一步偏向防护。
summary.en: Acclimation and growth inhibition coexist; sustained cold can further shift root resource allocation toward protection.

text.zh: 保护性抗氧化、膜稳定化和蛋白质稳态过程预计增强，但不应等同于FRO6必然上调。
text.en: Protective antioxidative, membrane-stabilizing, and proteostasis processes are expected to increase, but this should not be equated with obligatory FRO6 induction.

text.zh: 根尖细胞产生和伸长区扩张持续减弱，组织更新变慢。
text.en: Root-tip cell production and elongation-zone expansion continue to weaken, slowing tissue renewal.

text.zh: 根系生物量积累速度可能低于未处理植株。
text.en: Root-system biomass accumulation may proceed more slowly than in untreated plants.

text.zh: 一般冷适应机制支持该趋势；FRO6特异结论仍不可外推。
text.en: General cold-acclimation mechanisms support this trend; FRO6-specific conclusions remain non-transferable.

summary.zh: 根组织进入维持型冷适应阶段，局部金属与氧化还原稳态可能趋于新的平衡。
summary.en: Root tissue enters a maintenance-oriented cold-acclimation phase, with local metal and redox homeostasis potentially approaching a new balance.

text.zh: ROS水平可能由早期脉冲转为受控稳态；FRO6相关还原通量若存在变化，可能趋于平台。
text.en: ROS may shift from early pulses to controlled steady state; any change in FRO6-associated reductive flux may approach a plateau.

text.zh: 根区间的代谢分工可能稳定，新增结构变化有限。
text.en: Metabolic division among root zones may stabilize, with limited new structural change.

text.zh: 根仍以较低生长速率延伸，累计差距继续扩大。
text.en: Roots continue extending at a lower growth rate, widening the cumulative difference from controls.

text.zh: 稳态方向基于持续中等冷胁迫假设，实际结果受温度阈值影响很大。
text.en: The steady-state direction assumes sustained moderate cold; outcomes depend strongly on the temperature threshold.

summary.zh: 冷适应的维持成本开始显现，根系可能优先保存已有组织功能而非扩大。
summary.en: Maintenance costs of cold acclimation become apparent, and roots may prioritize preserving existing tissue function over expansion.

text.zh: 能量供应受限可压低部分还原反应，而防御相关电子分配仍需维持，形成氧化还原权衡。
text.en: Restricted energy supply can depress some reduction reactions while defense-related electron allocation must be maintained, creating a redox trade-off.

text.zh: 伸长区细胞扩张受限，根毛和表皮功能可能出现可塑性调整。
text.en: Cell expansion in the elongation zone is constrained, and root-hair and epidermal functions may undergo plastic adjustment.

text.zh: 根系探索能力和水肥获取增长潜力可能降低。
text.en: Root exploratory capacity and potential gains in water and nutrient acquisition may decline.

text.zh: 营养充足降低了典型缺铁反应的可预测性，也削弱FRO6推断。
text.en: Adequate nutrition reduces predictability of canonical iron-deficiency responses and weakens FRO6 inference.

summary.zh: 若冷胁迫稳定且非冻害，适应程序可能部分缓冲损伤，但生长代价持续。
summary.en: If cold remains stable and non-freezing, acclimation may partly buffer damage, but growth costs persist.

text.zh: 细胞保护网络可能维持高于对照的设定点；FRO6相关指标更可能反映稳态重设而非持续单调变化。
text.en: Cell-protection networks may maintain a set point above control; FRO6-associated metrics are more likely to reflect homeostatic resetting than a sustained monotonic change.

text.zh: 根组织完整性大体维持，但分裂和伸长活动处于低水平。
text.en: Root tissue integrity is broadly maintained, but division and elongation activity remain low.

text.zh: 主根和侧根的新增长度仍预计少于对照。
text.en: New primary- and lateral-root length is still expected to be lower than in controls.

text.zh: 对冷适应平台的判断较合理，但无法用根表型反推FRO6活性。
text.en: A cold-acclimation plateau is plausible, but root phenotype cannot be used to infer FRO6 activity.

summary.zh: 长期资源分配格局进一步固定，根部铁氧化还原过程可能受碳供给和运输限制。
summary.en: Longer-term resource allocation becomes further fixed, and root iron-redox processes may be constrained by carbon supply and transport.

text.zh: 碳骨架与还原力优先供给维持过程，可能限制铁还原；局部再分配需求仍可引发补偿性变化。
text.en: Carbon skeletons and reductant are prioritized for maintenance, potentially limiting ferric reduction; local redistribution demands may still provoke compensatory changes.

text.zh: 维管运输与根尖生长之间的资源竞争可能加剧，组织扩张继续受限。
text.en: Resource competition between vascular transport and root-tip growth may intensify, further constraining tissue expansion.

text.zh: 根冠比可能因根生长受抑而下降，具体程度取决于地上部冷反应。
text.en: Root-to-shoot ratio may decline as root growth is restrained, with magnitude depending on shoot cold responses.

text.zh: 未提供地上部碳同化状态，限制了对根部还原力供给的判断。
text.en: Shoot carbon-assimilation status is unspecified, limiting inference about reductant supply to roots.

summary.zh: 持续冷下根系维持已适应但低生长的状态，潜在FRO6响应应被视为情境依赖。
summary.en: Under sustained cold, roots maintain an acclimated but low-growth state, and any putative FRO6 response should be viewed as context dependent.

text.zh: 细胞氧化还原缓冲和铁利用可能维持重设后的水平，短期内不预期一致的进一步漂移。
text.en: Cellular redox buffering and iron use may remain at reset levels, without an expected uniform further drift in the short term.

text.zh: 根区结构格局相对稳定，但持续低温可保留细胞更新受限。
text.en: Root-zone architecture is relatively stable, while sustained low temperature continues to restrict cell renewal.

text.zh: 与对照相比，根系大小和分枝复杂度的差距可能保持或扩大。
text.en: Compared with controls, differences in root-system size and branching complexity may persist or widen.

text.zh: 该时间尺度支持适应性稳态推断，但根中FRO6的功能转移性仍有限。
text.en: This timescale supports inference of an acclimated steady state, but functional transferability of FRO6 to roots remains limited.

summary.zh: 72小时后预期形成冷适应、低生长的根状态；FRO6是否改变及其方向需直接测定。
summary.en: By 72 h, an acclimated low-growth root state is expected; whether FRO6 changes, and in which direction, requires direct measurement.

text.zh: FRO6转录、蛋白丰度和铁还原活性均不宜由冷处理或根生长表型单独预测。
text.en: FRO6 transcript, protein abundance, and ferric-reduction activity should not be predicted from cold treatment or root-growth phenotype alone.

text.zh: 根组织可能维持完整但代谢保守的状态，局部离子和氧化还原异质性仍可能存在。
text.en: Root tissue may remain intact but metabolically conservative, with possible local ionic and redox heterogeneity.

text.zh: 累计根生长和根系占据体积预计低于同龄未处理植株。
text.en: Cumulative root growth and root-system occupied volume are expected to be below those of age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: 结论是待检验的机制假设；叶/叶肉FRO6知识向根的外推尤其有限。
text.en: This is a testable mechanistic hypothesis; extrapolation of leaf/mesophyll FRO6 knowledge to roots is especially limited.

mechanisms.zh: 冷感知可经钙信号、ROS、激素及转录重编程，优先增强细胞保护并降低生长投入。
mechanisms.en: Cold perception can act through calcium, ROS, hormones, and transcriptional reprogramming, prioritizing cellular protection while reducing growth investment.

mechanisms.zh: 低温可改变膜性质、呼吸与还原力供给，从而间接重设铁还原、铁配位和ROS缓冲之间的平衡。
mechanisms.en: Low temperature can alter membrane properties, respiration, and reductant supply, indirectly resetting the balance among iron reduction, iron chelation, and ROS buffering.

mechanisms.zh: FRO6若在根中发挥作用，其响应可能依赖细胞类型、底物可及性、pH及铁状态，而非由冷胁迫单独决定。
mechanisms.en: If FRO6 functions in roots, its response may depend on cell type, substrate availability, pH, and iron status rather than cold stress alone.

assumptions.zh: 处理为稳定、非冻害的中等冷胁迫；不存在严重脱水、缺氧、盐胁迫或营养缺乏。
assumptions.en: Treatment is stable, moderate, non-freezing cold stress without severe dehydration, hypoxia, salinity, or nutrient deficiency.

assumptions.zh: 比较对象为每个时间点同龄、同光周期的未处理拟南芥。
assumptions.en: The comparator is an age-matched, untreated Arabidopsis plant under the same photoperiod at each timepoint.

assumptions.zh: 未指定温度、基因型、根龄、根区和FRO6基线表达，故FRO6特异方向不作确定性预测。
assumptions.en: Temperature, genotype, root age, root zone, and baseline FRO6 expression are unspecified; therefore no deterministic FRO6-specific direction is assigned.

assumptions.zh: FRO6的既有功能背景主要与叶/叶肉相关，向根组织的可转移性有限；所有根部FRO6推断均为高不确定性。
assumptions.en: The established functional context of FRO6 is mainly leaf/mesophyll related, with limited transferability to roots; all root FRO6 inferences carry high uncertainty.

readouts.zh: 在根尖、伸长区和成熟区分别检测FRO6转录本、蛋白丰度及亚细胞定位。
readouts.en: Measure FRO6 transcript, protein abundance, and subcellular localization separately in meristematic, elongation, and mature root zones.

readouts.zh: 测定根表或根组织的铁(III)还原能力、可交换铁池、总铁及铁稳态标记基因。
readouts.en: Measure root-surface or tissue ferric-reduction capacity, labile iron pool, total iron, and iron-homeostasis marker genes.

readouts.zh: 测定ROS、抗氧化还原状态、呼吸/还原力指标及膜损伤指标，并进行根区空间解析。
readouts.en: Measure ROS, antioxidant redox state, respiration/reductant indicators, and membrane-damage markers with root-zone spatial resolution.

readouts.zh: 量化主根伸长、侧根起始、根毛性状和根系生物量，并同步记录地上部生长。
readouts.en: Quantify primary-root elongation, lateral-root initiation, root-hair traits, and root biomass while recording shoot growth in parallel.

readouts.zh: 设置同龄温暖对照、冷处理时间序列，以及铁供应或螯合扰动对照；优先覆盖6、18、24、48和72小时。
readouts.en: Include age-matched warm controls, a cold time series, and iron-supply or chelation perturbation controls; prioritize 6, 18, 24, 48, and 72 h.

design.zh: 采用同批次植株、固定光照与营养条件的分区根系时间序列设计；将FRO6缺失或过表达材料与野生型并列，仅在其改变铁还原/红氧读数及冷下根表型时支持因果角色。
design.en: Use a root-zone-resolved time series with matched plant batches and fixed light and nutrition; compare FRO6 loss- or gain-of-function material with wild type, supporting a causal role only if it alters iron-reduction/redox readouts and root phenotypes under cold.

title.zh: 中度干旱下根中 FRO6 上调的条件性轨迹
title.en: Conditional trajectory of root FRO6 upregulation under moderate drought

summary.zh: 根中 FRO6 的直接作用可能首先改变局部铁还原与氧化还原状态；其根部功能外推有限。
summary.en: The direct effect of root FRO6 may first alter local ferric reduction and redox status; transfer from its better-supported leaf context is limited.

text.zh: 根表皮/皮层细胞的铁还原能力可能升高，同时出现短暂 ROS 与抗氧化信号重排。
text.en: Ferric reduction capacity in root epidermal/cortical cells may rise, alongside transient ROS and antioxidant-signaling reorganization.

text.zh: 尚无明确组织结构改变，可能仅出现根表局部氧化还原微环境变化。
text.en: No clear structural tissue change is expected; only a localized root-surface redox microenvironment may change.

text.zh: 全株萎蔫、根长和生物量在此时段预计基本不变。
text.en: Whole-plant wilting, root length, and biomass are expected to remain broadly unchanged at this horizon.

text.zh: FRO6 的已知语境偏向叶/叶肉，根部与干旱下的功能联系不足。
text.en: Known FRO6 context is weighted toward leaf/mesophyll biology, with limited support for root drought function.

summary.zh: 干旱诱导的 ABA/ROS 信号可能与 FRO6 相关铁氧化还原过程汇合，但方向依赖根际铁形态。
summary.en: Drought-induced ABA/ROS signaling may converge with FRO6-associated iron redox processes, but the outcome depends on rhizosphere iron form.

text.zh: 铁稳态、ROS 清除和水分胁迫响应转录可能开始调整，细胞铁可利用性可升可降。
text.en: Transcription linked to iron homeostasis, ROS detoxification, and water stress may begin to adjust, while cellular iron availability could increase or decrease.

text.zh: 根尖和成熟区之间可能形成不同的氧化还原响应，尚不足以预测净组织效应。
text.en: Redox responses may diverge between the root tip and mature zone, precluding prediction of a net tissue effect.

text.zh: 气孔行为和地上部失水主要由干旱驱动，FRO6 上调的附加效应尚不可分辨。
text.en: Stomatal behavior and shoot water loss are primarily drought driven; an additional FRO6 effect is not yet distinguishable.

text.zh: 缺少根特异表达强度、铁供给形式和诱导方式信息。
text.en: Root-specific expression level, iron supply form, and induction method are unspecified.

summary.zh: 若局部铁还原增强，根细胞可能启动铁分配与氧化损伤缓冲程序；也可能因铁/ROS 失衡而受损。
summary.en: If local ferric reduction increases, root cells may activate iron-allocation and oxidative-damage buffering programs; iron/ROS imbalance could instead be detrimental.

text.zh: 铁转运、螯合、液泡储存及抗氧化相关基因表达可能重排，ROS 水平可能呈区域性双向变化。
text.en: Expression of iron transport, chelation, vacuolar storage, and antioxidant programs may be reorganized, with spatially bidirectional ROS changes.

text.zh: 成熟根区的离子吸收功能可能被重调，而根尖分裂区对氧化胁迫更敏感。
text.en: Ion-acquisition function in the mature root zone may be retuned, whereas the meristem may be more sensitive to oxidative stress.

text.zh: 根系吸水能力可能轻度改善或受抑，尚未预期可靠的可见表型差异。
text.en: Root water-acquisition capacity may be modestly improved or impaired; a reliable visible phenotype is not yet expected.

text.zh: 根中 FRO6 上调是否改变有效铁池及其方向尚未确定。
text.en: Whether root FRO6 upregulation changes the bioavailable iron pool, and in which direction, is unresolved.

stage.en: Remodeling of the root uptake interface

summary.zh: 持续干旱下，根表铁氧化还原状态可能影响金属配位、膜转运和 ROS 门控，产生情境依赖的吸收代价或收益。
summary.en: Under sustained drought, root-surface iron redox status may affect metal complexation, membrane transport, and ROS gating, producing context-dependent uptake costs or benefits.

text.zh: 质膜氧化还原活动和铁相关转运通量可能改变；过量还原或 ROS 可降低膜完整性。
text.en: Plasma-membrane redox activity and iron-related transport fluxes may change; excessive reduction or ROS could reduce membrane integrity.

text.zh: 表皮和根毛区可能改变矿质获取，但缺水限制使净吸收效应不确定。
text.en: The epidermis and root-hair zone may alter mineral acquisition, but water limitation leaves the net uptake effect uncertain.

text.zh: 相对于干旱对照，叶水势和叶面积尚无一致的预测方向。
text.en: Relative to drought controls, no consistent direction is predicted yet for leaf water status or leaf area.

text.zh: 水力限制、根际化学和 FRO6 的根部底物均可能主导结果。
text.en: Hydraulic limitation, rhizosphere chemistry, and the root substrate of FRO6 may each dominate the outcome.

summary.zh: 系统可能分叉为较好的铁/ROS 缓冲，或持续氧化还原失衡；两种状态均可与中度干旱并存。
summary.en: The system may diverge toward improved iron/ROS buffering or persistent redox imbalance; either state can coexist with moderate drought.

text.zh: 若铁被有效利用，抗氧化容量可能增强；若游离活性铁增加，脂质过氧化风险可能上升。
text.en: If iron is productively used, antioxidant capacity may increase; if labile reactive iron rises, lipid-peroxidation risk may increase.

text.zh: 根尖活力可能维持较好，或因氧化压力而下降，取决于局部铁稳态。
text.en: Root-tip vigor may be maintained better or decline under oxidative pressure, depending on local iron homeostasis.

text.zh: 主根伸长和侧根起始可轻度增加或减少，不应假定单向耐旱增益。
text.en: Primary-root elongation and lateral-root initiation could modestly increase or decrease; a unidirectional drought-tolerance gain should not be assumed.

text.zh: 该分叉是机制性假设，尤其受表达量与干旱实际强度影响。
text.en: This bifurcation is mechanistic hypothesis, particularly sensitive to expression level and actual drought severity.

summary.zh: 根生长和矿质分配的权衡可能开始显现，FRO6 上调的影响预计小于干旱本身但可调节其幅度。
summary.en: Trade-offs between root growth and mineral allocation may begin to emerge; FRO6 upregulation is expected to be smaller than the drought effect but may modulate its magnitude.

text.zh: 渗透调节物、抗氧化酶和铁储存过程可能同步调整，代谢成本可能升高。
text.en: Osmotic regulators, antioxidant enzymes, and iron-storage processes may adjust together, potentially increasing metabolic cost.

text.zh: 维管装载与根皮层资源分配可能重排，但不确定其是否改善向地上部供给。
text.en: Vascular loading and cortical resource allocation may be reorganized, but whether this improves shoot supply is uncertain.

text.zh: 根冠比可能因根生长保存而上升，也可能因根尖受损而下降。
text.en: The root:shoot ratio may rise if root growth is preserved or fall if root tips are damaged.

text.zh: 缺少转基因表达范围及是否存在根特异补偿反应的信息。
text.en: The expression domain and presence of root-specific compensatory responses are unknown.

summary.zh: 若未发生明显损伤，根组织可能形成新的铁氧化还原稳态；否则会保留慢性 ROS 负担。
summary.en: If overt damage is avoided, root tissue may establish a new iron-redox steady state; otherwise, a chronic ROS burden may persist.

text.zh: 细胞内铁隔离与抗氧化网络可能稳定，或表现为持续 ROS、膜损伤和呼吸代价。
text.en: Intracellular iron sequestration and antioxidant networks may stabilize, or persistent ROS, membrane injury, and respiratory cost may remain.

text.zh: 根系导水与养分吸收可能分别受益和受限，导致组织层面的净效应不一致。
text.en: Root hydraulic conductance and nutrient uptake may benefit and be constrained, respectively, yielding an inconsistent net tissue effect.

text.zh: 植株失水速率相对干旱对照可能略有变化，但方向不能由 FRO6 名义功能可靠推断。
text.en: Plant water-loss rate may shift slightly relative to drought controls, but direction cannot be reliably inferred from nominal FRO6 function.

text.zh: 根部功能外推持续受限，且中度干旱可掩盖较小的基因效应。
text.en: Transferability to roots remains limited, and moderate drought can mask a small gene effect.

summary.zh: 累计的氧化还原和资源信号可能开始影响根系构型，但预计是小幅、空间异质且基因型依赖的。
summary.en: Accumulated redox and resource signals may begin to affect root architecture, but effects are expected to be small, spatially heterogeneous, and genotype dependent.

text.zh: 分生组织细胞周期与伸长区壁松弛可能受到相反调节。
text.en: Meristematic cell cycling and cell-wall loosening in the elongation zone may be regulated in opposing directions.

text.zh: 侧根密度、根毛发育和根尖存活可能不同步变化。
text.en: Lateral-root density, root-hair development, and root-tip survival may change asynchronously.

text.zh: 总根长和根系探索范围可能增加或减少，取决于适应性缓冲是否超过氧化代价。
text.en: Total root length and soil-exploration range may increase or decrease depending on whether adaptive buffering exceeds oxidative cost.

text.zh: 72 小时内的构型效应需要区分新生根与既有根区。
text.en: Architectural effects within 72 hours require separation of newly formed roots from pre-existing root zones.

summary.zh: 根源性矿质与水分信号可能传至地上部，但叶片响应将主要反映干旱而非可归因于 FRO6 的直接作用。
summary.en: Root-derived mineral and water signals may reach the shoot, but leaf responses will mainly reflect drought rather than a direct attributable FRO6 action.

text.zh: 叶细胞铁状态和 ROS 缓冲可能出现次级变化，但其方向和幅度均不确定。
text.en: Leaf-cell iron status and ROS buffering may show secondary changes, but both direction and magnitude are uncertain.

text.zh: 叶片光合组织可能因水分状态变化而响应，无法预计一致的 FRO6 依赖效应。
text.en: Photosynthetic leaf tissue may respond to altered water status, with no consistent FRO6-dependent effect expected.

text.zh: 叶片相对含水量、光合和萎蔫程度相对干旱对照均无可靠方向。
text.en: Relative leaf water content, photosynthesis, and wilting have no reliable direction relative to drought controls.

text.zh: 从根中 FRO6 操作推断叶片性状属于间接外推。
text.en: Inferring leaf traits from root FRO6 manipulation is an indirect extrapolation.

summary.zh: 持续处理中，代偿性铁稳态与抗氧化调节可能削弱早期效应，也可能暴露累积性氧化成本。
summary.en: With continued treatment, compensatory iron-homeostasis and antioxidant regulation may attenuate early effects or expose cumulative oxidative costs.

text.zh: 铁转运/储存反馈可能限制初始变化；若补偿不足，活性氧损伤可能累积。
text.en: Feedback in iron transport/storage may limit initial changes; if compensation is inadequate, reactive-oxygen damage may accumulate.

text.zh: 根组织活性可趋于稳定，或在敏感区出现逐步功能衰减。
text.en: Root tissue activity may stabilize or progressively decline in sensitive zones.

text.zh: 相对干旱对照的生长抑制可能缓解或加重，尚不能预设耐旱表型。
text.en: Growth inhibition relative to drought controls may be alleviated or worsened; a drought-tolerance phenotype cannot be presupposed.

text.zh: 补偿反馈的时间尺度和根部 FRO6 的限速步骤未知。
text.en: The timescale of compensatory feedback and the rate-limiting role of FRO6 in roots are unknown.

summary.zh: 至 66 小时，最合理的预测是根铁氧化还原状态被扰动而非确定性改善；表型方向仍取决于环境与表达背景。
summary.en: By 66 hours, the most plausible prediction is perturbed root iron-redox status rather than deterministic improvement; phenotype direction still depends on environment and expression context.

text.zh: 铁还原、可交换铁、ROS 与防御代谢可能达到新的但未必有益的平衡。
text.en: Ferric reduction, labile iron, ROS, and defense metabolism may reach a new, not necessarily beneficial equilibrium.

text.zh: 根区之间的功能差异可能扩大，平均组织读数可能掩盖相反响应。
text.en: Functional differences among root zones may widen, and bulk tissue readouts may mask opposing responses.

text.zh: 根系生物量和地上部生长的净变化可能很小或方向相反。
text.en: Net changes in root biomass and shoot growth may be small or opposite in direction.

text.zh: 根部、干旱和 FRO6 三者交互缺乏足够的直接机制约束。
text.en: The root–drought–FRO6 interaction lacks sufficient direct mechanistic constraint.

summary.zh: 72 小时的假设结局为：FRO6 上调调制根部铁—ROS—水分胁迫网络，但不能仅据此预测耐旱增强。
summary.en: The hypothesized 72-hour outcome is that FRO6 upregulation modulates a root iron–ROS–water-stress network, but drought tolerance cannot be predicted from this alone.

text.zh: 可能观察到铁还原活性、铁池、ROS 与抗氧化状态的耦合重排，且不同细胞区方向不同。
text.en: Coupled reorganization of ferric-reduction activity, iron pools, ROS, and antioxidant state may be observed, with different directions across cell zones.

text.zh: 根尖活力、根毛区吸收和维管供给可能产生不一致的组织响应。
text.en: Root-tip vigor, root-hair-zone uptake, and vascular supply may show nonconcordant tissue responses.

text.zh: 相对同龄干旱对照，根构型、植株水分状态与生长可能改善、无变化或恶化；不应作单向预测。
text.en: Relative to age-matched drought controls, root architecture, plant water status, and growth may improve, remain unchanged, or worsen; a unidirectional prediction is unwarranted.

text.zh: FRO6 在叶/叶肉外的可转移性有限；剂量、基因型和根发育阶段未明确。
text.en: FRO6 transferability outside leaf/mesophyll contexts is limited; dose, genotype, and root developmental stage are unspecified.

mechanisms.zh: FRO6 上调可能改变局部三价铁还原，进而影响可利用铁、金属配位和氧化还原平衡。
mechanisms.en: FRO6 upregulation may alter local ferric reduction, thereby affecting bioavailable iron, metal complexation, and redox balance.

mechanisms.zh: 中度干旱通过 ABA、ROS、水力限制和生长抑制重塑根反应，并可能放大或掩盖 FRO6 效应。
mechanisms.en: Moderate drought reshapes root responses through ABA, ROS, hydraulic limitation, and growth inhibition, potentially amplifying or masking FRO6 effects.

mechanisms.zh: 可交换铁升高可支持代谢与抗氧化体系，也可能通过氧化化学增加 ROS 和膜损伤风险。
mechanisms.en: Increased labile iron can support metabolism and antioxidant systems but may also increase ROS and membrane-damage risk through oxidative chemistry.

mechanisms.zh: 根尖、伸长区、成熟区和根毛区的铁状态与干旱敏感性不同，整体平均值可能掩盖空间异质性。
mechanisms.en: Root tip, elongation, mature, and root-hair zones differ in iron status and drought sensitivity, so bulk averages may conceal spatial heterogeneity.

assumptions.zh: 上调在根中确实发生且在 72 小时内持续；表达强度未达到明显毒性水平。
assumptions.en: Upregulation is assumed to occur in roots and persist through 72 hours without reaching an overtly toxic expression level.

assumptions.zh: 中度干旱在各处理间一致，且营养、光周期和植株年龄符合给定基线。
assumptions.en: Moderate drought is assumed to be consistent among treatments, with nutrition, photoperiod, and plant age matching the stated baseline.

assumptions.zh: 根际铁的化学形态、pH 和氧状态未指定，故其可显著改变结果方向。
assumptions.en: Rhizosphere iron speciation, pH, and oxygen status are unspecified and could substantially change outcome direction.

assumptions.zh: FRO6 的较强生物学语境在叶/叶肉；对根的推断具有有限可转移性，因此全程为高不确定性。
assumptions.en: FRO6 has stronger biological context in leaf/mesophyll settings; inference to roots has limited transferability, so uncertainty remains high throughout.

readouts.zh: 按根尖、伸长区、成熟区和根毛区测定 FRO6 转录/蛋白、铁还原活性及根表氧化还原状态。
readouts.en: Measure FRO6 transcript/protein, ferric-reduction activity, and root-surface redox state by root tip, elongation, mature, and root-hair zones.

readouts.zh: 测定总铁、可交换铁、铁定位、ROS、脂质过氧化、抗氧化酶活性及铁稳态相关转录。
readouts.en: Measure total iron, labile iron, iron localization, ROS, lipid peroxidation, antioxidant-enzyme activity, and iron-homeostasis transcripts.

readouts.zh: 测定根尖活力、主根伸长、侧根和根毛性状、根系生物量及根系导水相关指标。
readouts.en: Measure root-tip viability, primary-root elongation, lateral-root and root-hair traits, root biomass, and root hydraulic-related metrics.

readouts.zh: 在地上部测定叶水势或相对含水量、气孔导度、光合表现和生物量，以检验次级系统效应。
readouts.en: Measure leaf water potential or relative water content, stomatal conductance, photosynthetic performance, and biomass to test secondary systemic effects.

readouts.zh: 重点采样 6、18、30、42、54 和 72 小时，并保留全部预设时间点以解析早期信号与后期表型。
readouts.en: Prioritize sampling at 6, 18, 30, 42, 54, and 72 hours while retaining all prespecified timepoints to resolve early signals and later phenotypes.

design.zh: 采用同龄野生型/空载体与 FRO6 上调材料，在充分浇水和中度干旱下进行析因比较；验证根中的实际上调幅度，并记录土壤含水量、根际 pH 与铁形态。加入表达量梯度或独立转化事件可区分剂量效应；按根区进行重复取样，避免整体根样掩盖相反反应。
design.en: Use age-matched wild-type/empty-vector and FRO6-upregulated plants in a factorial well-watered versus moderate-drought comparison; verify actual root upregulation and record soil water content, rhizosphere pH, and iron speciation. Expression gradients or independent transformants can separate dose effects; sample by root zone to avoid opposing responses being masked in whole-root material.

title.zh: 拟南芥幼苗在渐进性中度干旱下的72小时条件轨迹
title.en: Conditional 72-hour trajectory of Arabidopsis seedlings under progressive moderate drought

summary.zh: 早期失水感知启动，尚未形成可见生长表型。
summary.en: Early water-deficit sensing begins, without a visible growth phenotype.

text.zh: 细胞水势下降；Ca²⁺、ROS和ABA信号增强，同时通过渗透调节维持部分膨压。
text.en: Cell water potential declines; Ca²⁺, ROS, and ABA signaling rise while osmotic adjustment preserves part of the turgor.

text.zh: 气孔调节可能已启动，但叶片和根系组织结构基本不变。
text.en: Stomatal regulation may begin, but leaf and root tissue structure remains largely unchanged.

text.zh: 幼苗整体大小和生物量与同龄对照接近。
text.en: Whole-seedling size and biomass remain close to age-matched controls.

text.zh: 早期信号反应较可靠，但实际强度取决于基质失水速率。
text.en: Early signaling is well supported, but its magnitude depends on the rate of substrate drying.

summary.zh: ABA主导的保水反应加强，并开始重配碳与离子资源。
summary.en: ABA-dominated water-conservation responses strengthen, with initial reallocation of carbon and ions.

text.zh: ABA积累和离子外流促进保卫细胞失膨压；抗氧化与兼容溶质相关转录开始上调。
text.en: ABA accumulation and ion efflux promote guard-cell turgor loss; antioxidant and compatible-solute transcription begins to rise.

text.zh: 叶片蒸腾受抑，组织水分状态轻度下降；根尖伸长仍可维持。
text.en: Leaf transpiration is suppressed and tissue hydration falls mildly; root-tip elongation can still persist.

text.zh: 地上部扩张速率开始低于对照，但尚无明显萎蔫。
text.en: Shoot expansion begins to lag behind controls, without pronounced wilting.

text.zh: 气孔响应预计先于清晰的形态变化。
text.en: Stomatal responses are expected to precede clear morphological changes.

summary.zh: 转录与代谢适应扩大，生长和防御之间的权衡变得可检测。
summary.en: Transcriptional and metabolic acclimation expands, making the growth–defense trade-off detectable.

text.zh: 脱水响应基因、渗透保护物合成和ROS清除能力增强；细胞周期推进趋缓。
text.en: Dehydration-response genes, osmoprotectant synthesis, and ROS detoxification increase; cell-cycle progression slows.

text.zh: 叶片气孔导度继续下降，而根部资源分配相对提高，可能有利于根系探索。
text.en: Leaf stomatal conductance continues to fall, while relative allocation to roots increases and may favor root exploration.

text.zh: 叶面积增长和鲜重积累轻度受限。
text.en: Leaf-area expansion and fresh-mass accumulation become mildly constrained.

text.zh: 根系反应受培养基体积、硬度和水分梯度影响较大。
text.en: Root responses are strongly influenced by substrate volume, impedance, and moisture gradients.

summary.zh: 保水状态已建立，有限的碳同化开始限制持续生长。
summary.en: A water-conserving state is established, and reduced carbon assimilation begins to limit continued growth.

text.zh: 渗透调节物和保护蛋白增加，但CO₂供应受限使光合碳固定下降。
text.en: Osmoregulatory solutes and protective proteins increase, but restricted CO₂ supply reduces photosynthetic carbon fixation.

text.zh: 叶片相对含水量和气孔导度下降；叶片伸长区的细胞扩张受抑。
text.en: Leaf relative water content and stomatal conductance decline; cell expansion in leaf growth zones is inhibited.

text.zh: 幼苗冠层扩展变慢，根冠比可能开始相对升高。
text.en: Seedling canopy expansion slows, and the root-to-shoot ratio may begin to increase.

text.zh: 中度干旱下预计以生长抑制而非广泛组织损伤为主。
text.en: Under moderate drought, growth inhibition rather than widespread tissue injury is expected to dominate.

summary.zh: 适应性保水持续，根与叶的反应差异更加明显。
summary.en: Adaptive water conservation persists, and root–leaf response differences become more evident.

text.zh: 可溶性糖、脯氨酸及抗氧化缓冲能力进一步积累，蛋白质合成更偏向胁迫维持。
text.en: Soluble sugars, proline, and antioxidant buffering accumulate further, while protein synthesis shifts toward stress maintenance.

text.zh: 叶片膨压和扩张下降；较湿的根域中侧根启动或主根维持可能相对增强。
text.en: Leaf turgor and expansion decline; lateral-root initiation or primary-root maintenance may be relatively favored in wetter root zones.

text.zh: 地上部生长差距扩大，但根系长度未必同步下降。
text.en: The shoot growth deficit widens, whereas root length need not decline in parallel.

text.zh: 根系构型方向取决于实际水分空间分布。
text.en: The direction of root architectural change depends on the actual spatial water distribution.

summary.zh: 持续胁迫使资源由生长转向维持和损伤控制。
summary.en: Continued stress redirects resources from growth toward maintenance and damage control.

text.zh: 细胞分裂与伸长相关活动下降；抗氧化、膜稳定和蛋白质折叠保护机制维持较高水平。
text.en: Cell division and elongation activities decline; antioxidant, membrane-stabilizing, and protein-folding protection remain elevated.

text.zh: 叶片水力传导和蒸腾受限，部分老叶可出现轻微失绿或卷曲倾向。
text.en: Leaf hydraulic conductance and transpiration are constrained; older leaves may show mild chlorosis or curling tendencies.

text.zh: 整株相对生长速率明显低于对照，形态仍以存活型适应为主。
text.en: Whole-seedling relative growth rate is clearly below controls, while morphology remains dominated by survival-oriented acclimation.

text.zh: 可见叶片症状的出现时间受空气湿度和光强影响。
text.en: The timing of visible leaf symptoms depends on air humidity and irradiance.

summary.zh: 稳态适应接近其代价阈值，光合与生长抑制持续。
summary.en: Steady-state acclimation approaches its cost threshold, with persistent photosynthetic and growth inhibition.

text.zh: 保护性代谢仍活跃，但能量可用性下降，ROS产生与清除的平衡更脆弱。
text.en: Protective metabolism remains active, but energy availability declines and the balance between ROS production and scavenging becomes more fragile.

text.zh: 叶肉碳同化和叶片扩张持续下降；根系生长集中于仍有水分的区域。
text.en: Mesophyll carbon assimilation and leaf expansion remain reduced; root growth concentrates in regions retaining water.

text.zh: 鲜重和叶面积的累积增量明显低于对照。
text.en: Cumulative gains in fresh mass and leaf area are markedly lower than in controls.

text.zh: 若干旱进展快于设定，损伤特征会提前出现。
text.en: If drying progresses faster than intended, damage-associated features may appear earlier.

summary.zh: 中期干旱表型变得清晰，但中度处理下仍可能保持可逆性。
summary.en: The mid-course drought phenotype becomes clear, yet may remain reversible under moderate treatment.

text.zh: 渗透保护与抗氧化系统维持，部分细胞出现更低膨压和受抑的代谢通量。
text.en: Osmoprotective and antioxidant systems are maintained, while some cells exhibit lower turgor and suppressed metabolic flux.

text.zh: 叶片相对含水量、气孔导度和光化学效率倾向下降，根系对局部水源的依赖增强。
text.en: Leaf relative water content, stomatal conductance, and photochemical efficiency tend to decline, while roots become more dependent on local water sources.

text.zh: 植株更紧凑、叶片扩展受限，地上部干物质积累降低。
text.en: Plants become more compact with limited leaf expansion and reduced shoot dry-matter accumulation.

text.zh: 可逆性取决于处理是否确实保持中度而非转为严重干旱。
text.en: Reversibility depends on whether treatment truly remains moderate rather than becoming severe.

summary.zh: 长期维持保水策略的代谢代价累积。
summary.en: The metabolic cost of maintaining a water-conserving strategy accumulates.

text.zh: 生长相关翻译和细胞壁松弛活动继续降低；若水势持续下降，膜氧化压力可能增加。
text.en: Growth-related translation and cell-wall loosening continue to decrease; membrane oxidative pressure may rise if water potential keeps falling.

text.zh: 叶片细胞扩张受限并可能出现轻度卷曲，根部新生侧根的持续生长受水分限制。
text.en: Leaf cell expansion is restricted and mild curling may occur; continued growth of newly formed lateral roots is water-limited.

text.zh: 株高、叶面积和总生物量的处理差异进一步拉大。
text.en: Treatment differences in seedling height, leaf area, and total biomass widen further.

text.zh: 营养供应充足降低了营养胁迫混杂，但不消除水分状态差异。
text.en: Adequate nutrition reduces nutrient-stress confounding but does not eliminate variation in plant water status.

summary.zh: 持续中度干旱下，生长停滞与维持性代谢达到相对稳定状态。
summary.en: Under sustained moderate drought, growth arrest and maintenance metabolism approach a relative steady state.

text.zh: 胁迫保护网络维持高活性，而细胞增殖和扩张的投入保持低位。
text.en: Stress-protection networks remain highly active, whereas investment in cell proliferation and expansion stays low.

text.zh: 叶片气体交换和组织含水量维持在低于对照的水平；根系延伸受剩余可利用水约束。
text.en: Leaf gas exchange and tissue hydration remain below control levels; root extension is constrained by remaining available water.

text.zh: 整体生长持续受抑，但在未越过损伤阈值时存活率预计接近对照。
text.en: Overall growth remains suppressed, but survival is expected to remain near controls if injury thresholds are not crossed.

text.zh: 存活结局对盆栽体积、蒸发需求和实际土壤含水量敏感。
text.en: Survival outcomes are sensitive to pot volume, evaporative demand, and actual soil water content.

summary.zh: 适应容量逐渐饱和，轻度损伤风险开始上升。
summary.en: Acclimation capacity gradually saturates, and the risk of mild injury begins to rise.

text.zh: 持续低水势可能加重氧化负荷和代谢受限，但保护性溶质仍支持细胞存活。
text.en: Persistent low water potential may intensify oxidative load and metabolic restriction, while protective solutes still support cell survival.

text.zh: 老叶更易表现失绿、卷曲或水力受限，年轻组织相对受保护。
text.en: Older leaves are more likely to show chlorosis, curling, or hydraulic limitation, while younger tissues remain relatively protected.

text.zh: 处理植株与对照的冠层大小和累积生物量差异维持或扩大。
text.en: Differences from controls in canopy size and accumulated biomass persist or increase.

text.zh: 是否出现损伤取决于渐进干旱的终点水势。
text.en: Whether injury appears depends on the endpoint water potential reached during progressive drought.

summary.zh: 72小时表型由抑制生长、保水和有限损伤风险共同构成。
summary.en: The 72-hour phenotype combines growth suppression, water conservation, and a limited risk of injury.

text.zh: 细胞维持渗透与氧化还原稳态的能力仍在，但持续胁迫可能使部分组织进入可逆的低代谢状态。
text.en: Cells retain capacity to maintain osmotic and redox homeostasis, but continued stress may place some tissues in a reversible low-metabolic state.

text.zh: 叶片水分、气体交换和扩张均低于对照；根系响应呈现对局部水分条件的强依赖。
text.en: Leaf water status, gas exchange, and expansion are below controls; root responses remain strongly dependent on local water conditions.

text.zh: 幼苗总体生物量和叶面积低于对照，恢复浇水后预计可部分恢复，前提是未发生严重脱水。
text.en: Seedling biomass and leaf area are below controls; partial recovery after rewatering is expected provided severe dehydration has not occurred.

text.zh: 该终点是假设性中度胁迫轨迹，需以水势和复水恢复实验界定。
text.en: This endpoint is a hypothetical moderate-stress trajectory and requires water-status and rewatering assays for definition.

mechanisms.zh: 土壤水分下降降低植株水势，并通过ABA、Ca²⁺和ROS信号促进气孔关闭与脱水响应基因表达。
mechanisms.en: Declining soil water lowers plant water potential and promotes stomatal closure and dehydration-response gene expression through ABA, Ca²⁺, and ROS signaling.

mechanisms.zh: 气孔关闭减少失水，但同时限制CO₂进入，造成光合碳同化与叶片扩张下降。
mechanisms.en: Stomatal closure limits water loss but also restricts CO₂ entry, reducing photosynthetic carbon assimilation and leaf expansion.

mechanisms.zh: 渗透保护物、抗氧化系统和蛋白质保护机制支持存活，却以细胞分裂、伸长和生物量积累为代价。
mechanisms.en: Osmoprotectants, antioxidant systems, and protein-protection mechanisms support survival, but at the expense of cell division, elongation, and biomass accumulation.

mechanisms.zh: 根系对水分斑块的可塑性可改变根冠资源分配，但方向受根域水分空间格局控制。
mechanisms.en: Root plasticity toward water patches can alter root–shoot allocation, but its direction is controlled by the spatial pattern of water in the root zone.

assumptions.zh: 处理在全程保持渐进且中度的干旱，未转变为急性或致死性脱水。
assumptions.en: Drought remains progressive and moderate throughout, without becoming acute or lethal dehydration.

assumptions.zh: 幼苗处于可进行叶片扩张和根系生长的营养生长期，光照和温度保持标准条件。
assumptions.en: Seedlings are in a vegetative phase capable of leaf expansion and root growth, with standard light and temperature conditions.

assumptions.zh: 与每个时间点同龄、充分浇水的未处理植株比较；方向不代表绝对数值。
assumptions.en: Directions are relative to age-matched, well-watered untreated plants at each timepoint and do not imply absolute values.

assumptions.zh: 基质类型、容器体积、基质含水量及干燥速率未给出，因此根系构型和后期损伤的可迁移性有限。
assumptions.en: Substrate type, container volume, substrate water content, and drying rate are unspecified, limiting transferability of root architecture and late-injury predictions.

readouts.zh: 在6、12、24、48和72小时测定基质含水量、叶水势或相对含水量，以及气孔导度。
readouts.en: Measure substrate water content, leaf water potential or relative water content, and stomatal conductance at 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h.

readouts.zh: 测定ABA、ROS相关指标、脯氨酸或可溶性糖，以及脱水和抗氧化标记基因表达。
readouts.en: Measure ABA, ROS-related indicators, proline or soluble sugars, and expression of dehydration and antioxidant marker genes.

readouts.zh: 测定叶绿素荧光、光合速率、叶面积、鲜重与干重，并进行根系成像分析。
readouts.en: Measure chlorophyll fluorescence, photosynthetic rate, leaf area, fresh and dry mass, and perform root imaging.

readouts.zh: 在72小时后复水，并追踪恢复生长、水分状态和叶片损伤。
readouts.en: Rewater after 72 h and track recovery of growth, water status, and leaf injury.

design.zh: 采用随机化的充分浇水对照与渐进干旱处理，连续记录盆栽重量或基质水分；在预定时间点采集独立生物重复，并将叶片与根系读数分开分析。加入复水组可区分可逆适应与损伤。
design.en: Use randomized well-watered controls and progressive-drought treatments, with continuous pot-weight or substrate-moisture tracking. Collect independent biological replicates at planned timepoints and analyze leaf and root readouts separately. A rewatering arm can distinguish reversible acclimation from injury.

title.zh: 拟南芥幼苗中度干旱后完全复水的72小时恢复轨迹
title.en: 72-hour recovery trajectory after full rewatering of moderately droughted Arabidopsis seedlings

summary.zh: 复水首先恢复水力状态；气孔与生长反应仍受干旱记忆和ABA残留约束。
summary.en: Rewatering first restores hydraulic status; stomatal and growth responses remain constrained by drought memory and residual ABA.

text.zh: 细胞水势和膨压迅速回升，液泡再充水；部分渗透调节物仍维持较高水平。
text.en: Cell water potential and turgor rise rapidly with vacuolar refilling; some osmotic-adjustment metabolites remain elevated.

text.zh: 根—茎—叶水力连续性恢复，叶片含水状态改善；蒸腾恢复尚不完全。
text.en: Root–shoot–leaf hydraulic continuity recovers and leaf hydration improves; transpiration recovery remains incomplete.

text.zh: 萎蔫开始缓解，但气孔导度、光合和叶片扩张仅部分恢复。
text.en: Wilting begins to ease, but stomatal conductance, photosynthesis, and leaf expansion recover only partly.

text.zh: 水力恢复具有较强普适性；恢复速度取决于根系受损和基质复湿均匀性。
text.en: Hydraulic recovery is broadly expected; its rate depends on root injury and uniformity of substrate rewetting.

summary.zh: 水分信号从急性缺水状态转向恢复调节，早期转录重编程开始。
summary.en: Water signaling shifts from acute deficit toward recovery regulation, and early transcriptional reprogramming begins.

text.zh: ABA相关应答逐步衰减，离子转运和氧化还原缓冲调整；复水诱导的ROS脉冲可能短暂出现。
text.en: ABA-associated responses begin to decline while ion transport and redox buffering adjust; a transient rewatering-induced ROS pulse may occur.

text.zh: 叶肉细胞重新水合，维管运输增强；根部吸水能力开始与较高土壤水分重新匹配。
text.en: Mesophyll cells rehydrate and vascular flux increases; root water uptake begins to readjust to higher soil water availability.

text.zh: 叶片姿态和气孔开度进一步恢复，碳同化开始增强。
text.en: Leaf posture and stomatal opening recover further, and carbon assimilation begins to increase.

text.zh: ROS和ABA衰减的幅度受昼夜时相及干旱持续时间影响。
text.en: The magnitude of ROS and ABA relaxation depends on diel phase and drought duration.

summary.zh: 恢复性代谢启动，但干旱期间形成的发育停滞不会立即消失。
summary.en: Recovery metabolism is engaged, but developmental arrest established during drought does not disappear immediately.

text.zh: 能量代谢、蛋白质修复和抗氧化再平衡增强；可溶性糖逐步从保护用途转向生长用途。
text.en: Energy metabolism, protein repair, and antioxidant rebalancing increase; soluble sugars gradually shift from protection toward growth.

text.zh: 叶片光合组织功能改善，而根系可能仍保留较高的吸水与胁迫适应投入。
text.en: Leaf photosynthetic tissue improves function, whereas roots may retain elevated investment in water uptake and stress acclimation.

text.zh: 净光合和蒸腾趋近对照，但叶面积增长仍落后于未受旱幼苗。
text.en: Net photosynthesis and transpiration approach control values, but leaf-area growth still lags behind unstressed seedlings.

text.zh: 碳同化恢复受复水发生在光期或暗期的影响较大。
text.en: Recovery of carbon assimilation is strongly affected by whether rewatering occurs in the light or dark period.

summary.zh: 经历一个昼夜后，水分稳态大体重建，恢复重点转向碳分配和生长重启。
summary.en: After one diel cycle, water homeostasis is largely rebuilt and recovery shifts toward carbon allocation and growth restart.

text.zh: 多数急性脱水保护物和胁迫转录状态下降，但仍可能保留一部分胁迫记忆。
text.en: Most acute dehydration protectants and stress-transcription states decline, although some stress memory may remain.

text.zh: 叶片膨压和气体交换协调性提高；分生组织获得更多可用碳源。
text.en: Leaf turgor and coordination of gas exchange improve; meristems receive more available carbon.

text.zh: 幼苗恢复正常日变化，叶片扩张和主根伸长开始重新加速。
text.en: Seedlings recover normal diel dynamics, and leaf expansion and primary-root elongation begin to accelerate again.

text.zh: 若干旱抑制了分生组织活性，形态恢复将慢于水分状态恢复。
text.en: If drought suppressed meristem activity, morphological recovery will lag behind water-status recovery.

summary.zh: 生长恢复进入可见阶段，但资源会在叶片修复、根系和新生器官之间重新分配。
summary.en: Growth recovery becomes visible, while resources are reallocated among leaf repair, roots, and newly developing organs.

text.zh: 细胞壁松弛、蛋白合成和细胞周期进入增强，支持恢复性细胞扩张与分裂。
text.en: Cell-wall loosening, protein synthesis, and cell-cycle entry increase, supporting recovery-associated cell expansion and division.

text.zh: 幼叶和根尖恢复生长较快；已受旱的成熟叶主要恢复功能而非显著再扩张。
text.en: Young leaves and root tips resume growth more rapidly; mature droughted leaves mainly regain function rather than expand substantially.

text.zh: 新叶展开和根系延长增强，整体相对生长速率上升。
text.en: New-leaf expansion and root extension increase, raising whole-seedling relative growth rate.

text.zh: 器官间碳分配方向受幼苗实际发育阶段和根域条件影响。
text.en: The direction of inter-organ carbon allocation depends on the actual seedling developmental stage and rooting environment.

summary.zh: 复水后的第二个光周期强化同化恢复，并开始补偿部分先前的生长损失。
summary.en: The second post-rewatering photoperiod strengthens assimilatory recovery and begins to compensate for prior growth loss.

text.zh: 叶绿体电子传递和糖输出能力提高，细胞氧化还原状态趋于稳态。
text.en: Chloroplast electron transport and sugar-export capacity increase, while cellular redox status approaches steady state.

text.zh: 叶肉光合能力与韧皮部输出增强，根尖获得更多同化物供应。
text.en: Mesophyll photosynthetic capacity and phloem export increase, supplying more assimilates to root tips.

text.zh: 生物量积累加快；若损伤轻微，叶片生长可出现有限补偿。
text.en: Biomass accumulation accelerates; if injury was mild, leaf growth may show limited compensation.

text.zh: 补偿生长并非必然，且通常不足以完全消除早期生长差距。
text.en: Compensatory growth is not inevitable and usually does not fully erase the earlier growth deficit.

summary.zh: 急性胁迫程序大多退出，但恢复网络仍可保留预适应性调节。
summary.en: Most acute stress programs have exited, but recovery networks may retain acclimatory regulation.

text.zh: 强脱水应答转录和渗透保护投入继续降低，代谢资源更多流向构建性过程。
text.en: Strong dehydration-response transcription and osmoprotective investment continue to decline, directing more metabolic resources to constructive processes.

text.zh: 组织含水量接近稳态，叶片与根系之间的水力供需趋于匹配。
text.en: Tissue hydration approaches steady state, and hydraulic supply and demand become matched between leaves and roots.

text.zh: 气孔日变化接近未处理状态，叶片和根系生长持续恢复。
text.en: Diel stomatal behavior approaches the untreated state, while leaf and root growth continue to recover.

text.zh: 残留胁迫记忆的持续时间难以仅由中度干旱描述确定。
text.en: The persistence of residual stress memory cannot be determined from a moderate-drought description alone.

summary.zh: 两天后，功能性恢复应较完整；累计形态差距仍可能存在。
summary.en: By two days, functional recovery should be relatively complete, although accumulated morphological differences may remain.

text.zh: 水分、离子和基础能量状态接近对照；少量表观或转录记忆可能持续。
text.en: Water, ion, and basal energy status approach the control; limited epigenetic or transcriptional memory may persist.

text.zh: 叶片气体交换和根部吸水的组织级协调接近未受旱幼苗。
text.en: Tissue-level coordination of leaf gas exchange and root water uptake approaches that of unstressed seedlings.

text.zh: 即时生理表现接近对照，但总叶面积和累积生物量通常仍偏低。
text.en: Immediate physiological performance approaches control, but total leaf area and cumulative biomass are usually still lower.

text.zh: 形态差距取决于干旱期是否跨越关键叶片或根系生长窗口。
text.en: Morphological lag depends on whether drought overlapped critical leaf or root growth windows.

summary.zh: 恢复系统从修复转向持续生长，资源分配逐渐由胁迫后模式回归常态。
summary.en: The recovery system shifts from repair to sustained growth, with allocation gradually returning from a post-stress mode toward normality.

text.zh: 细胞保护与修复需求趋于基础水平，细胞扩张和分裂维持活跃。
text.en: Cellular protection and repair demands approach basal levels, while cell expansion and division remain active.

text.zh: 新生叶组织和根尖持续形成，源—库运输支持器官建成。
text.en: New leaf tissue and root tips continue forming, with source–sink transport supporting organ construction.

text.zh: 相对生长速率可接近对照，但累计大小差异尚未完全弥合。
text.en: Relative growth rate may approach the control, but cumulative size differences are not yet fully closed.

text.zh: 是否出现明显追赶生长受光照、盆土体积和养分供应限制。
text.en: Whether substantial catch-up growth occurs is limited by light, pot volume, and nutrient supply.

summary.zh: 恢复表型主要由先前损伤程度而非持续缺水决定。
summary.en: The recovery phenotype is now shaped mainly by prior injury severity rather than ongoing water deficit.

text.zh: 细胞稳态维持接近对照，残留差异主要体现在长期调控和生长历史。
text.en: Cellular homeostasis is maintained near control levels; residual differences lie mainly in long-term regulation and growth history.

text.zh: 成熟叶功能大体稳定，新生组织继续决定后续恢复容量。
text.en: Mature-leaf function is largely stable, while newly formed tissues continue to determine subsequent recovery capacity.

text.zh: 光合与蒸腾可近似恢复，但植株大小、叶数或根系构型仍可能不同。
text.en: Photosynthesis and transpiration may be nearly restored, but plant size, leaf number, or root architecture may still differ.

text.zh: 根系构型的恢复特别依赖土壤结构，水培或平板培养的可迁移性有限。
text.en: Recovery of root architecture depends especially on substrate structure, limiting transferability across hydroponic or plate systems.

summary.zh: 幼苗进入恢复后的稳态生长期，早期胁迫记忆可能只在再次受旱时显现。
summary.en: Seedlings enter a post-recovery steady growth phase; early stress memory may become evident mainly upon renewed drought.

text.zh: 基础代谢和水分平衡稳定，诱导性防御阈值可能仍与对照不同。
text.en: Basal metabolism and water balance are stable, though thresholds for inducible defense may still differ from control.

text.zh: 叶片和根系的常规功能维持，组织间资源交换回到稳定日周期。
text.en: Routine leaf and root functions are maintained, and inter-tissue resource exchange returns to a stable diel cycle.

text.zh: 植株继续稳定生长，但此前的大小差距仅会缓慢缩小。
text.en: Plants continue steady growth, but prior size differences will narrow only gradually.

text.zh: 胁迫记忆是否保留及其功能后果受基因型和干旱经历影响。
text.en: Whether stress memory persists and has functional consequences depends on genotype and drought history.

summary.zh: 三天时，水分与瞬时功能大多恢复，而发育轨迹可能仍带有干旱遗留效应。
summary.en: At three days, water status and instantaneous function are largely recovered, whereas developmental trajectory may still carry drought legacy effects.

text.zh: 细胞水分和核心代谢接近对照，长期记忆标记若存在则不必伴随急性胁迫表型。
text.en: Cellular water status and core metabolism approach control; any long-term memory marks need not coincide with an acute stress phenotype.

text.zh: 组织水力和光合功能维持恢复状态，新增器官逐渐主导整体表现。
text.en: Tissue hydraulic and photosynthetic functions maintain recovery, and newly formed organs increasingly shape whole-plant performance.

text.zh: 即时生理接近未处理幼苗，但累积生物量及根—冠结构可能仍保留差异。
text.en: Immediate physiology approaches untreated seedlings, but cumulative biomass and root–shoot architecture may still retain differences.

text.zh: 该轨迹适用于中度、可逆干旱；若发生根损伤或复水涝害，后期恢复可明显偏离。
text.en: This trajectory applies to moderate, reversible drought; root injury or rewatering-associated waterlogging could markedly alter late recovery.

mechanisms.zh: 复水先通过土壤—根—叶水力通路提升水势与膨压，随后才充分恢复气孔和光合调控。
mechanisms.en: Rewatering first raises water potential and turgor through the soil–root–leaf hydraulic pathway, before fully restoring stomatal and photosynthetic regulation.

mechanisms.zh: ABA、离子转运、ROS与氧化还原缓冲在早期共同协调从缺水到复水的状态切换。
mechanisms.en: ABA, ion transport, ROS, and redox buffering jointly coordinate the early transition from water deficit to rewatering.

mechanisms.zh: 恢复后的碳分配在组织修复、根系吸水能力和新叶生长之间权衡，因此形态恢复慢于水分恢复。
mechanisms.en: Post-rewatering carbon allocation trades off among tissue repair, root water-uptake capacity, and new-leaf growth, so morphological recovery lags behind water recovery.

mechanisms.zh: 干旱造成的生长停滞和潜在胁迫记忆可使复水后的轨迹偏离简单的时间反演。
mechanisms.en: Drought-induced growth arrest and potential stress memory can make the rewatering trajectory differ from a simple time reversal.

assumptions.zh: 中度干旱未造成广泛不可逆的根系、叶片或分生组织损伤，且复水后不存在持续涝害。
assumptions.en: Moderate drought did not cause widespread irreversible injury to roots, leaves, or meristems, and rewatering does not produce persistent waterlogging.

assumptions.zh: 复水水量足以使根域均匀湿润，光照、温度和养分维持标准条件。
assumptions.en: The rewatering volume is sufficient to moisten the rooting zone uniformly, while light, temperature, and nutrition remain standard.

assumptions.zh: 幼苗处于营养生长阶段；具体基因型、精确苗龄、干旱持续时间和培养基质未提供，因此对生长补偿的置信度降低。
assumptions.en: Seedlings are in the vegetative stage; genotype, exact age, drought duration, and growth substrate are unspecified, reducing confidence in growth-compensation predictions.

readouts.zh: 在0、1、6、12、24、48和72小时测定基质含水量、叶水势或相对含水量、叶温及气孔导度。
readouts.en: Measure substrate water content, leaf water potential or relative water content, leaf temperature, and stomatal conductance at 0, 1, 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h.

readouts.zh: 同步测定叶片净光合、叶绿素荧光、蒸腾及ABA、ROS或抗氧化状态的代表性指标。
readouts.en: Concurrently measure leaf net photosynthesis, chlorophyll fluorescence, transpiration, and representative ABA, ROS, or antioxidant-status indicators.

readouts.zh: 量化主根伸长、侧根形成、叶面积、新叶展开和干重，以区分功能恢复与累计生长恢复。
readouts.en: Quantify primary-root elongation, lateral-root formation, leaf area, new-leaf emergence, and dry mass to distinguish functional from cumulative growth recovery.

readouts.zh: 用早期与后期转录或代谢采样追踪脱水应答退出、修复代谢和潜在记忆状态。
readouts.en: Use early and late transcript or metabolite sampling to track exit from dehydration responses, repair metabolism, and potential memory states.

design.zh: 设置同龄持续灌水对照、干旱但不复水的短期对照，以及复水后排水良好的处理；在相同昼夜时相取样，并记录盆重或基质水分以确认实际复水强度。
design.en: Include age-matched continuously watered controls, a short-term droughted non-rewatered control, and a well-drained rewatered treatment; sample at matched diel phases and record pot mass or substrate moisture to verify actual rewatering intensity.

title.zh: 冷胁迫下拟南芥幼苗的 FRO6 相关铁稳态与生长条件轨迹
title.en: Conditional trajectory of FRO6-associated iron homeostasis and growth in cold-stressed Arabidopsis seedlings

summary.zh: 冷感知首先重塑离子、氧化还原和能量信号；尚不预期出现稳定的器官表型。
summary.en: Cold perception first reshapes ionic, redox, and energy signaling; a stable organ-level phenotype is not yet expected.

text.zh: Ca²⁺/ROS 信号与抗氧化调节增强，而低温直接降低膜酶反应速率；FRO6 相关 Fe(III) 还原净变化尚不确定。
text.en: Ca²⁺/ROS signaling and antioxidant adjustment rise, whereas cold directly slows membrane-enzyme kinetics; the net change in FRO6-associated Fe(III) reduction is uncertain.

text.zh: 幼苗组织尚以快速生理缓冲为主，铁分配格局预计接近基线。
text.en: Seedling tissues are dominated by rapid physiological buffering, and iron partitioning is expected to remain near baseline.

text.zh: 可见生长和叶色通常仍接近同龄未处理幼苗。
text.en: Visible growth and greenness should generally remain close to age-matched untreated seedlings.

text.zh: FRO6 的证据主要可迁移自叶/叶肉背景；整株幼苗含多种组织，外推有限。
text.en: Evidence for FRO6 is chiefly transferable from leaf/mesophyll contexts; a whole seedling contains multiple tissues, limiting transferability.

summary.zh: 冷响应转录程序开始巩固，并可能调整铁氧化还原缓冲需求。
summary.en: The cold-responsive transcriptional program begins to consolidate and may alter demand for iron-redox buffering.

text.zh: 冷响应基因表达及还原力分配趋于增强，但低温对 FRO6 蛋白周转和催化活性的抑制可抵消转录效应。
text.en: Cold-response gene expression and reductant allocation tend to rise, but low-temperature inhibition of FRO6 protein turnover and catalysis may offset transcriptional effects.

text.zh: 子叶和幼叶可能开始出现轻微的铁利用重排，但尚不应形成明确空间梯度。
text.en: Cotyledons and young leaves may begin mild iron-use reallocation, but a clear spatial gradient is not yet expected.

text.zh: 生长速率的即时下降可能仅能由高频成像检测。
text.en: An immediate decrease in growth rate may be detectable only by high-frequency imaging.

text.zh: 缺少 FRO6 在该幼苗阶段和冷处理剂量下的组织分辨表达信息。
text.en: Tissue-resolved FRO6 expression at this seedling stage and cold-treatment dose is unspecified.

summary.zh: 冷适应开始在细胞代谢层面显现，铁需求与还原力竞争可能增强。
summary.en: Cold acclimation begins to emerge at the cellular metabolic level, potentially increasing competition between iron demand and reducing power.

text.zh: 光合电子传递受冷限制可提高氧化压力；若 FRO6 被诱导，局部 Fe(III) 还原可增加，但净酶通量仍受温度约束。
text.en: Cold-limited photosynthetic electron transport can raise oxidative pressure; if FRO6 is induced, local Fe(III) reduction may increase, but net enzyme flux remains temperature-constrained.

text.zh: 光合组织可能优先维持叶绿体铁供给，非光合区域的铁可利用性则可能相对下降。
text.en: Photosynthetic tissues may preferentially maintain chloroplast iron supply, while iron availability in nonphotosynthetic regions may decline relatively.

text.zh: 幼苗扩张生长预计开始低于未处理对照。
text.en: Seedling expansion growth is expected to begin falling below the untreated control.

text.zh: 该方向依赖光照下的碳同化状态及 FRO6 是否在相关细胞中表达。
text.en: This direction depends on carbon assimilation under light and on whether FRO6 is expressed in the relevant cells.

summary.zh: 经过一个昼夜周期后，冷适应与生长抑制应更易区分。
summary.en: After one diurnal cycle, cold acclimation and growth inhibition should become more distinguishable.

text.zh: 渗透保护、抗氧化和铁结合缓冲加强；FRO6 转录或蛋白丰度可能上调，但低温下实际还原活性未必同步上升。
text.en: Osmoprotective, antioxidant, and iron-binding buffering strengthen; FRO6 transcript or protein abundance may rise, but actual reductase activity need not increase in parallel at low temperature.

text.zh: 子叶/幼叶可出现优先铁保留，而根与新生区域的铁通量可能被重新分配。
text.en: Cotyledons/young leaves may preferentially retain iron, while iron flux to roots and newly growing regions may be redistributed.

text.zh: 叶片展开和主根延伸速率预计下降，但尚未必出现明显失绿。
text.en: Leaf expansion and primary-root elongation are expected to decline, without necessarily causing obvious chlorosis.

text.zh: FRO6 对幼苗铁再分配的直接贡献尚不能由叶肉相关知识可靠推定。
text.en: The direct contribution of FRO6 to seedling iron redistribution cannot be reliably inferred from mesophyll-related knowledge.

summary.zh: 细胞防御投入持续，生长与铁氧化还原维持之间的资源权衡加深。
summary.en: Cellular defensive investment continues, deepening the resource trade-off between growth and iron-redox maintenance.

text.zh: 抗氧化还原力需求增加，可能限制可供 FRO6 类还原过程的电子；同时铁螯合和储存倾向增强。
text.en: Greater antioxidant reductant demand may limit electrons available for FRO6-like reduction, while iron chelation and storage tendencies increase.

text.zh: 组织间铁分配可能更加异质，光合区域与分生组织的优先级可能不同。
text.en: Intertissue iron distribution may become more heterogeneous, with potentially different priorities in photosynthetic and meristematic regions.

text.zh: 幼苗生物量积累预计持续落后于对照。
text.en: Seedling biomass accumulation is expected to remain behind the control.

text.zh: 缺少基因型、铁供给状态和子叶与真叶比例，限制机制归因。
text.en: Missing genotype, iron-supply status, and cotyledon-to-true-leaf proportion limit mechanistic attribution.

summary.zh: 适应性稳态逐步形成，但持续低温仍限制代谢通量和细胞扩张。
summary.en: An adaptive steady state gradually forms, but persistent cold still limits metabolic flux and cell expansion.

text.zh: 冷适应可稳定部分氧化还原状态，但膜流动性下降和酶动力学受限仍可能压低 FRO6 介导的有效还原通量。
text.en: Cold acclimation may stabilize part of the redox state, but reduced membrane fluidity and constrained enzyme kinetics may still lower effective FRO6-mediated reduction flux.

text.zh: 若外源铁充足，组织铁库预计被缓冲在近稳态；可利用铁的微域差异仍可能存在。
text.en: If external iron is sufficient, tissue iron pools are expected to be buffered near steady state, although microniche differences in available iron may persist.

text.zh: 叶面积增长与根系伸长继续受抑，形态差异开始累积。
text.en: Leaf-area increase and root elongation remain inhibited, and morphological differences begin to accumulate.

text.zh: 充分营养降低了缺铁表型的可预期性，但不排除细胞内铁氧化还原变化。
text.en: Adequate nutrition lowers the expectation of iron-deficiency phenotypes but does not exclude intracellular iron-redox changes.

summary.zh: 跨越第二个光周期后，光合组织的冷适应与资源再分配应更明显。
summary.en: After entering a second light cycle, cold acclimation in photosynthetic tissues and resource reallocation should become more evident.

text.zh: 光合恢复与 ROS 控制可能改善，但 FRO6 相关表达、蛋白量和还原活性可能彼此脱耦。
text.en: Photosynthetic recovery and ROS control may improve, but FRO6-associated expression, protein amount, and reductase activity may become decoupled.

text.zh: 叶绿体功能维持可能优先获得铁资源，而快速生长组织的铁需求满足度可能下降。
text.en: Maintenance of chloroplast function may receive priority for iron resources, while rapidly growing tissues may have reduced iron-demand satisfaction.

text.zh: 处理组与对照的尺寸差异预计更加可测。
text.en: The size difference between treated and control seedlings is expected to become more measurable.

text.zh: FRO6 在非叶肉幼苗细胞中的作用有限可转移，不能据此推断全苗平均酶活。
text.en: FRO6 function in non-mesophyll seedling cells has limited transferability, precluding inference of whole-seedling mean activity.

summary.zh: 持续冷胁迫下，幼苗进入以维持代谢为主、增长受限的状态。
summary.en: Under sustained cold stress, seedlings enter a state dominated by maintenance metabolism and constrained growth.

text.zh: 铁储存、螯合及抗氧化防御可能维持较高投入；FRO6 相关还原能力可能被调节但难以预测净方向。
text.en: Iron storage, chelation, and antioxidant defense may remain highly invested; FRO6-associated reduction capacity may be regulated but its net direction is difficult to predict.

text.zh: 在营养充足条件下，整体组织铁含量可大致稳定，但不同组织的化学形态可能改变。
text.en: Under adequate nutrition, total tissue iron may remain broadly stable, although chemical forms can change among tissues.

text.zh: 生长抑制预计持续，叶色多半仍由冷适应和光条件共同决定。
text.en: Growth inhibition is expected to persist, while leaf color will likely be jointly determined by cold acclimation and light conditions.

text.zh: 总铁稳定并不等同于可利用铁或 FRO6 底物供应稳定。
text.en: Stable total iron does not imply stable bioavailable iron or FRO6 substrate supply.

summary.zh: 冷适应网络趋于维持，但代谢成本持续限制新组织形成。
summary.en: The cold-acclimation network tends toward maintenance, but metabolic cost continues to constrain new tissue formation.

text.zh: 防御性转录可能趋于平台，酶活受温度限制；FRO6 若参与响应，其变化更可能表现为调控与通量不一致。
text.en: Defensive transcription may approach a plateau while enzyme activity remains temperature-limited; if FRO6 participates, its response may more likely show discordance between regulation and flux.

text.zh: 现有光合组织相对受保护，新生叶和根尖的资源竞争可能增强。
text.en: Existing photosynthetic tissue is relatively protected, while resource competition in emerging leaves and root tips may intensify.

text.zh: 新叶出现和器官扩张预计慢于同龄对照。
text.en: New-leaf emergence and organ expansion are expected to be slower than in age-matched controls.

text.zh: 发育阶段的细小差异会显著改变新叶比例及该阶段的表型。
text.en: Small developmental differences can substantially alter new-leaf proportion and phenotype at this stage.

summary.zh: 若冷强度可耐受，幼苗应维持存活性适应，但不会恢复到对照生长通量。
summary.en: If cold intensity is tolerable, seedlings should sustain a viable acclimated state but not recover control-level growth flux.

text.zh: 氧化还原稳态可能较早期稳定，然而低温持续限制铁还原相关膜酶的最大通量。
text.en: Redox homeostasis may be more stable than earlier, yet cold persistently limits the maximal flux of iron-reduction-associated membrane enzymes.

text.zh: 在无营养限制的前提下，组织层面的铁稳态预计相对稳定，局部再分配持续进行。
text.en: Assuming no nutrient limitation, tissue-level iron homeostasis is expected to be relatively stable while local redistribution continues.

text.zh: 累积生物量、根长和叶面积预计均低于未处理幼苗。
text.en: Cumulative biomass, root length, and leaf area are expected to be below those of untreated seedlings.

text.zh: 该稳态预测取决于实际温度、昼夜周期及培养基中铁的有效性。
text.en: This steady-state prediction depends on the actual temperature, light-dark cycle, and iron availability in the growth medium.

summary.zh: 适应性维持和发育延迟并存，FRO6 相关变化仍应与实际还原活性分开解释。
summary.en: Adaptive maintenance and developmental delay coexist; FRO6-associated changes should still be interpreted separately from actual reductase activity.

text.zh: 若 FRO6 转录持续变化，可能反映铁氧化还原调节需求；但蛋白丰度和原位 Fe(III) 还原未必同向。
text.en: If FRO6 transcription remains altered, it may reflect iron-redox regulatory demand; however, protein abundance and in situ Fe(III) reduction need not move in the same direction.

text.zh: 组织成熟度差异加大，较老的子叶与较新的器官可能呈现不同的铁状态。
text.en: Differences in tissue maturity increase, and older cotyledons versus newer organs may show distinct iron states.

text.zh: 发育进程预计滞后，尤其表现为叶片扩展和根系构型改变减慢。
text.en: Developmental progression is expected to lag, particularly through slower leaf expansion and root-system architectural change.

text.zh: 全苗取样会混合不同成熟组织，可能掩盖 FRO6 的细胞类型特异变化。
text.en: Whole-seedling sampling mixes tissues of different maturity and may mask cell-type-specific FRO6 changes.

summary.zh: 72 小时内最稳健的预期是冷适应伴随持续生长代价；FRO6 净功能方向仍需直接测定。
summary.en: By 72 h, the most robust expectation is cold acclimation with a sustained growth cost; the net functional direction of FRO6 still requires direct measurement.

text.zh: 冷适应、ROS 缓冲和铁结合状态应持续重塑；FRO6 相关表达可能偏离基线，但低温酶动力学使净还原通量不确定。
text.en: Cold acclimation, ROS buffering, and iron-binding status should remain remodeled; FRO6-associated expression may differ from baseline, but low-temperature enzyme kinetics leave net reductase flux uncertain.

text.zh: 幼苗铁分配预计保持重构而非单向耗竭；叶肉外组织的 FRO6 推断尤其有限。
text.en: Seedling iron distribution is expected to remain remodeled rather than undergo unidirectional depletion; FRO6 inference is especially limited outside mesophyll tissues.

text.zh: 整株幼苗大小和生长速率预计低于对照，耐受程度取决于实际冷强度。
text.en: Whole-seedling size and growth rate are expected to be below control values, with tolerance depending on actual cold intensity.

text.zh: 这是机制性假设而非实验结论；缺少温度、基因型和组织分辨数据使 FRO6 预测保持高不确定性。
text.en: This is a mechanistic hypothesis rather than an experimental conclusion; absent temperature, genotype, and tissue-resolved data keep FRO6 predictions highly uncertain.

mechanisms.zh: 冷感知通过 Ca²⁺、ROS、激素和转录重编程改变抗氧化需求、膜性质及代谢通量。
mechanisms.en: Cold perception alters antioxidant demand, membrane properties, and metabolic flux through Ca²⁺, ROS, hormonal, and transcriptional reprogramming.

mechanisms.zh: 低温可同时诱导铁稳态相关调控并降低膜酶催化速率，因此 FRO6 表达与实际 Fe(III) 还原通量可能脱耦。
mechanisms.en: Cold can simultaneously induce iron-homeostasis regulation and reduce membrane-enzyme catalytic rates, so FRO6 expression may be decoupled from actual Fe(III)-reduction flux.

mechanisms.zh: 在铁供应充足的幼苗中，更可能发生铁的化学形态和组织间再分配，而非迅速出现总铁耗竭。
mechanisms.en: In iron-sufficient seedlings, changes in iron speciation and intertissue redistribution are more plausible than rapid total-iron depletion.

mechanisms.zh: 维持冷适应和氧化还原缓冲消耗资源，从而以叶片扩张、根伸长和生物量积累下降为代价。
mechanisms.en: Maintaining cold acclimation and redox buffering consumes resources, at the cost of reduced leaf expansion, root elongation, and biomass accumulation.

assumptions.zh: 处理为可耐受的非冻结冷胁迫，温度在整个预测期内恒定，且光照条件稳定。
assumptions.en: Treatment is a tolerable non-freezing cold stress with constant temperature and stable light conditions throughout the forecast.

assumptions.zh: 幼苗处于营养充足的营养生长阶段，培养体系未造成额外铁限制。
assumptions.en: Seedlings are vegetative and nutrient sufficient, with no additional iron limitation imposed by the growth system.

assumptions.zh: FRO6 的主要可用机制背景来自叶/叶肉；对包含根、分生组织和不同龄叶的整株幼苗外推有限。
assumptions.en: The main usable mechanistic context for FRO6 comes from leaves/mesophyll; transfer to whole seedlings containing roots, meristems, and leaves of different ages is limited.

assumptions.zh: 未指定基因型、准确温度、培养基铁有效性及幼苗日龄，因此所有 FRO6 相关方向保持高不确定性。
assumptions.en: Genotype, exact temperature, medium iron availability, and seedling age are unspecified; therefore all FRO6-related directions retain high uncertainty.

readouts.zh: 在 6、12、24、48 和 72 小时测定 FRO6 转录本、蛋白丰度及原位或膜组分 Fe(III) 还原活性。
readouts.en: Measure FRO6 transcript, protein abundance, and in situ or membrane-fraction Fe(III)-reduction activity at 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h.

readouts.zh: 测定可利用铁、总铁及铁化学形态，并对子叶、真叶、根和根尖分别取样。
readouts.en: Measure bioavailable iron, total iron, and iron speciation with separate sampling of cotyledons, true leaves, roots, and root tips.

readouts.zh: 同步检测 ROS、还原力状态、叶绿素荧光、叶面积、主根长度和生物量。
readouts.en: Concurrently assess ROS, reductant status, chlorophyll fluorescence, leaf area, primary-root length, and biomass.

readouts.zh: 比较 FRO6 功能受扰材料与相应野生型，并包含同龄常温对照和必要的铁供应对照。
readouts.en: Compare FRO6 function-perturbed material with its matched wild type, including age-matched warm controls and appropriate iron-supply controls.

design.zh: 采用同批次、随机化幼苗，在稳定光照下进行非冻结冷处理；以组织分辨的重复时间序列联合表达、蛋白、酶活、铁状态和生长测量。避免仅凭全苗 RNA 或总铁含量推断 FRO6 功能。
design.en: Use randomized seedlings from the same batch under non-freezing cold treatment with stable light; combine tissue-resolved repeated time courses of expression, protein, enzyme activity, iron status, and growth. Avoid inferring FRO6 function from whole-seedling RNA or total iron alone.

title.zh: 中度干旱下拟南芥幼苗FRO6上调的条件性轨迹
title.en: Conditional trajectory of FRO6 upregulation in Arabidopsis seedlings under moderate drought

summary.zh: 首先预期出现铁还原相关的细胞表面过程增强；组织与幼苗性状尚不应有稳定可见变化。
summary.en: An early increase in cell-surface iron-reduction-related activity is expected; stable tissue and seedling phenotypes should not yet be apparent.

text.zh: FRO6相关的质外体Fe(III)还原潜力可能升高，局部Fe(II)供应增加。
text.en: FRO6-associated apoplastic Fe(III)-reduction capacity may rise, increasing local Fe(II) availability.

text.zh: 幼苗叶组织中的铁状态空间分布尚难预测，且幼苗整体结果不能直接等同于叶肉反应。
text.en: The spatial iron status of seedling leaf tissue remains difficult to predict, and whole-seedling responses cannot be equated directly with mesophyll responses.

text.zh: 叶面积、伸长和萎蔫表型预计接近同龄未处理对照。
text.en: Leaf area, elongation, and wilting are expected to remain near those of age-matched untreated controls.

text.zh: FRO6在幼苗及非明确叶肉细胞中的功能转移性有限；表达强度和细胞定位未知。
text.en: Transferability of FRO6 function to seedlings and non-explicit mesophyll cells is limited; expression magnitude and cellular localization are unknown.

summary.zh: 铁氧化还原状态改变可能开始与干旱诱导的氧化还原信号耦合，但尚不足以推断生长获益。
summary.en: Altered iron redox status may begin to couple with drought-induced redox signaling, but this is still insufficient to infer a growth benefit.

text.zh: 可还原铁池可能增加，同时若Fe(II)未被安全配位，局部ROS生成风险也可能上升。
text.en: The reducible iron pool may increase, while local ROS-generation risk may also rise if Fe(II) is not safely ligated.

text.zh: 叶片或子叶中可能出现微弱的铁稳态与抗氧化转录重调节。
text.en: Weak iron-homeostasis and antioxidant transcriptional adjustment may emerge in leaves or cotyledons.

text.zh: 气孔行为和失水速率主要仍由干旱本身决定，净表型差异预计很小。
text.en: Stomatal behavior and water-loss rate should still be driven mainly by drought itself, with little net phenotypic divergence expected.

text.zh: 铁还原增强究竟改善铁利用还是放大氧化压力，取决于配位、转运和干旱背景。
text.en: Whether increased iron reduction improves iron use or amplifies oxidative stress depends on ligation, transport, and drought context.

summary.zh: 细胞铁缓冲和ROS清除网络可能被招募，组织层面的反应开始但可能呈空间异质性。
summary.en: Cellular iron-buffering and ROS-scavenging networks may be recruited, with emerging but spatially heterogeneous tissue responses.

text.zh: 铁结合、液泡隔离及抗氧化系统可能上调，以缓冲还原铁增加带来的氧化还原波动。
text.en: Iron binding, vacuolar sequestration, and antioxidant systems may increase to buffer redox fluctuations caused by greater reduced iron.

text.zh: 叶肉或表皮附近的铁可利用性可能提高，而维管相关区域仍可能维持或强化铁限制信号。
text.en: Iron availability may increase near mesophyll or epidermal regions, whereas vascular-associated regions may retain or strengthen iron-limitation signaling.

text.zh: 幼苗整体生物量和叶绿化程度预计尚无可靠方向性偏移。
text.en: Whole-seedling biomass and greening are not yet expected to show a reliable directional shift.

text.zh: 缺少FRO6上调的细胞类型、剂量及初始铁状态信息，限制组织级外推。
text.en: Missing information on cell type, upregulation dose, and initial iron status limits tissue-level extrapolation.

summary.zh: 在持续中度干旱下，铁供应调节与防御代谢可能形成新的暂态平衡。
summary.en: Under continuing moderate drought, iron-supply regulation and defense metabolism may form a new transient balance.

text.zh: 若还原铁被转运或螯合，铁依赖代谢可能得到支持；若缓冲不足，脂质过氧化压力可能增加。
text.en: If reduced iron is transported or chelated, iron-dependent metabolism may be supported; if buffering is inadequate, lipid-peroxidation pressure may increase.

text.zh: 子叶和早生真叶可能出现局部抗氧化增强，同时伴随不均一的铁分配。
text.en: Cotyledons and emerging true leaves may show localized antioxidant enhancement alongside uneven iron allocation.

text.zh: 相对干旱对照的叶片保绿或轻度失绿尚无确定方向。
text.en: Relative to drought controls, leaf greenness or mild chlorosis has no determined direction yet.

text.zh: 该预测依赖FRO6上调是否实际提高有效Fe(III)还原，而非仅提高转录或蛋白丰度。
text.en: This prediction depends on whether FRO6 upregulation actually elevates effective Fe(III) reduction rather than only transcript or protein abundance.

summary.zh: 代谢代价开始变得重要：有益的铁动员与潜在的铁催化氧化损伤可能分叉。
summary.en: Metabolic cost becomes important: beneficial iron mobilization and potential iron-catalyzed oxidative injury may diverge.

text.zh: 呼吸和叶绿体铁需求过程可能获得更多底物，但ROS解毒负荷也可能提高。
text.en: Respiratory and chloroplast iron-demanding processes may gain more substrate, but the ROS-detoxification burden may also increase.

text.zh: 光合组织可能维持较高的铁可利用性，但组织平均氧化还原状态未必改善。
text.en: Photosynthetic tissue may maintain greater iron availability, but mean tissue redox status may not improve.

text.zh: 相对干旱对照的光合维持、叶温和水分状态可能开始分化，但方向取决于铁缓冲能力。
text.en: Photosynthetic maintenance, leaf temperature, and water status may begin to diverge from drought controls, but direction depends on iron-buffering capacity.

text.zh: FRO6在叶肉以外情境中的有限可转移性使幼苗整体性状预测保持高不确定性。
text.en: Limited transferability of FRO6 function outside mesophyll contexts keeps whole-seedling trait predictions highly uncertain.

summary.zh: 持续处理可使适应性铁管理或氧化损伤两种状态之一更加清晰，但不能预设结果。
summary.en: Continued treatment may clarify either adaptive iron management or oxidative damage, but neither outcome can be presumed.

text.zh: 铁储存、螯合与过氧化物清除若充分，可限制游离Fe(II)；不足时膜损伤风险升高。
text.en: Adequate iron storage, chelation, and peroxide removal could limit free Fe(II); insufficiency would raise membrane-damage risk.

text.zh: 叶片可表现为铁代谢防御增强与局部氧化应激标志并存。
text.en: Leaves may exhibit coexisting enhanced iron-metabolic defenses and localized oxidative-stress markers.

text.zh: 叶片保绿和相对含水量可能改善，也可能因氧化负担而下降；应以分支假设处理。
text.en: Leaf greenness and relative water content may improve or decline because of oxidative burden; this should be treated as a branched hypothesis.

text.zh: 干旱下的性状结局高度依赖铁配位能力、光强和根源铁供应。
text.en: Trait outcome under drought depends strongly on iron-chelation capacity, light intensity, and root-derived iron supply.

summary.zh: 组织层面的铁分配和氧化还原适应可能影响叶片功能，但对整个幼苗的净效应仍不确定。
summary.en: Tissue-level iron allocation and redox adaptation may affect leaf function, while the net effect on the whole seedling remains uncertain.

text.zh: 细胞可能维持较高还原铁通量，并通过转运、隔离和抗氧化反应限制其反应性。
text.en: Cells may sustain higher reduced-iron flux while limiting its reactivity through transport, sequestration, and antioxidant responses.

text.zh: 叶片内的铁状态可能更趋空间分化，光合区与非光合区反应不同。
text.en: Iron status within leaves may become more spatially differentiated, with distinct responses in photosynthetic and non-photosynthetic zones.

text.zh: 干旱抑制生长仍可能占主导，FRO6上调带来的增益或代价预计较小且条件依赖。
text.en: Drought inhibition of growth may remain dominant; benefits or costs of FRO6 upregulation are expected to be small and context dependent.

text.zh: 未指定叶肉特异性、诱导持续性或遗传背景，不能将细胞反应稳健映射为整株表现。
text.en: Mesophyll specificity, induction persistence, and genetic background are unspecified, preventing robust mapping of cell responses to whole-plant performance.

summary.zh: 至两天时，调节网络可能进入维持阶段，表型差异若存在应主要体现在胁迫耐受代价与资源分配。
summary.en: By two days, regulatory networks may enter a maintenance phase; any phenotypic difference should primarily reflect stress-tolerance costs and resource allocation.

text.zh: 铁还原增强可能持续支持铁酶系统，也可能持续增加对螯合和抗氧化容量的需求。
text.en: Enhanced iron reduction may continue to support iron-enzyme systems while increasing demand for chelation and antioxidant capacity.

text.zh: 叶组织的叶绿素维持与氧化损伤程度可能呈斑块化或个体间变异。
text.en: Chlorophyll maintenance and oxidative damage in leaf tissue may be patchy or vary among individuals.

text.zh: 相对干旱对照，幼苗生物量积累可能略受支持，也可能因防御成本而受限。
text.en: Relative to drought controls, seedling biomass accumulation may be modestly supported or constrained by defense costs.

text.zh: 幼苗器官背景而非明确叶肉背景，使FRO6功能外推尤其有限。
text.en: A seedling-organ context rather than an explicit mesophyll context makes functional extrapolation of FRO6 especially limited.

summary.zh: 持续干旱会放大资源分配后果，FRO6相关的铁动员效应可能由细胞层面传递至叶功能。
summary.en: Continuing drought may amplify resource-allocation consequences, allowing FRO6-related iron mobilization effects to propagate from cells to leaf function.

text.zh: 若铁稳态缓冲成功，氧化还原波动可趋于受控；若失败，ROS和膜脂氧化可能累积。
text.en: If iron-homeostasis buffering succeeds, redox fluctuations may become controlled; if it fails, ROS and membrane-lipid oxidation may accumulate.

text.zh: 叶片可能表现出较好的光系统保护或更明显的失绿，两者均应与铁形态和ROS读数对应检验。
text.en: Leaves may show better photosystem protection or more evident chlorosis; either outcome should be tested against iron-speciation and ROS readouts.

text.zh: 叶片扩张和根冠比相对对照的变化方向仍无法可靠指定。
text.en: The direction of changes in leaf expansion and root-to-shoot ratio relative to controls cannot yet be assigned reliably.

text.zh: 中度干旱的实际水势、铁有效性和FRO6上调幅度均未量化。
text.en: Actual water potential under moderate drought, iron availability, and the magnitude of FRO6 upregulation are all unquantified.

summary.zh: 此阶段可能显现累计效应，但应优先将其解释为铁—ROS平衡改变，而非FRO6的单向促生长作用。
summary.en: Cumulative effects may emerge at this stage, but they should be interpreted first as altered iron–ROS balance rather than a unidirectional growth-promoting effect of FRO6.

text.zh: 铁依赖代谢与氧化防御之间的资源竞争可能持续，决定细胞功能维持或损伤。
text.en: Resource competition between iron-dependent metabolism and oxidative defense may persist, determining cellular maintenance or injury.

text.zh: 光合效率、叶绿素保持和氧化损伤标志可能共同变化，但不一定同向。
text.en: Photosynthetic efficiency, chlorophyll retention, and oxidative-damage markers may change together but not necessarily in the same direction.

text.zh: 幼苗活力可能相对干旱对照维持、无变化或下降，最合理的预测是条件性分叉。
text.en: Seedling vigor may be maintained, unchanged, or reduced relative to drought controls; a conditional branch is the most plausible prediction.

text.zh: 缺乏组织特异性表达与铁稳态背景信息，无法判定净适应价值。
text.en: Without tissue-specific expression and iron-homeostasis context, net adaptive value cannot be determined.

summary.zh: 铁管理网络与干旱适应网络的长期耦合应已建立，其结果可能是受控稳态或渐进性氧化压力。
summary.en: Longer-term coupling between iron-management and drought-adaptation networks should be established, yielding either controlled homeostasis or progressive oxidative pressure.

text.zh: 细胞内游离反应性铁的控制程度将成为决定后续损伤或耐受的关键节点。
text.en: The degree of control over intracellular reactive iron becomes a key determinant of subsequent damage or tolerance.

text.zh: 叶片可能维持功能性铁供应，也可能出现与ROS热点相伴的局部组织退化。
text.en: Leaves may maintain functional iron supply or develop localized tissue decline associated with ROS hotspots.

text.zh: 相对干旱对照的存活与生长差异可能开始可见，但预测方向仍不充分。
text.en: Differences in survival and growth relative to drought controls may become visible, but their direction remains insufficiently determined.

text.zh: FRO6在非叶肉或全幼苗尺度的有限转移性仍是主要不确定性来源。
text.en: Limited transferability of FRO6 function outside mesophyll or at whole-seedling scale remains the main source of uncertainty.

summary.zh: 三天时可评估净结局：FRO6上调可能支持受控铁利用，也可能在干旱下加重铁相关氧化负担。
summary.en: At three days, net outcome can be assessed: FRO6 upregulation may support controlled iron use or exacerbate iron-associated oxidative burden under drought.

text.zh: 预期核心状态为增强的铁还原通量与可变的铁缓冲/ROS控制能力并存。
text.en: The expected core state is enhanced iron-reduction flux coexisting with variable iron-buffering and ROS-control capacity.

text.zh: 叶组织可呈现保绿和光合维持，或失绿与氧化损伤；应依据空间分辨读数区分。
text.en: Leaf tissue may show greening retention and photosynthetic maintenance, or chlorosis and oxidative injury; spatially resolved readouts should distinguish these states.

text.zh: 相对同龄未处理植物，干旱本身应降低生长；相对干旱对照，FRO6上调的净性状效应可能为正或负。
text.en: Relative to age-matched untreated plants, drought itself should reduce growth; relative to drought controls, the net trait effect of FRO6 upregulation may be positive or negative.

text.zh: 该终点为机制性假设，不构成实验结论；剂量、基因型、发育阶段和叶肉相关性均限制置信度。
text.en: This endpoint is a mechanistic hypothesis, not an experimental conclusion; dose, genotype, developmental stage, and mesophyll relevance all limit confidence.

mechanisms.zh: FRO6上调可提高细胞表面或质外体Fe(III)向Fe(II)转化的潜力，从而改变局部铁可利用性。
mechanisms.en: FRO6 upregulation can raise the potential for cell-surface or apoplastic Fe(III)-to-Fe(II) reduction, altering local iron availability.

mechanisms.zh: 在干旱下，增加的还原铁既可能支持铁依赖的光合、呼吸及抗氧化过程，也可能经铁催化反应增加ROS风险。
