mechanisms.zh: 干旱期间形成的根系构型和资源分配遗留，使复水恢复不等同于干旱过程的时间反演。
mechanisms.en: Drought-induced legacies in root architecture and resource allocation make rewatering recovery different from a time reversal of drought.

assumptions.zh: 对象为营养生长期、营养充足的水稻；干旱为中度且未造成广泛根尖死亡。
assumptions.en: The plant is vegetative, adequately nourished rice, and drought is moderate without widespread root-tip death.

assumptions.zh: 复水充分且相对均匀，随后根区含水量维持适宜，不发生积水缺氧。
assumptions.en: Rewatering is sufficient and relatively uniform, with subsequent root-zone moisture remaining favorable and without waterlogging hypoxia.

assumptions.zh: 未指定品种、土壤基质、根龄组成和干旱持续时间，因此侧根与形态补偿预测具有中等不确定性。
assumptions.en: Cultivar, substrate, root-age composition, and drought duration are unspecified; therefore predictions of lateral rooting and morphological compensation have medium uncertainty.

assumptions.zh: 该轨迹适用于根系一般复水生理，不针对FRO6；若问题转为FRO6在根中的作用，因其并非叶/叶肉语境，转移性有限且应采用高不确定性。
assumptions.en: This trajectory concerns general root rewatering physiology, not FRO6; if interpreted for FRO6 in roots, transferability from leaf/mesophyll contexts is limited and high uncertainty is required.

readouts.zh: 根区含水量、土壤与根水势、根系液流或水力导度，以及叶片蒸腾/气孔导度。
readouts.en: Root-zone water content, soil and root water potential, root sap flow or hydraulic conductance, and leaf transpiration/stomatal conductance.

readouts.zh: 根尖细胞活性、ROS和膜完整性、ABA及可溶性糖，辅以呼吸或ATP相关指标。
readouts.en: Root-tip cell viability, ROS and membrane integrity, ABA and soluble sugars, alongside respiration or ATP-related measures.

readouts.zh: 主根伸长、侧根密度与伸出、根毛性状、根系总长度/表面积及根系活力。
readouts.en: Primary-root elongation, lateral-root density and emergence, root-hair traits, total root length/surface area, and root vigor.

readouts.zh: 硝酸盐、铵态氮、磷酸盐和钾的吸收或组织含量，并监测根区氧气以排除复水缺氧。
readouts.en: Uptake or tissue content of nitrate, ammonium, phosphate, and potassium, with root-zone oxygen monitored to exclude post-rewatering hypoxia.

design.zh: 设置同龄持续灌溉对照、持续干旱对照和复水组；在复水前及6、12、24、36、48、72 h重复取样，并分开分析根尖、成熟根和新生侧根。记录土壤含水量与根区氧气，以区分复水恢复和积水胁迫。
design.en: Use age-matched continuously watered, continued-drought, and rewatered groups; sample before rewatering and at 6, 12, 24, 36, 48, and 72 h, analyzing root tips, mature roots, and new lateral roots separately. Record soil moisture and root-zone oxygen to distinguish rewatering recovery from waterlogging stress.

title.zh: 水稻营养生长期根系对非冻结冷胁迫的条件性轨迹
title.en: Conditional trajectory of vegetative rice roots under non-freezing cold stress

summary.zh: 冷感知首先触发快速应激信号，尚未出现明显根系形态重塑。
summary.en: Cold perception first elicits rapid stress signaling, before overt root architectural remodeling.

text.zh: 膜流动性下降，同时Ca²⁺、ROS和脂质重塑信号短暂增强。
text.en: Membrane fluidity declines, while Ca²⁺, ROS, and lipid-remodeling signals rise transiently.

text.zh: 根尖细胞伸长区的生长驱动力与水分通量开始受抑。
text.en: Growth drive and water flux in the root-tip elongation zone begin to decline.

text.zh: 全根长度和根系构型通常尚无可见变化。
text.en: Total root length and architecture are usually not yet visibly altered.

text.zh: 早期冷信号较具普适性，但响应幅度受温度和品种影响。
text.en: Early cold signaling is broadly supported, but its magnitude depends on temperature and cultivar.

summary.zh: 信号转入转录和代谢应答，根尖生长抑制变得可检测。
summary.en: Signaling transitions into transcriptional and metabolic responses, and root-tip growth inhibition becomes detectable.

text.zh: 冷响应转录、抗氧化和渗透调节程序上调，但细胞周期推进放缓。
text.en: Cold-response transcription, antioxidant defense, and osmotic adjustment increase, while cell-cycle progression slows.

text.zh: 根尖分生组织至伸长区的细胞产生与伸长同步减弱。
text.en: Cell production and elongation decline across the root meristem-to-elongation-zone continuum.

text.zh: 主根瞬时伸长速率预计开始低于同龄未处理植株。
text.en: Primary-root instantaneous elongation rate is expected to fall below that of age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: 转录启动时间会随实际冷强度及根温而变动。
text.en: Transcriptional onset varies with actual cold intensity and root-zone temperature.

summary.zh: 防御代谢投入增加，生长相关碳利用受到重新分配。
summary.en: Investment in defensive metabolism increases, reallocating carbon use away from growth.

text.zh: 可溶性糖、相容性溶质和抗氧化能力上升，线粒体能量供应受冷限制。
text.en: Soluble sugars, compatible solutes, and antioxidant capacity rise, while mitochondrial energy supply is constrained by cold.

text.zh: 根尖呼吸、离子运输和组织水力导度倾向下降。
text.en: Root-tip respiration, ion transport, and tissue hydraulic conductance tend to decline.

text.zh: 根系延伸受抑更明确，但总体根生物量变化仍有限。
text.en: Root extension inhibition becomes clearer, although whole-root biomass change remains limited.

text.zh: 碳状态取决于叶片供糖与低温对运输的影响。
text.en: Carbon status depends on leaf sugar supply and cold effects on transport.

summary.zh: 持续冷胁迫建立生长—防御权衡，并开始改变根尖组织功能。
summary.en: Sustained cold establishes a growth-defense trade-off and begins to alter root-tip tissue function.

text.zh: 膜脂去饱和与蛋白稳态维护增强；细胞扩张和细胞壁松弛受限。
text.en: Membrane lipid desaturation and proteostasis increase; cell expansion and cell-wall loosening are constrained.

text.zh: 伸长区缩短，根尖吸水和矿质吸收能力下降。
text.en: The elongation zone shortens, reducing root-tip water uptake and mineral acquisition capacity.

text.zh: 主根日增长量下降，侧根发生可能开始延后。
text.en: Daily primary-root increment declines, and lateral-root initiation may begin to lag.

text.zh: 侧根反应高度依赖基因型、温度和原有根龄。
text.en: Lateral-root responses depend strongly on genotype, temperature, and pre-existing root age.

summary.zh: 根细胞逐步进入冷适应状态，但生长恢复尚不充分。
summary.en: Root cells progressively enter a cold-acclimated state, but growth recovery remains incomplete.

text.zh: 保护性代谢物和清除ROS的能力维持较高，增殖活性持续偏低。
text.en: Protective metabolites and ROS-scavenging capacity remain elevated, while proliferative activity stays low.

text.zh: 根尖存活与完整性得到维持，但组织扩展和导水仍受抑。
text.en: Root-tip survival and integrity are maintained, but tissue expansion and water conduction remain inhibited.

text.zh: 根长增量持续减少，根冠比可能因根受抑而下降。
text.en: Root-length increment remains reduced, and the root-to-shoot ratio may decline as roots are suppressed.

text.zh: 根冠比还受地上部冷敏性和光合变化影响。
text.en: The root-to-shoot ratio is also influenced by shoot cold sensitivity and photosynthetic change.

summary.zh: 适应性稳态开始形成，急性损伤信号若胁迫适中则趋于缓和。
summary.en: An acclimatory steady state begins to form, and acute damage signals may subside under moderate stress.

text.zh: Ca²⁺和ROS脉冲趋于回落，而渗透保护、膜稳定和修复程序保持增强。
text.en: Ca²⁺ and ROS pulses tend to recede, whereas osmoprotection, membrane stabilization, and repair programs remain elevated.

text.zh: 根尖功能部分稳定，但新生组织的形成速率仍低于对照。
text.en: Root-tip function partly stabilizes, but production of new tissue remains below control.

text.zh: 主根伸长可能出现低水平平台，尚未预期恢复至对照速率。
text.en: Primary-root elongation may reach a low-level plateau and is not expected to recover to the control rate.

text.zh: 是否出现适应取决于冷温是否处于可耐受范围。
text.en: Whether acclimation emerges depends on whether the temperature is within a tolerable range.

summary.zh: 持续冷条件下，根系在维持与扩张之间保持保守资源分配。
summary.en: Under persistent cold, roots maintain conservative allocation between maintenance and expansion.

text.zh: 细胞保护与蛋白周转持续，细胞分裂和伸长相关活动仍偏弱。
text.en: Cell protection and protein turnover continue, while cell-division and elongation-associated activities remain weak.

text.zh: 根尖生长区和新侧根原基的发育进程倾向减慢。
text.en: Development of the root-tip growth zone and new lateral-root primordia tends to slow.

text.zh: 根系空间探索能力下降，侧根密度的增加可能受限。
text.en: Root spatial foraging capacity declines, and gains in lateral-root density may be constrained.

text.zh: 侧根密度可因冷强度、激素状态和取样根段而呈不同方向。
text.en: Lateral-root density can vary in direction with cold intensity, hormonal state, and sampled root segment.

summary.zh: 冷适应与慢性生长约束并存，根系功能下降累积为表型差异。
summary.en: Cold acclimation coexists with chronic growth constraint, accumulating into phenotypic differences in root function.

text.zh: 稳态抗氧化和渗透调节维持，细胞扩张所需的能量与壁松弛仍受限。
text.en: Steady antioxidant and osmotic regulation persist, while energy supply and wall loosening for cell expansion remain constrained.

text.zh: 根组织的有效吸收表面积扩张减慢，养分转运潜力下降。
text.en: Expansion of effective absorptive root area slows, lowering nutrient-transport potential.

text.zh: 累计根长和根干物质预计低于未处理同龄植株。
text.en: Cumulative root length and root dry matter are expected to be below age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: 生物量差异的大小取决于处理温度及培养基供氧。
text.en: The magnitude of biomass divergence depends on treatment temperature and medium oxygenation.

summary.zh: 若冷胁迫未加重，适应性保护可限制伤害，但不能完全解除生长抑制。
summary.en: If cold stress does not intensify, acclimatory protection may limit injury but does not fully relieve growth inhibition.

text.zh: 细胞损伤标志应低于急性阶段峰值，代谢资源仍优先用于维持。
text.en: Cell-damage markers should be lower than acute-phase peaks, while metabolic resources remain prioritized for maintenance.

text.zh: 已形成根尖可保持活性，新生根组织的补充速度仍然较慢。
text.en: Established root tips may retain activity, but replenishment of newly formed root tissue remains slow.

text.zh: 根系增长差距继续累积；可见萎蔫并非必然出现。
text.en: The root-growth gap continues to accumulate; visible wilting is not necessarily expected.

text.zh: 稳定光照有助于供碳，但不能消除根温造成的限制。
text.en: Stable light supports carbon supply but does not remove root-temperature constraints.

summary.zh: 根系进入受限但相对稳定的持续应答，长期构型变化开始更易检测。
summary.en: Roots enter a constrained but relatively stable sustained response, making longer-term architectural changes easier to detect.

text.zh: 冷保护代谢维持较高背景水平，细胞增殖与扩张保持低速。
text.en: Cold-protective metabolism remains at an elevated background level, while cell proliferation and expansion remain slow.

text.zh: 根轴延伸及侧根出芽的组织级速率仍低于对照。
text.en: Tissue-level rates of root-axis elongation and lateral-root emergence remain below control.

text.zh: 根系总长度、分枝发展和吸收潜力预计持续受抑。
text.en: Total root length, branching development, and absorptive capacity are expected to remain suppressed.

text.zh: 耐冷品种可能表现为更强保护和较小生长代价。
text.en: Cold-tolerant cultivars may show stronger protection and a smaller growth penalty.

summary.zh: 持续冷胁迫下的根系表型主要反映慢性生长限制，而非必然的进行性坏死。
summary.en: Under sustained cold, the root phenotype primarily reflects chronic growth limitation rather than inevitable progressive necrosis.

text.zh: 修复、抗氧化与渗透平衡仍被维持；若能量不足，代谢压力可能累积。
text.en: Repair, antioxidation, and osmotic balance remain maintained; metabolic strain may accumulate if energy becomes limiting.

text.zh: 根尖完整性可保持，但部分根段的导水和吸收效率偏低。
text.en: Root-tip integrity may be retained, but hydraulic and absorptive efficiency is lower in parts of the root system.

text.zh: 与对照相比，根系大小差异应更清楚，整体生长仍较慢。
text.en: Differences in root-system size versus control should be clearer, while overall growth remains slow.

text.zh: 若实际温度接近伤害阈值，损伤会替代适应并提高不确定性。
text.en: If actual temperature approaches an injury threshold, damage may supersede acclimation and increase uncertainty.

summary.zh: 72小时后预期形成冷适应下的低生长稳态，是否可逆需在复温后判断。
summary.en: By 72 h, a low-growth cold-acclimated state is expected; reversibility requires assessment after rewarming.

text.zh: 保护性稳态仍高于对照，而增殖、扩张和能量周转能力低于对照。
text.en: Protective homeostasis remains above control, whereas proliferative, expansive, and energy-turnover capacity remain below control.

text.zh: 根尖生长区持续受限，根系吸水与矿质获取的恢复尚不充分。
text.en: The root-tip growth zone remains constrained, and recovery of water and mineral acquisition is incomplete.

text.zh: 累计根长、根生物量和根系探索范围预计均低于未处理植株。
text.en: Cumulative root length, root biomass, and root exploratory range are expected to be below untreated plants.

text.zh: 缺少具体温度、品种和根区环境信息，限制对终点幅度的判断。
text.en: Missing temperature, cultivar, and root-zone information limits inference about endpoint magnitude.

mechanisms.zh: 低温降低膜流动性并触发Ca²⁺、ROS及激素相关信号，启动冷响应转录。
mechanisms.en: Cold lowers membrane fluidity and triggers Ca²⁺, ROS, and hormone-associated signals that initiate cold-response transcription.

mechanisms.zh: 渗透调节、抗氧化、膜脂重塑和蛋白稳态维护有助于根细胞冷适应。
mechanisms.en: Osmotic adjustment, antioxidant defense, membrane-lipid remodeling, and proteostasis support cold acclimation in root cells.

mechanisms.zh: 维持与防御的资源投入提高，限制细胞分裂、伸长、吸收和根系构型扩展。
mechanisms.en: Greater allocation to maintenance and defense constrains cell division, elongation, uptake, and root architectural expansion.

assumptions.zh: 处理为持续、均一且非冻结的中等冷胁迫；未给出具体温度，因此不推断伤害阈值。
assumptions.en: Stress is continuous, uniform, non-freezing, and moderate; no injury threshold is inferred because temperature is unspecified.

assumptions.zh: 对象为营养生长期、养分和水分充足的水稻根系，比较基准为各时间点同龄未处理植株。
assumptions.en: The subject is a well-watered, adequately nourished vegetative rice root system, compared with age-matched untreated plants at each timepoint.

assumptions.zh: 稳定光照支持地上部供碳，但根区温度、溶氧、基因型和根龄仍可显著改变轨迹。
assumptions.en: Stable light supports shoot-derived carbon supply, but root-zone temperature, oxygen, genotype, and root age can substantially alter the trajectory.

readouts.zh: 根区温度、根尖存活率、主根伸长速率、累计根长、侧根发生与根生物量。
readouts.en: Root-zone temperature, root-tip viability, primary-root elongation rate, cumulative root length, lateral-root development, and root biomass.

readouts.zh: 根尖分生区/伸长区长度、细胞长度、细胞分裂标记及细胞壁松弛相关指标。
readouts.en: Meristematic- and elongation-zone length, cell length, cell-division markers, and cell-wall-loosening indicators.

readouts.zh: ROS、膜完整性或脂质过氧化、抗氧化能力、可溶性糖/渗透调节物及膜脂组成。
readouts.en: ROS, membrane integrity or lipid peroxidation, antioxidant capacity, soluble sugars/osmolytes, and membrane-lipid composition.

readouts.zh: 根呼吸、根系水力导度、离子吸收，以及冷响应与生长相关转录标记。
readouts.en: Root respiration, root hydraulic conductance, ion uptake, and cold-response and growth-associated transcript markers.

design.zh: 设置同龄未处理温度对照，并记录实际根区温度；在6、12、24、36、48、60和72小时进行重复时间序列取样。分离根尖与成熟根段，并在72小时后加入复温恢复组，以区分可逆适应与累积损伤。
design.en: Include an age-matched temperature control and log actual root-zone temperature; collect replicated time-series samples at 6, 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, and 72 h. Separate root tips from mature segments, and add a rewarming-recovery group after 72 h to distinguish reversible acclimation from cumulative injury.

title.zh: 水稻根中干旱条件下FRO6上调的假设性轨迹
title.en: Hypothetical trajectory of FRO6 upregulation in rice roots under moderate drought

summary.zh: 早期蛋白活性变化可能先于广泛转录和根系表型响应。
summary.en: Early changes in protein activity may precede broad transcriptional and root phenotypic responses.

text.zh: 推测铁(III)还原能力上升，局部Fe²⁺池及氧化还原敏感ROS信号改变；净效应受底物铁供应限制。
text.en: Ferric-reduction capacity may rise, altering local Fe²⁺ pools and redox-sensitive ROS signaling; the net effect is limited by substrate iron availability.

text.zh: 根组织整体铁分配和含水状态预计尚无明显可见改变。
text.en: Bulk root iron partitioning and water status are not yet expected to show conspicuous changes.

text.zh: 根长、分枝和植株萎蔫程度预计接近同龄未处理对照。
text.en: Root length, branching, and plant wilting are expected to remain near age-matched untreated controls.

text.zh: FRO6的叶/叶肉相关知识向水稻根转移有限；根中定位、底物和表达强度未给出。
text.en: Transferability of FRO6 knowledge from leaf/mesophyll contexts to rice roots is limited; root localization, substrate, and expression magnitude are unspecified.

summary.zh: 氧化还原信号可能开始连接至缺铁、抗氧化和干旱应答转录网络。
summary.en: Redox signals may begin to connect with iron-status, antioxidant, and drought-response transcriptional networks.

text.zh: Fe²⁺生成可能增强金属利用，但也可能提高Fenton相关氧化压力；抗氧化缓冲或随之被诱导。
text.en: Greater Fe²⁺ production may improve metal utilization but could also raise Fenton-associated oxidative pressure; antioxidant buffering may be induced in parallel.

text.zh: 表皮、皮层与维管邻近细胞的响应可能不同，尚不预期形成稳定的组织尺度梯度。
text.en: Epidermal, cortical, and vascular-adjacent cells may respond differently, without an established tissue-scale gradient yet.

text.zh: 预计尚无可靠的根系构型或地上部耐旱表型差异。
text.en: No reliable difference in root architecture or shoot drought phenotype is expected yet.

text.zh: 根细胞类型特异性及FRO6是否直接参与根铁还原均不明确。
text.en: Root cell-type specificity and whether FRO6 directly contributes to root ferric reduction remain unclear.

summary.zh: 转录重编程和铁稳态反馈可能变得可检测，但方向取决于铁有效性。
summary.en: Transcriptional reprogramming and iron-homeostasis feedback may become detectable, but their direction depends on iron availability.

text.zh: 铁摄取、螯合、液泡储存及ROS清除相关基因可能被差异调节；若还原铁过量，储存和解毒反馈可能增强。
text.en: Genes for iron uptake, chelation, vacuolar storage, and ROS scavenging may be differentially regulated; storage and detoxification feedback may increase if reduced iron accumulates.

text.zh: 根尖与成熟区可能出现不同的氧化还原和铁状态，组织平均值可能掩盖这种异质性。
text.en: Root tips and mature zones may develop distinct redox and iron states, which could be masked in tissue averages.

text.zh: 细胞分裂或伸长的变化若存在，预计仍不足以产生稳定的形态学差异。
text.en: Any changes in cell division or elongation are still unlikely to yield stable morphological differences.

text.zh: 缺少根区位、可利用铁水平和上调方式信息，限制方向判断。
text.en: Missing information on root zone, bioavailable iron, and the mode of upregulation limits directional inference.

summary.zh: 在持续中度干旱下，铁氧化还原调节可能开始影响根细胞的代谢维持。
summary.en: Under sustained moderate drought, iron-redox regulation may begin to affect metabolic maintenance in root cells.

text.zh: 适度Fe²⁺供给可能支持含铁蛋白和抗氧化代谢；若ROS超过缓冲能力，则膜脂过氧化风险上升。
text.en: Moderate Fe²⁺ supply may support iron proteins and antioxidant metabolism; if ROS exceed buffering capacity, lipid peroxidation risk rises.

text.zh: 根尖生长区可能维持较高活性，而较老区域可能积累氧化负荷或启动储铁反应。
text.en: The root-tip growth zone may retain higher activity, whereas older regions may accumulate oxidative burden or initiate iron-storage responses.

text.zh: 根伸长的净变化尚不确定：改善铁代谢可维持生长，而氧化负担可抑制生长。
text.en: The net change in root elongation remains uncertain: improved iron metabolism may sustain growth, whereas oxidative burden may suppress it.

text.zh: 此预测依赖FRO6在根中具有功能性还原酶活性，尚不能由叶肉背景直接推断。
text.en: This prediction depends on FRO6 having functional reductase activity in roots, which cannot be directly inferred from mesophyll context.

summary.zh: 根内铁处理与干旱防御之间可能出现可测的耦合或失配。
summary.en: A measurable coupling, or mismatch, between root iron handling and drought defense may emerge.

text.zh: 抗氧化酶活性、还原型谷胱甘肽状态和铁螯合能力可能共同调整；过量游离Fe²⁺会使细胞受损方向占优。
text.en: Antioxidant enzyme activity, reduced-glutathione status, and iron-chelation capacity may adjust together; excessive labile Fe²⁺ would favor cellular damage.

text.zh: 木质部装载及根—茎铁运输可能改变，也可能因干旱降低的水流而受限。
text.en: Xylem loading and root-to-shoot iron transport may change, but may also be constrained by drought-reduced water flow.

text.zh: 根系活力可能被维持，但若氧化损伤累积，根尖活力和侧根起始可能下降。
text.en: Root viability may be maintained, but root-tip activity and lateral-root initiation may decline if oxidative damage accumulates.

text.zh: 根铁通量对水分通量、土壤铁形态及转基因表达空间格局高度敏感。
text.en: Root iron flux is highly sensitive to water flux, soil iron speciation, and the spatial pattern of transgene expression.

summary.zh: 中期响应可能从信号和代谢调整扩展至根区功能差异。
summary.en: Mid-course responses may extend from signaling and metabolic adjustment to functional differences among root zones.

text.zh: 若稳态适应成功，ROS清除与铁封存可限制游离铁；若失败，线粒体功能和膜完整性可能受损。
text.en: If homeostatic adaptation succeeds, ROS scavenging and iron sequestration may limit labile iron; if it fails, mitochondrial function and membrane integrity may be impaired.

text.zh: 根尖、侧根原基和成熟吸收区可能呈现不同活力，整体根组织平均响应预计不均一。
text.en: Root tips, lateral-root primordia, and mature absorptive zones may show differing vitality, yielding a nonuniform bulk-root response.

text.zh: 总根长和侧根密度可能开始偏离对照，但增强或减弱取决于适应性铁稳态是否建立。
text.en: Total root length and lateral-root density may begin to diverge from controls, but whether they increase or decrease depends on establishment of adaptive iron homeostasis.

text.zh: 组织尺度后果需要根区分辨测量；叶/叶肉FRO6资料对该阶段的预测能力有限。
text.en: Tissue-scale consequences require zone-resolved measurement; leaf/mesophyll FRO6 information has limited predictive value at this stage.

summary.zh: 持续干旱可能放大FRO6相关铁还原与水分限制之间的权衡。
summary.en: Continued drought may amplify trade-offs between FRO6-associated ferric reduction and water limitation.

text.zh: 有利情形下，铁供应支持呼吸和防御；不利情形下，Fe²⁺-ROS循环可加强氧化胁迫。
text.en: In a favorable case, iron supply supports respiration and defense; in an unfavorable case, Fe²⁺–ROS cycling can intensify oxidative stress.

text.zh: 根的吸收区可能维持较高还原活性，而运输组织的有效铁输出受蒸腾下降限制。
text.en: Absorptive root zones may maintain higher reductive activity, whereas effective iron export through transport tissues may be limited by reduced transpiration.

text.zh: 相对未处理对照，根系耐旱表现可能改善或恶化；最可能先表现为根活力而非地上部形态差异。
text.en: Relative to untreated controls, root drought performance may improve or worsen; root viability is more likely to shift before shoot morphology.

text.zh: 缺少土壤水势、铁供应和根特异表达信息，无法判定权衡的主导方向。
text.en: Without soil water potential, iron supply, and root-specific expression information, the dominant direction of the trade-off cannot be determined.

summary.zh: 铁稳态反馈可能形成新的动态平衡，或表现为持续性氧化失衡。
summary.en: Iron-homeostasis feedback may form a new dynamic balance or manifest as persistent oxidative imbalance.

text.zh: 铁还原、螯合、储存和抗氧化过程可能共同重设；游离铁与ROS同时升高将提示失衡。
text.en: Iron reduction, chelation, storage, and antioxidant processes may reset jointly; simultaneous rises in labile iron and ROS would indicate imbalance.

text.zh: 根中总铁量未必改变，但铁的化学形态和细胞间分配可能已改变。
text.en: Total root iron may not change, but iron speciation and intercellular partitioning may have shifted.

text.zh: 根系生物量累积可能出现早期差异，但单次终点测量难以区分生长变化与组织损伤。
text.en: Early divergence in root biomass accumulation may emerge, but a single endpoint cannot distinguish altered growth from tissue injury.

text.zh: FRO6对根铁形态而非总铁量的潜在影响尤其需要直接检测。
text.en: A potential FRO6 effect on root iron speciation rather than total iron particularly requires direct testing.

summary.zh: 适应性与损伤性分支的累积后果应开始在根功能指标中显现。
summary.en: Cumulative consequences of adaptive versus damaging branches should begin to appear in root functional indices.

text.zh: 适应分支预计保持能量代谢和抗氧化还原力；损伤分支则表现为膜损伤、ROS积累和细胞活性下降。
text.en: The adaptive branch is expected to preserve energy metabolism and antioxidant reducing power; the damaging branch would show membrane injury, ROS accumulation, and lower cell viability.

text.zh: 存活根尖比例、根系呼吸和吸收区功能可能发生变化，且不同根序间变异较大。
text.en: The proportion of viable root tips, root respiration, and absorptive-zone function may change, with substantial variation among root orders.

text.zh: 根系对干旱的净适应性仍不确定，但相对蒸腾、叶片状态的变化可能滞后于根部指标。
text.en: Net drought adaptation of the root system remains uncertain, while changes in transpiration and leaf status may lag behind root indicators.

text.zh: 该预测不应视为根中FRO6功能的证据，因其跨器官可转移性有限。
text.en: This prediction should not be treated as evidence of FRO6 function in roots, owing to limited cross-organ transferability.

summary.zh: 根—地上部资源协调可能开始反映根部铁氧化还原状态的持续影响。
summary.en: Root–shoot resource coordination may begin to reflect persistent effects of root iron-redox status.

text.zh: 长期还原压力可能继续支持铁利用或导致ROS负荷；两种状态都可触发代谢重分配。
text.en: Persistent reductive activity may continue to support iron utilization or generate ROS burden; either state can trigger metabolic reallocation.

text.zh: 若根功能得以维持，水分和矿质吸收区活性可相对提高；若失衡，老化区功能衰减可扩大。
text.en: If root function is maintained, water and mineral uptake-zone activity may be relatively higher; if imbalance occurs, functional decline in older zones may expand.

text.zh: 植株失水症状可能轻微改善或加重，预期效应小于根部氧化还原读数且受环境影响大。
text.en: Plant dehydration symptoms may be mildly improved or worsened; expected effects are smaller than root redox readouts and strongly environment-dependent.

text.zh: 水稻根中FRO6上调对根—茎运输和整株耐旱性的因果链尚未确定。
text.en: The causal chain from FRO6 upregulation in rice roots to root–shoot transport and whole-plant drought tolerance is unresolved.

summary.zh: 持续处理下，稳态维持能力将决定根系是进入耐受状态还是累积损伤状态。
summary.en: Under continued treatment, homeostatic capacity will determine whether roots enter a tolerant state or an accumulated-damage state.

text.zh: 耐受状态可能具有受控Fe²⁺池、较低ROS和持续抗氧化能力；损伤状态则相反。
text.en: A tolerant state may feature controlled Fe²⁺ pools, lower ROS, and sustained antioxidant capacity; a damaged state would show the opposite.

text.zh: 组织层面可能出现根尖保留与部分成熟区衰退并存，因此总体方向不宜简化。
text.en: Root-tip preservation may coexist with decline in parts of mature tissue, so the overall tissue direction should not be oversimplified.

text.zh: 根构型重塑、根冠比和叶片水分状态可能开始形成可检测差异，但不保证方向一致。
text.en: Root architectural remodeling, root-to-shoot ratio, and leaf water status may begin to show detectable differences, but their directions need not align.

text.zh: 未说明基因型、启动子、上调幅度及根发育阶段，限制长期表型外推。
text.en: Genotype, promoter, upregulation magnitude, and root developmental stage are unspecified, limiting long-term phenotypic extrapolation.

summary.zh: 72小时终点最可能揭示条件依赖的铁稳态—ROS—根功能结果，而非普适的耐旱增益。
summary.en: The 72-h endpoint is most likely to reveal a condition-dependent iron-homeostasis–ROS–root-function outcome rather than a universal drought-tolerance gain.

text.zh: 预期核心判别是Fe²⁺可利用性与ROS缓冲是否同步：同步支持适应，失配则支持氧化损伤。
text.en: The key discriminator is whether Fe²⁺ availability and ROS buffering remain coordinated: coordination supports adaptation, whereas mismatch supports oxidative injury.

text.zh: 根区间铁形态、活性氧和细胞活力的空间差异可能大于全根平均变化。
text.en: Spatial differences in iron speciation, reactive oxygen species, and cell viability among root zones may exceed whole-root average changes.

text.zh: 相对未处理对照，根系生长和整株水分表现可改善、无变化或下降；不应预设单一方向。
text.en: Relative to untreated controls, root growth and whole-plant water performance may improve, remain unchanged, or decline; a single direction should not be presumed.

text.zh: 叶/叶肉背景外的FRO6可转移性有限，且剂量、基因型和根中功能未明确，故置信度低。
text.en: FRO6 transferability outside leaf/mesophyll contexts is limited, and dose, genotype, and root function are unresolved; confidence is therefore low.

mechanisms.zh: FRO6上调可能改变局部铁(III)向铁(II)的还原通量，进而影响可利用铁池和铁稳态反馈。
mechanisms.en: FRO6 upregulation may alter local ferric-to-ferrous reduction flux, thereby affecting labile iron pools and iron-homeostasis feedback.

mechanisms.zh: Fe²⁺既可支持含铁蛋白、呼吸和抗氧化代谢，也可在过氧化物存在时放大ROS相关损伤。
mechanisms.en: Fe²⁺ can support iron proteins, respiration, and antioxidant metabolism, but can also amplify ROS-related damage in the presence of peroxides.

mechanisms.zh: 中度干旱降低水分通量并重塑根区代谢，可能限制铁运输并放大根内氧化还原异质性。
mechanisms.en: Moderate drought reduces water flux and remodels root-zone metabolism, potentially limiting iron transport and amplifying intraroot redox heterogeneity.

assumptions.zh: 上调在根中实际发生并产生具有活性的FRO6蛋白；其表达不伴随未说明的强烈转化或生长代价。
assumptions.en: Upregulation occurs in roots and produces active FRO6 protein, without unreported severe transformation or growth costs.

assumptions.zh: 处理中度干旱保持非致死性，营养充足且存在可还原的铁底物。
assumptions.en: Moderate drought remains nonlethal, nutrition is adequate, and reducible iron substrate is present.

assumptions.zh: 预测相对于每个时间点同龄、未处理的水稻植株；不等同于实验结果。
assumptions.en: Predictions are relative to age-matched untreated rice plants at each timepoint and do not represent experimental results.

assumptions.zh: FRO6主要知识来自叶或叶肉相关背景，向水稻根的功能外推有限。
assumptions.en: FRO6 knowledge is primarily associated with leaf or mesophyll contexts, so functional extrapolation to rice roots is limited.

readouts.zh: 在6、12、24、48和72 h测定根中FRO6转录本/蛋白、铁(III)还原活性及Fe²⁺/Fe³⁺形态。
readouts.en: At 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h, measure root FRO6 transcript/protein, ferric-reduction activity, and Fe²⁺/Fe³⁺ speciation.

readouts.zh: 按根尖、伸长区和成熟区测定ROS、脂质过氧化、谷胱甘肽氧化还原状态、细胞活力和根呼吸。
readouts.en: Across root tip, elongation, and mature zones, measure ROS, lipid peroxidation, glutathione redox status, cell viability, and root respiration.

readouts.zh: 测定总铁、螯合/储存相关转录响应、木质部汁液铁，以及根长、侧根、根生物量和植株水分状态。
readouts.en: Measure total iron, chelation/storage-related transcriptional responses, xylem-sap iron, and root length, lateral roots, root biomass, and plant water status.

design.zh: 采用同基因型空载体或未上调对照，并设置充分供水和中度干旱条件；确认根中特异的上调与蛋白定位。使用独立生物重复、根区分辨采样和铁供应梯度，以检验FRO6效应是否依赖干旱与铁有效性。
design.en: Use genotype-matched empty-vector or non-upregulated controls under both well-watered and moderate-drought conditions; verify root-specific upregulation and protein localization. Use independent biological replicates, root-zone-resolved sampling, and an iron-supply gradient to test whether FRO6 effects depend on drought and iron availability.

title.zh: 水稻幼苗持续中度干旱的系统响应轨迹
title.en: Systems-response trajectory of rice seedlings under sustained moderate progressive drought

summary.zh: 水势下降首先触发快速胁迫感知；尚无明显可见生长表型。
summary.en: Declining water status first triggers rapid stress sensing, with little visible growth phenotype yet.

text.zh: ABA、Ca²⁺和活性氧信号升高；气孔保卫细胞开始失水，部分光合细胞膨压轻度下降。
text.en: ABA, Ca²⁺, and ROS signaling rise; guard cells begin to lose water while some photosynthetic cells show a slight turgor decline.

text.zh: 叶片蒸腾降低的趋势出现，根系仍主要维持吸水；组织含水量总体接近基线。
text.en: A trend toward lower leaf transpiration emerges, while roots largely maintain uptake; bulk tissue water content remains near baseline.

text.zh: 株高、叶面积和生物量通常尚无可辨别变化。
text.en: Plant height, leaf area, and biomass are generally not yet detectably altered.

text.zh: 早期信号响应具有较强机制支持，但实际起始时间取决于基质失水速率和品种。
text.en: Early signaling is mechanistically well supported, but its onset depends on substrate drying rate and cultivar.

summary.zh: 胁迫信号向转录和水分守恒程序传递。
summary.en: Stress signaling propagates into transcriptional and water-conservation programs.

text.zh: 渗透调节、抗氧化和脱水响应基因倾向被诱导；细胞扩张所需膨压和壁松弛受限。
text.en: Osmotic-adjustment, antioxidant, and dehydration-response programs tend to be induced; turgor and wall loosening needed for cell expansion become constrained.

text.zh: 叶片气孔导度和蒸腾进一步下降，叶肉CO₂供应开始受限。
text.en: Leaf stomatal conductance and transpiration decline further, beginning to constrain mesophyll CO₂ supply.

text.zh: 地上部外观多仍接近基线，但叶片扩展速率可能开始放缓。
text.en: Shoot appearance usually remains near baseline, though leaf expansion may begin to slow.

text.zh: 方向预期较稳健；根域含水量和空气湿度会改变气孔响应幅度。
text.en: The expected direction is robust; root-zone water content and humidity modify the magnitude of stomatal responses.

summary.zh: 水分守恒与细胞保护开始以代价抑制生长。
summary.en: Water conservation and cellular protection begin to restrain growth at a cost.

text.zh: 可溶性糖、相容性溶质和抗氧化能力倾向积累，以维持渗透势和限制氧化损伤。
text.en: Soluble sugars, compatible solutes, and antioxidant capacity tend to accumulate to support osmotic balance and limit oxidative injury.

text.zh: 叶片水势和气孔开放度下降；根尖仍可相对优先获得同化物并维持生长。
text.en: Leaf water potential and stomatal opening decrease, while root tips may retain preferential assimilate supply and growth.

text.zh: 地上部叶片伸长趋缓，而根冠生物量分配可能开始向根侧偏移。
text.en: Shoot leaf elongation tends to slow, while biomass partitioning may begin to shift toward roots.

text.zh: 根系优先维持取决于幼苗龄期、容器限制和干旱梯度。
text.en: Preferential root maintenance depends on seedling age, container restriction, and the drought gradient.

summary.zh: 转录重编程和气孔限制共同降低碳获取。
summary.en: Transcriptional reprogramming and stomatal limitation jointly reduce carbon acquisition.

text.zh: 光合作用相关代谢受抑，ABA响应与蛋白质稳态维护增强；ROS若未充分清除可局部升高。
text.en: Photosynthesis-associated metabolism is restrained while ABA responses and proteostasis increase; ROS may rise locally if detoxification is insufficient.

text.zh: 叶片净光合速率、蒸腾和叶肉细胞扩张下降，叶片相对含水量开始可测地下滑。
text.en: Leaf net photosynthesis, transpiration, and mesophyll cell expansion decline, with a measurable early drop in relative water content.

text.zh: 新生叶面积和地上部相对生长速率下降，叶片可出现轻微失挺。
text.en: New leaf area and shoot relative growth rate decline, and leaves may show mild loss of turgor.

text.zh: 在持续中度胁迫下该转折合理，但灌溉介质的缓冲能力会影响其是否在24 h出现。
text.en: This transition is plausible under sustained moderate stress, but substrate buffering affects whether it appears by 24 h.

summary.zh: 资源由快速生长转向维持水分状态和细胞完整性。
summary.en: Resources shift from rapid growth toward maintenance of water status and cellular integrity.

text.zh: 渗透调节物、脱水保护蛋白和抗氧化酶系统进一步增强，细胞周期与伸长相关活动受抑。
text.en: Osmolytes, dehydration-protective proteins, and antioxidant systems strengthen, while cell-cycle and elongation activities are restrained.

text.zh: 叶片持续关闭部分气孔并降低水分损失；根系吸水能力受土壤水势限制，根系结构调节开始显现。
text.en: Leaves maintain partial stomatal closure to reduce water loss; root water uptake becomes limited by soil water potential, and root architectural adjustment begins.

text.zh: 叶片伸展与分蘖潜力下降，但根系相对保留或增加的投入可改善根冠比。
text.en: Leaf expansion and tillering potential decline, while relatively retained or increased root investment may improve the root-to-shoot ratio.

text.zh: 根冠比变化不能仅由短期胁迫推断，需同时测量根和地上部干重。
text.en: Root-to-shoot changes cannot be inferred from short-term stress alone and require paired root and shoot dry-mass measurements.

summary.zh: 代谢重分配进入稳定的适应性状态，但碳限制加深。
summary.en: Metabolic reallocation enters a sustained adaptive state, while carbon limitation deepens.

text.zh: 保护性代谢维持升高，糖信号反映碳供应受限；持续ROS负荷可能增加膜脂过氧化风险。
text.en: Protective metabolism remains elevated, and sugar signaling reflects constrained carbon supply; sustained ROS load may increase lipid-peroxidation risk.

text.zh: 叶片光合电子传递和碳同化受限，叶温可能因蒸腾冷却减弱而上升。
text.en: Leaf photosynthetic electron transport and carbon assimilation are constrained, and leaf temperature may rise as transpirational cooling weakens.

text.zh: 冠层扩张明显放缓，叶片卷曲或日间萎蔫的概率增加。
text.en: Canopy expansion slows noticeably, with an increased likelihood of leaf rolling or daytime wilting.

text.zh: 表型强度受光照、蒸汽压亏缺和根域水分空间异质性影响。
text.en: Phenotypic intensity is influenced by irradiance, vapor-pressure deficit, and spatial heterogeneity of root-zone moisture.

summary.zh: 持续干旱下，防御维持与生长抑制之间的权衡更为明确。
summary.en: Under continued drought, the trade-off between defensive maintenance and growth inhibition becomes clearer.

text.zh: 抗氧化、渗透保护和膜稳定化需求维持较高；部分细胞的能量状态可能下降。
text.en: Demand for antioxidant defense, osmoprotection, and membrane stabilization remains high; cellular energy status may decline in some cells.

text.zh: 叶片水分与气体交换持续受限；较深或较活跃根段可能相对维持吸水，浅层根受抑。
text.en: Leaf water status and gas exchange remain constrained; deeper or more active root segments may relatively maintain uptake while shallow roots are suppressed.

text.zh: 地上部生长持续下降，根系空间探索可能增强或维持，整体株型更紧凑。
text.en: Shoot growth remains reduced, while root spatial exploration may increase or persist, producing a more compact whole-plant form.

text.zh: 根系深度响应在盆栽幼苗中转移性有限，尤其受容器深度和土壤结构制约。
text.en: Root-depth responses have limited transferability in potted seedlings, especially under constraints of container depth and soil structure.

summary.zh: 中度胁迫的累积效应开始转化为稳定可观测的生长代价。
summary.en: Cumulative moderate-stress effects begin to become a stable, observable growth cost.

text.zh: 保护反应仍被维持，但若碳和能量不足，蛋白质周转与修复能力可能受限。
text.en: Protective responses remain active, but protein turnover and repair may become constrained if carbon and energy are insufficient.

text.zh: 叶片相对含水量、气孔导度和光合碳同化低于对照；叶片衰老相关信号可能轻度增强。
text.en: Leaf relative water content, stomatal conductance, and photosynthetic carbon assimilation are below control levels; senescence-associated signaling may rise modestly.

text.zh: 叶面积增长、株高增长和地上部鲜重累积均低于同龄未处理植株。
text.en: Leaf-area growth, height gain, and shoot fresh-mass accumulation are lower than in age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: 持续胁迫下的生长抑制预期较可靠，但鲜重对短期含水状态尤为敏感。
text.en: Growth inhibition under sustained stress is expected with reasonable confidence, but fresh mass is particularly sensitive to short-term water status.

summary.zh: 适应性反应仍可保护存活，但继续以生产力为代价。
summary.en: Adaptive responses may still protect survival, but continue to impose a productivity cost.

text.zh: 渗透调节与清除ROS继续支撑细胞存活；长期资源消耗可使部分代谢过程下调。
text.en: Osmotic adjustment and ROS detoxification continue to support cell survival; prolonged resource demand can downregulate parts of primary metabolism.

text.zh: 叶片膨压恢复受限，叶片伸长区活性降低；维管束水流受较低土壤—叶片水势梯度约束。
text.en: Leaf turgor recovery is constrained and activity in leaf elongation zones declines; vascular water flow is limited by a lower soil-to-leaf water-potential gradient.

text.zh: 新叶展开延迟，叶片卷曲和较小叶面积更易观察到。
text.en: New-leaf emergence is delayed, and leaf rolling with smaller leaf area becomes easier to observe.

text.zh: 是否出现清晰卷叶取决于品种的保水策略及实际叶水势。
text.en: Whether clear leaf rolling appears depends on cultivar water-conservation strategy and actual leaf water potential.

summary.zh: 持续胁迫推动幼苗进入低生长、重维持的状态。
summary.en: Continued stress drives seedlings into a low-growth, maintenance-focused state.

text.zh: 细胞保护网络维持活跃，但持续的氧化与能量压力可能使部分膜和光合组分受损。
text.en: Cell-protection networks remain active, but persistent oxidative and energy stress may damage some membranes and photosynthetic components.

text.zh: 叶片光系统效率和气体交换预计持续偏低，老叶比新叶更可能出现早期功能衰退。
text.en: Leaf photosystem efficiency and gas exchange are expected to remain low, with older leaves more likely than new leaves to show early functional decline.

text.zh: 整株生物量积累明显受限，分蘖启动或伸长进一步受抑。
text.en: Whole-plant biomass accumulation is clearly constrained, and tiller initiation or elongation is further suppressed.

text.zh: 光系统受损并非必然；中度胁迫下可能主要是可逆的气孔和代谢限制。
text.en: Photosystem damage is not inevitable; under moderate stress, limitations may remain predominantly reversible and stomatal/metabolic.

summary.zh: 若水分亏缺维持，保护能力与累积损伤之间的平衡趋于脆弱。
summary.en: If water deficit persists, the balance between protection and cumulative damage becomes increasingly fragile.

text.zh: 耐受细胞可维持渗透和氧化还原稳态，而脆弱细胞可能出现更高ROS、膜完整性下降和衰老信号。
text.en: Tolerant cells may maintain osmotic and redox homeostasis, whereas vulnerable cells can show higher ROS, reduced membrane integrity, and stronger senescence signaling.

text.zh: 叶片功能持续下降；根系是否仍能维持供水取决于可利用水分，局部根段可能受损。
text.en: Leaf function continues to decline; whether roots sustain water supply depends on available water, and localized root sectors may become impaired.

text.zh: 叶片萎蔫或卷曲更持久，幼苗总体生长停滞趋势加强。
text.en: Leaf wilting or rolling becomes more persistent, and whole-seedling growth shows a stronger tendency toward arrest.

text.zh: 此阶段高度依赖实际水分阈值；“中度”胁迫若未加重，损伤可仍主要可逆。
text.en: This stage depends strongly on the actual water-deficit threshold; if stress remains moderate, damage may still be largely reversible.

summary.zh: 72小时持续中度干旱预计形成可逆适应与累积生长抑制并存的终点状态。
summary.en: By 72 h, sustained moderate drought is expected to yield a state combining reversible adaptation with accumulated growth inhibition.

text.zh: 渗透保护和抗氧化系统仍高于基线，但碳限制、氧化压力和部分衰老信号共同限制完全恢复能力。
text.en: Osmoprotection and antioxidant systems remain above baseline, but carbon limitation, oxidative pressure, and some senescence signaling constrain full recovery capacity.

text.zh: 叶片含水状态、气孔导度和光合能力持续降低；根系吸水与叶片失水之间维持新的低通量平衡。
text.en: Leaf water status, stomatal conductance, and photosynthetic capacity remain reduced; root uptake and leaf water loss settle into a new low-flux balance.

text.zh: 地上部生物量、叶面积和分蘖受到抑制，而较高根冠比或根系保留可代表适应性资源重分配。
text.en: Shoot biomass, leaf area, and tillering are suppressed, while a higher root-to-shoot ratio or retained root system may reflect adaptive resource reallocation.

text.zh: 该终点假设干旱持续且未达到致死强度；品种和根域条件仍是主要不确定来源。
text.en: This endpoint assumes drought persists without becoming lethal; cultivar and root-zone conditions remain the main uncertainties.

mechanisms.zh: 根域水势下降经ABA、Ca²⁺和ROS网络促进气孔关闭，并优先降低蒸腾失水。
mechanisms.en: Lower root-zone water potential engages ABA, Ca²⁺, and ROS networks that promote stomatal closure and reduce transpirational water loss.

mechanisms.zh: 较低膨压直接限制叶片细胞扩张；气孔限制及非气孔代谢限制共同减少碳同化。
mechanisms.en: Reduced turgor directly limits leaf cell expansion, while stomatal and non-stomatal metabolic constraints jointly reduce carbon assimilation.

mechanisms.zh: 糖、相容性溶质、抗氧化和蛋白质稳态途径支持短期耐受，但会消耗原本用于生长的碳和能量。
mechanisms.en: Sugars, compatible solutes, antioxidant pathways, and proteostasis support short-term tolerance but consume carbon and energy otherwise available for growth.

mechanisms.zh: 资源分配可能相对偏向根系维持与取水，但该响应受根域几何和水分分布强烈调节。
mechanisms.en: Resource allocation may relatively favor root maintenance and water foraging, but this response is strongly shaped by root-zone geometry and water distribution.

assumptions.zh: 处理确为逐步加重后维持的中度干旱，而非快速脱水、渍害或盐胁迫。
assumptions.en: The treatment is genuinely progressive and sustained moderate drought, rather than rapid dehydration, waterlogging, or salinity stress.

assumptions.zh: 幼苗处于营养生长阶段，未受严重根系容器限制，且养分、温度和光周期保持适宜。
assumptions.en: Seedlings are vegetative, not severely root-bound, and maintained under adequate nutrition, temperature, and photoperiod.

assumptions.zh: 方向均相对于相同日龄、同环境的未处理水稻植株，不表示绝对表达量或固定效应大小。
assumptions.en: Directions are relative to untreated rice plants of the same age and environment; they do not imply absolute expression levels or fixed effect sizes.

assumptions.zh: 未提供品种、土壤质地、含水量阈值和蒸汽压亏缺，因此后期根系和损伤预测的置信度较低。
assumptions.en: Cultivar, soil texture, moisture thresholds, and vapor-pressure deficit are unspecified, reducing confidence in late root and damage predictions.

readouts.zh: 在0、6、12、24、48和72 h测定基质含水量、叶水势或相对含水量、气孔导度、蒸腾和叶温。
readouts.en: At 0, 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h, measure substrate water content, leaf water potential or relative water content, stomatal conductance, transpiration, and leaf temperature.

readouts.zh: 在12、24、48和72 h测定净光合速率、叶绿素荧光、可溶性糖、渗透调节物、ROS/脂质过氧化指标及抗氧化酶活性。
readouts.en: At 12, 24, 48, and 72 h, measure net photosynthesis, chlorophyll fluorescence, soluble sugars, osmolytes, ROS/lipid-peroxidation markers, and antioxidant-enzyme activity.

readouts.zh: 在24、48和72 h量化叶面积、叶片伸长、卷叶评分、株高、地上部与根系鲜/干重及根系形态。
readouts.en: At 24, 48, and 72 h, quantify leaf area, leaf elongation, leaf-rolling score, height, shoot and root fresh/dry mass, and root architecture.

readouts.zh: 在6、12、24和48 h开展靶向转录或蛋白检测，覆盖ABA响应、渗透保护、抗氧化、光合作用和衰老标记。
readouts.en: At 6, 12, 24, and 48 h, perform targeted transcript or protein assays spanning ABA response, osmoprotection, antioxidant defense, photosynthesis, and senescence markers.

design.zh: 设置同龄、同基质和同营养的充分灌溉对照，并以基质水分或土壤水势闭环维持中度胁迫；记录光照、温湿度和蒸汽压亏缺。采用足够的生物重复，分别收集根和叶，并在72 h后设置复水恢复组以区分可逆适应与损伤。
design.en: Include age-matched, identically grown well-watered controls, and maintain moderate stress by feedback control of substrate moisture or soil water potential; log light, temperature, humidity, and vapor-pressure deficit. Use adequate biological replication, harvest roots and leaves separately, and include a rewatering-recovery group after 72 h to distinguish reversible adaptation from damage.

title.zh: 水稻幼苗中度干旱后复水的恢复轨迹假说
title.en: Hypothesized recovery trajectory after rewatering moderately droughted rice seedlings

summary.zh: 复水首先缓解水势限制，但恢复初期仍可能出现信号与氧化还原波动。
summary.en: Rewatering first relieves water-potential limitation, while early signaling and redox fluctuations may persist.

text.zh: 细胞吸水和膨压回升；ABA/钙信号开始重置，短暂ROS波动可能保留。
text.en: Water uptake and turgor rise; ABA/Ca2+ signaling begins resetting, with possible transient ROS fluctuation.

text.zh: 根系导水和叶片含水状态开始恢复，但不同根段和叶位恢复不均。
text.en: Root hydraulic flow and leaf water status begin recovering, but recovery is uneven among root zones and leaves.

text.zh: 叶片萎蔫减轻，气孔重新开放的趋势开始出现。
text.en: Leaf wilting eases, and a trend toward stomatal reopening begins.

text.zh: 复水早期响应具有普遍性，但受失水时长及栽培品种影响。
text.en: Early rewatering responses are broadly supported but depend on drought duration and cultivar.

summary.zh: 水分恢复与胁迫信号撤除并行，代谢由防御维持转向恢复。
summary.en: Water restoration and stress-signal withdrawal proceed together as metabolism shifts from defense maintenance toward recovery.

text.zh: 脱水诱导的ABA响应、渗透保护物合成和部分抗氧化应答开始下降。
text.en: Dehydration-induced ABA responses, osmoprotectant synthesis, and part of the antioxidant response begin declining.

text.zh: 叶肉与维管组织水分补给增强，叶片水力连续性进一步改善。
text.en: Water supply to mesophyll and vascular tissues strengthens, further improving leaf hydraulic continuity.

text.zh: 叶片展开度和蒸腾恢复，光合气体交换开始回升。
text.en: Leaf expansion and transpiration recover, and photosynthetic gas exchange starts to rise.

text.zh: 气孔恢复可受根源ABA残留和空气湿度限制。
text.en: Stomatal recovery may be constrained by residual root-derived ABA and air humidity.

summary.zh: 转录和蛋白调控逐步反映复水状态，碳同化恢复快于生长重建。
summary.en: Transcriptional and protein-level regulation progressively reflects rewatering, while carbon assimilation recovers faster than growth rebuilding.

text.zh: 叶绿体电子传递和ATP供应改善；蛋白修复与膜脂重塑增强。
text.en: Chloroplast electron transport and ATP supply improve; protein repair and membrane-lipid remodeling increase.

text.zh: 叶片光合组织功能恢复更明显，根尖吸水区逐渐恢复活性。
text.en: Photosynthetic leaf tissue recovers more clearly, and root-tip water-absorbing zones gradually regain activity.

text.zh: 净同化能力上升，但累计生物量尚未显著追赶对照。
text.en: Net assimilation capacity rises, though accumulated biomass has not yet caught up with the untreated control.

text.zh: 受旱期间是否发生叶绿体损伤决定恢复速度。
text.en: Recovery rate depends on whether drought caused chloroplast damage.

summary.zh: 多数可逆水分胁迫表型应明显缓解，但根冠信号仍可能重设资源分配。
summary.en: Most reversible water-stress phenotypes should be clearly alleviated, though root–shoot signaling may still reset resource allocation.

text.zh: 膨压相关生长过程恢复，同时残余胁迫转录本和蛋白周转仍在进行。
text.en: Turgor-dependent growth processes resume while turnover of residual stress transcripts and proteins continues.

text.zh: 叶片导度与光合组织协调性提高；侧根和根毛恢复存在滞后。
text.en: Leaf conductance and coordination of photosynthetic tissues improve; lateral-root and root-hair recovery may lag.

text.zh: 叶片颜色、挺度和日间碳获取接近恢复，但生长速率仍偏低。
text.en: Leaf color, firmness, and daytime carbon gain approach recovery, but growth rate remains depressed.

text.zh: 根系结构性损伤会使地上部表型恢复与根功能脱耦。
text.en: Structural root damage can decouple shoot phenotypic recovery from root function.

summary.zh: 恢复进入再生长准备阶段，碳分配开始由维持修复转向器官扩展。
summary.en: Recovery enters a regrowth-preparation phase, with carbon allocation shifting from maintenance repair toward organ expansion.

text.zh: 糖信号、细胞壁松弛和细胞周期相关活动增强，但不会同步发生于所有组织。
text.en: Sugar signaling, cell-wall loosening, and cell-cycle-related activity increase, but not synchronously in all tissues.

text.zh: 叶片扩展组织活性增强；部分根组织仍优先用于修复而非新生长。
text.en: Leaf expansion tissues become more active, whereas some root tissues still prioritize repair over new growth.

text.zh: 相对生长速率开始改善，新的叶片扩展可能比老叶功能恢复更敏感。
text.en: Relative growth rate begins improving, and expansion of new leaves may respond more strongly than recovery of older leaves.

text.zh: 再生长取决于复水后可利用碳、氮及根系完整性。
text.en: Regrowth depends on available post-rewatering carbon and nitrogen and on root integrity.

summary.zh: 水分稳态趋于稳定，光合恢复可支持有限的补偿性生长。
summary.en: Water homeostasis trends toward stability, and restored photosynthesis can support limited compensatory growth.

text.zh: 能量状态和核糖体/蛋白合成活动改善，修复性自噬需求下降。
text.en: Energy status and ribosome/protein synthesis improve, while demand for repair-associated autophagy declines.

text.zh: 根叶间水分与同化物运输更协调，维管装载和卸载逐渐正常化。
text.en: Water and assimilate transport between roots and leaves becomes more coordinated, with vascular loading and unloading progressively normalizing.

text.zh: 日间光合和叶面积增长继续恢复，植株外观接近未处理状态。
text.en: Daytime photosynthesis and leaf-area gain continue recovering, and plant appearance approaches the untreated state.

text.zh: 外观恢复不代表先前失去的生物量已经补偿。
text.en: Visual recovery does not mean previously lost biomass has been compensated.

summary.zh: 胁迫记忆相关调控可能仍存留，并与恢复性生长共同塑造后续状态。
summary.en: Stress-memory-associated regulation may remain and, together with restorative growth, shape the subsequent state.

text.zh: 多数急性胁迫信号减弱，但部分表观调控、代谢物库和防御准备可持续。
text.en: Most acute stress signals weaken, but some epigenetic regulation, metabolite pools, and defense priming may persist.

text.zh: 功能叶和活跃根区接近稳态；受旱较重组织的恢复仍较慢。
text.en: Functional leaves and active root zones approach steady state, while more heavily droughted tissues recover more slowly.

text.zh: 新生组织贡献增加，整株生长轨迹逐步回归正常。
text.en: Newly growing tissues contribute more, and whole-plant growth trajectory progressively returns toward normal.

text.zh: 胁迫记忆的强度及其对生长的影响高度依赖基因型和干旱史。
text.en: The strength and growth consequence of stress memory strongly depend on genotype and drought history.

summary.zh: 复水后两昼夜，主要生理通量可接近对照，但结构性恢复仍有时间差。
summary.en: By two days after rewatering, major physiological fluxes may approach control levels, though structural recovery still has a time lag.

text.zh: 细胞水分、能量和氧化还原状态大体稳定，持续进行常规更新与残余修复。
text.en: Cellular water, energy, and redox states are broadly stable, with routine renewal and residual repair continuing.

text.zh: 叶片气孔—叶肉耦合接近正常，根系吸水能力继续恢复。
text.en: Leaf stomatal–mesophyll coupling approaches normal, and root water-uptake capacity continues recovering.

text.zh: 气体交换和叶片扩展可接近对照，株高或干物质差距仍可能存在。
text.en: Gas exchange and leaf expansion may approach control values, whereas height or dry-matter deficits may remain.

text.zh: 中度干旱通常可逆，但实际恢复取决于根系是否发生不可逆损伤。
text.en: Moderate drought is often reversible, but actual recovery depends on whether roots incurred irreversible injury.

summary.zh: 植株由功能恢复转向补偿程度有限的生长恢复，早期失去的发育时间未必追回。
summary.en: The plant shifts from functional recovery toward potentially limited compensatory growth; lost developmental time may not be regained.

text.zh: 分生组织中的合成代谢和细胞扩展活动增强，以支持新叶与根系生长。
text.en: Anabolic metabolism and cell expansion in meristems increase to support new leaf and root growth.

text.zh: 新叶、根尖和侧根发生区的生长贡献上升，老叶以维持功能为主。
text.en: Growth contributions from new leaves, root tips, and lateral-root initiation zones rise, while older leaves mainly maintain function.

text.zh: 相对生长速率可进一步提高，但累积生物量通常仍低于同期对照。
text.en: Relative growth rate may rise further, but cumulative biomass usually remains below the age-matched control.

text.zh: 补偿生长受光周期、养分供应和根冠碳分配共同控制。
text.en: Compensatory growth is jointly controlled by photoperiod, nutrient supply, and root–shoot carbon allocation.

summary.zh: 若根系未受显著伤害，水分利用与碳同化可维持接近正常的稳态。
summary.en: If roots were not substantially injured, water use and carbon assimilation can maintain a near-normal steady state.

text.zh: 渗透调节和急性抗氧化程序回到较低基础水平，基础代谢占主导。
text.en: Osmotic adjustment and acute antioxidant programs return to lower basal levels, and core metabolism predominates.

text.zh: 叶片水力与光合组织功能大致稳定；根系重建仍可能持续。
text.en: Leaf hydraulic and photosynthetic functions are broadly stable, though root-system rebuilding may continue.

text.zh: 整体活力保持恢复，新的器官生长决定后续是否缩小生物量差距。
text.en: Overall vigor remains restored, while growth of new organs determines whether the biomass gap narrows.

text.zh: 稳定的地上部表现不能排除地下根系恢复尚不完全。
text.en: Stable shoot performance does not exclude incomplete belowground root recovery.

summary.zh: 恢复轨迹开始分化：健康根系可支持持续再生长，受损根系则会限制后续表现。
summary.en: Recovery trajectories begin diverging: healthy roots support sustained regrowth, whereas damaged roots constrain subsequent performance.

text.zh: 多数细胞维持常态代谢；残余受损区仍可能保持修复和防御相关活动。
text.en: Most cells maintain normal metabolism, whereas residual damaged zones may retain repair- and defense-related activity.

text.zh: 健康叶—根单元趋稳，受损根段或老叶可能形成恢复瓶颈。
text.en: Healthy leaf–root units stabilize, while injured root segments or older leaves may become recovery bottlenecks.

text.zh: 整株表现趋于稳定恢复，但生物量补偿速度可能放缓。
text.en: Whole-plant performance trends toward stable recovery, but the rate of biomass compensation may slow.

text.zh: 缺少干旱持续时间和根系损伤信息，限制后期预测。
text.en: Missing information on drought duration and root injury limits later-stage prediction.

summary.zh: 三天内可实现功能性恢复，但是否完全回到未受旱发育轨迹仍不确定。
summary.en: Functional recovery can occur within three days, but full return to the non-drought developmental trajectory remains uncertain.

text.zh: 细胞层面以稳态代谢为主，局部胁迫记忆或修复标记可能持续存在。
text.en: Steady-state metabolism predominates at the cellular level, although local stress-memory or repair marks may persist.

text.zh: 多数叶片和活性根区功能接近稳态，组织结构差异可能保留。
text.en: Most leaves and active root zones function near steady state, though structural differences may remain.

text.zh: 叶片生理可接近对照，但株高、叶面积和干物质的累积缺口未必消失。
text.en: Leaf physiology may approach the control, but cumulative deficits in height, leaf area, and dry matter may persist.

text.zh: 功能恢复的判断较可靠；完全生长补偿的判断需要更长观察期。
text.en: Functional recovery is more plausible; judging complete growth compensation requires longer observation.

mechanisms.zh: 复水提高根—叶水势与细胞膨压，解除部分气孔关闭和光合限制。
mechanisms.en: Rewatering raises root-to-leaf water potential and cellular turgor, relieving part of the stomatal and photosynthetic limitation.

mechanisms.zh: ABA、Ca2+、ROS及水通道蛋白相关调控不会同步撤除，可造成早期短暂波动。
mechanisms.en: ABA, Ca2+, ROS, and aquaporin-associated regulation do not reset synchronously, potentially causing early transient fluctuations.

mechanisms.zh: 恢复优先支持膜、蛋白和光合系统修复，随后才更充分地支持分生组织生长。
mechanisms.en: Recovery first supports repair of membranes, proteins, and photosynthetic systems before more fully supporting meristematic growth.

mechanisms.zh: 根系受损程度及根冠间碳、水分和激素信号决定能否发生补偿性生长。
mechanisms.en: The extent of root injury and root–shoot carbon, water, and hormonal signaling determine whether compensatory growth occurs.

assumptions.zh: 复水均匀且充足，盆土或培养基排水良好，不造成持续缺氧。
assumptions.en: Rewatering is uniform and sufficient, with well-drained soil or medium that does not cause sustained hypoxia.

assumptions.zh: 中度干旱未造成广泛不可逆细胞死亡、严重根腐或长期叶片坏死。
assumptions.en: Moderate drought did not cause widespread irreversible cell death, severe root decay, or persistent leaf necrosis.

assumptions.zh: 幼苗处于营养生长阶段，光照、温度和养分维持基线条件。
assumptions.en: Seedlings are in vegetative growth, with light, temperature, and nutrient supply maintained at baseline conditions.

assumptions.zh: 栽培品种、实际失水持续时间和根系损伤程度未说明，因此后期补偿生长预测应谨慎。
assumptions.en: Cultivar, actual drought duration, and degree of root injury are unspecified; predictions of later compensatory growth should therefore be cautious.

readouts.zh: 叶片相对含水量、叶水势、膨压或热成像，以解析水分恢复。
readouts.en: Leaf relative water content, leaf water potential, turgor, or thermal imaging to resolve water-status recovery.

readouts.zh: 气孔导度、蒸腾、净光合速率及叶绿素荧光，以评估气孔与光合恢复。
readouts.en: Stomatal conductance, transpiration, net photosynthesis, and chlorophyll fluorescence to assess stomatal and photosynthetic recovery.

readouts.zh: 根系导水能力、根系活力、根长和侧根/根毛表型，以评估地下恢复。
readouts.en: Root hydraulic capacity, root viability, root length, and lateral-root/root-hair phenotypes to assess belowground recovery.

readouts.zh: ABA、可溶性糖、脯氨酸、ROS/抗氧化指标及关键胁迫与生长转录本。
readouts.en: ABA, soluble sugars, proline, ROS/antioxidant markers, and key stress- and growth-related transcripts.

readouts.zh: 叶面积、株高、鲜重和干重，并区分既有叶片与复水后新生组织。
readouts.en: Leaf area, height, fresh mass, and dry mass, distinguishing pre-existing leaves from tissues produced after rewatering.

design.zh: 设置同龄持续灌水对照、持续干旱对照和复水组；在复水前及6、12、24、48、72小时取样，并延长观察以判断生物量补偿。至少记录基质含水量和环境条件，并按根与叶、老叶与新叶分层分析。
design.en: Include age-matched continuously watered controls, continued-drought controls, and a rewatered group; sample before rewatering and at 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h, then extend observation to assess biomass compensation. Record substrate water content and environmental conditions, and stratify analyses by roots versus leaves and older versus new leaves.

title.zh: 水稻幼苗对非冻害冷胁迫的72小时条件轨迹
title.en: Conditional 72-hour trajectory of rice seedlings under non-freezing cold stress

summary.zh: 早期冷感知主要发生在细胞层面，尚无明显可见性状改变。
summary.en: Early cold sensing is primarily cellular, with little visible phenotypic change yet.

text.zh: 膜流动性下降；Ca²⁺、活性氧和脂质信号出现短暂波动，并启动冷响应信号转导。
text.en: Membrane fluidity declines; Ca²⁺, reactive oxygen species, and lipid signals show transient changes, initiating cold-response signaling.

text.zh: 叶和根组织整体结构基本稳定，但气孔与维管周围细胞可能开始调整水分和离子状态。
text.en: Overall leaf and root structure remains stable, although stomatal and vascular-associated cells may begin adjusting water and ion status.

text.zh: 株高、叶面积和生物量通常尚无可分辨变化；生长速率可开始轻微受限。
text.en: Plant height, leaf area, and biomass are usually not yet detectably changed; growth rate may begin to slow slightly.

text.zh: 早期冷信号具有较强普适性，但响应幅度受温度和品种影响。
text.en: Early cold signaling is broadly supported, but its magnitude depends on temperature and cultivar.

summary.zh: 信号转导逐步连接至转录重编程和初始代谢保护。
summary.en: Signal transduction increasingly connects to transcriptional reprogramming and initial metabolic protection.

text.zh: 冷响应转录因子及保护相关基因可被诱导；抗氧化、渗透调节和膜脂重塑过程开始增强。
text.en: Cold-responsive transcription factors and protective genes may be induced; antioxidant, osmotic-adjustment, and membrane-lipid remodeling processes begin to increase.

text.zh: 叶片光合细胞的碳同化潜力开始下降，而根部吸水和养分吸收调节增强。
text.en: Carbon-assimilation capacity in leaf photosynthetic cells begins to decline, while regulation of root water and nutrient uptake increases.

text.zh: 叶片伸长和新根生长速率开始降低，但植株外观通常仍接近对照。
text.en: Leaf elongation and new-root growth rates begin to decrease, though plant appearance usually remains close to the control.

text.zh: 转录启动时间会随昼夜节律、温度强度及基因型而变动。
text.en: The timing of transcriptional initiation varies with circadian phase, temperature intensity, and genotype.

summary.zh: 保护性代谢与氧化还原稳态调节逐渐成为主要响应。
summary.en: Protective metabolism and redox-homeostasis regulation become increasingly prominent.

text.zh: 兼容溶质、抗氧化酶活性及分子伴侣相关保护能力预期上升，以限制冷诱导氧化损伤。
text.en: Compatible solutes, antioxidant-enzyme activity, and chaperone-associated protection are expected to increase, limiting cold-induced oxidative damage.

text.zh: 叶肉细胞可能出现轻度光化学受限；根尖分裂区的细胞周期推进开始放缓。
text.en: Mesophyll cells may show mild photochemical limitation, while cell-cycle progression in the root apical meristem begins to slow.

text.zh: 相对生长速率下降更明确，但在中等冷胁迫下通常尚未出现严重萎蔫。
text.en: Reduced relative growth rate becomes clearer, but severe wilting is usually absent under moderate cold stress.

text.zh: 保护反应与伤害程度的平衡取决于实际温度及处理前驯化状态。
text.en: The balance between protection and injury depends on actual temperature and pre-treatment acclimation state.

summary.zh: 昼夜循环后的持续冷暴露使资源分配由生长转向维持与防御。
summary.en: After one diurnal cycle of cold exposure, resource allocation shifts from growth toward maintenance and defense.

text.zh: 蛋白质折叠、膜稳定和糖代谢重编程持续增强；若清除能力不足，部分细胞的活性氧负荷仍可升高。
text.en: Protein folding, membrane stabilization, and sugar-metabolism reprogramming continue to increase; reactive-oxygen burden may still rise in some cells if scavenging is insufficient.

text.zh: 叶片净光合效率和根系代谢活性预计下降，组织间同化物输送趋于保守。
text.en: Leaf net photosynthetic efficiency and root metabolic activity are expected to decline, while assimilate transport becomes more conservative.

text.zh: 叶片展开、茎叶伸长和根系延伸受到可见但通常仍可逆的抑制。
text.en: Leaf expansion, shoot elongation, and root extension show visible but usually still reversible inhibition.

text.zh: 在稳定光照下，冷胁迫对光合和生长的抑制预计较一致。
text.en: Under stable light conditions, cold-induced inhibition of photosynthesis and growth is expected to be relatively consistent.

summary.zh: 若胁迫持续，适应性保护与累积代谢限制并存。
summary.en: With continuing stress, adaptive protection coexists with accumulating metabolic limitation.

text.zh: 膜脂不饱和化和渗透保护可继续加强，但ATP供应与蛋白质周转成本上升。
text.en: Membrane-lipid unsaturation and osmoprotection may continue to increase, but ATP supply and protein-turnover costs rise.

text.zh: 叶片可维持基本完整性，却表现出较低的电子传递容量；根尖活动区缩小。
text.en: Leaves may retain basic integrity while showing reduced electron-transport capacity; the active root-tip zone contracts.

text.zh: 幼苗生长停滞趋势加强，根冠比可能因根生长更敏感而发生改变。
text.en: Seedling growth arrest strengthens, and the root-to-shoot ratio may shift because root growth can be more sensitive.

text.zh: 根和地上部的相对敏感性具有显著品种与培养条件依赖性。
text.en: Relative sensitivity of roots and shoots is strongly cultivar- and growth-condition-dependent.

summary.zh: 冷适应程序若有效，可稳定细胞状态，但整体生长代价持续累积。
summary.en: If cold-acclimation programs are effective, cellular state can stabilize, but whole-plant growth costs continue to accumulate.

text.zh: 冷响应基因表达和代谢保护进入相对稳定的平台，同时维持较低的细胞代谢通量。
text.en: Cold-responsive gene expression and metabolic protection approach a relative plateau while cellular metabolic flux is maintained at a lower level.

text.zh: 叶肉同化和分生组织细胞增殖持续受抑，组织扩张速率降低。
text.en: Mesophyll assimilation and meristematic cell proliferation remain suppressed, reducing tissue expansion rates.

text.zh: 株高和叶面积相对同龄对照的差距开始累积，叶色可轻度变深或失绿。
text.en: Differences in plant height and leaf area versus age-matched controls begin to accumulate; leaves may become slightly darker or chlorotic.

text.zh: 表型是否显现取决于冷温度是否接近水稻的耐受下限。
text.en: Whether visible phenotypes emerge depends on whether the temperature approaches rice's tolerance limit.

summary.zh: 持续冷胁迫下，光合限制与碳利用重分配更加突出。
summary.en: Under sustained cold stress, photosynthetic limitation and carbon-use reallocation become more pronounced.

text.zh: 叶绿体能量转换受限，而可溶性糖积累和抗氧化缓冲可能维持或上升。
text.en: Chloroplast energy conversion is constrained, while soluble-sugar accumulation and antioxidant buffering may be maintained or increase.

text.zh: 叶片碳固定下降，根系呼吸与吸收活动受限，源—库关系偏向维持而非新生长。
text.en: Leaf carbon fixation declines, root respiration and uptake are constrained, and source-sink balance favors maintenance over new growth.

text.zh: 叶片伸展和根长增量进一步减少；中等胁迫下通常仅有轻度卷叶或生长矮化。
text.en: Leaf expansion and root-length increment decline further; moderate stress usually causes only mild leaf rolling or dwarfing.

text.zh: 稳定光照降低了光环境波动，但不能确定是否出现可见卷叶。
text.en: Stable light reduces light-environment variation but cannot determine whether visible leaf rolling occurs.

summary.zh: 两天冷暴露后，耐受性与伤害风险的差异将随基因型逐渐放大。
summary.en: After two days of cold exposure, differences between tolerance and injury risk increasingly diverge by genotype.

text.zh: 耐受幼苗可维持膜完整性和氧化还原平衡；敏感幼苗则可能累积脂质过氧化与蛋白质损伤。
text.en: Tolerant seedlings may maintain membrane integrity and redox balance; sensitive seedlings may accumulate lipid peroxidation and protein damage.

text.zh: 多数组织仍可存活，但敏感叶尖或根尖可出现局部功能下降。
text.en: Most tissues remain viable, but sensitive leaf tips or root tips may show localized functional decline.

text.zh: 相对于未处理同龄植株，生物量积累和器官扩张预计明显偏低。
text.en: Relative to untreated age-matched plants, biomass accumulation and organ expansion are expected to be clearly lower.

text.zh: 48小时后的损伤程度尤其依赖品种耐冷性，当前未给出基因型。
text.en: The extent of injury after 48 h depends especially on cultivar cold tolerance, which is unspecified here.

summary.zh: 持续暴露可能使保护稳态逐步转向代谢耗竭和生长惩罚。
summary.en: Continued exposure may gradually shift protective homeostasis toward metabolic depletion and growth penalty.

text.zh: 防御代谢仍被维持，但若碳供应不足，修复与蛋白质合成能力可能下降。
text.en: Defense metabolism remains engaged, but repair and protein-synthesis capacity may decline if carbon supply is insufficient.

text.zh: 叶片光系统修复和根部吸收功能可能减弱，尤其在快速生长的幼嫩区域。
text.en: Leaf photosystem repair and root uptake function may weaken, especially in rapidly growing young regions.

text.zh: 新叶生长迟缓、根系扩展受限，幼苗整体活力低于对照。
text.en: New-leaf growth is delayed, root spread is constrained, and overall seedling vigor is lower than in controls.

text.zh: 是否进入不可逆损伤阶段取决于实际冷温、夜间时长和基因型。
text.en: Whether plants enter an irreversible injury phase depends on actual temperature, night length, and genotype.

summary.zh: 长期低温下，维持呼吸和组织修复与有限碳收入之间的矛盾增强。
summary.en: During prolonged low temperature, the conflict between maintenance respiration and repair versus limited carbon income intensifies.

text.zh: 细胞代谢通量和分裂能力进一步降低；敏感细胞的膜泄漏和氧化损伤风险增加。
text.en: Cellular metabolic flux and division capacity decrease further; membrane leakage and oxidative-injury risk increase in sensitive cells.

text.zh: 分生组织活性受限，叶片功能性面积增长放缓，根系更新能力降低。
text.en: Meristem activity is constrained, functional leaf-area growth slows, and root renewal capacity decreases.

text.zh: 矮化和发育延迟更加清楚；若温度较低，叶尖失绿或轻度坏死风险上升。
text.en: Dwarfing and developmental delay become clearer; if temperature is sufficiently low, risk of leaf-tip chlorosis or mild necrosis increases.

text.zh: 坏死并非中等非冻害冷胁迫的必然结果，因此仅作为条件性风险。
text.en: Necrosis is not inevitable under moderate non-freezing cold stress and is therefore treated only as a conditional risk.

summary.zh: 适应能力接近其持续维持边界，组织间敏感性差异更易观察。
summary.en: Acclimation capacity approaches its sustained-maintenance boundary, making differences in tissue sensitivity easier to observe.

text.zh: 仍具耐受力的细胞维持抗氧化和膜保护；较敏感细胞可出现持续氧化压力与离子稳态失衡。
text.en: Cells retaining tolerance maintain antioxidant and membrane protection; more sensitive cells may show persistent oxidative pressure and ion-homeostasis imbalance.

text.zh: 成熟叶可相对稳定，而幼叶、叶尖和根尖等生长旺盛区域更可能受限。
text.en: Mature leaves may remain relatively stable, whereas young leaves, leaf tips, and root tips are more likely to be constrained.

text.zh: 幼苗与对照之间的大小和生长速率差异持续扩大，恢复潜力仍取决于后续复温。
text.en: Differences in size and growth rate from controls continue to widen, while recovery potential depends on subsequent rewarming.

text.zh: 器官内空间差异为合理预测，但缺乏具体温度和品种信息。
text.en: Within-organ spatial differences are plausible, but exact temperature and cultivar information are lacking.

summary.zh: 三天持续冷胁迫预计形成以低生长、受限光合和条件性组织损伤为特征的稳态。
summary.en: Three days of continuous cold stress are expected to establish a state characterized by low growth, constrained photosynthesis, and conditional tissue injury.

text.zh: 冷保护网络可维持部分细胞存活，但敏感背景下的能量缺口、膜损伤和氧化压力可能累积。
text.en: Cold-protection networks may sustain survival of some cells, but energy deficits, membrane injury, and oxidative pressure can accumulate in sensitive backgrounds.

text.zh: 叶片和根系整体功能低于对照；是否出现局部损伤取决于耐冷性与实际胁迫温度。
text.en: Overall leaf and root function is lower than in controls; localized injury depends on cold tolerance and actual stress temperature.

text.zh: 株高、叶面积、根长和生物量累积预计均低于同龄未处理植株，发育进程延后。
text.en: Plant height, leaf area, root length, and biomass accumulation are expected to be lower than in untreated age-matched plants, with delayed development.

text.zh: 72小时的总体生长抑制具有较强机制支持，但损伤程度仍无法在未指定温度和基因型时确定。
text.en: Overall growth inhibition at 72 h has strong mechanistic support, but injury severity cannot be fixed without temperature and genotype.

mechanisms.zh: 低温降低膜流动性并触发Ca²⁺、脂质和活性氧信号，继而启动冷响应转录调控。
mechanisms.en: Cold reduces membrane fluidity and triggers Ca²⁺, lipid, and reactive-oxygen signaling, followed by cold-responsive transcriptional regulation.

mechanisms.zh: 渗透调节物、抗氧化系统、分子伴侣及膜脂重塑可提高细胞保护，但消耗碳和能量资源。
mechanisms.en: Osmoprotectants, antioxidant systems, chaperones, and membrane-lipid remodeling can improve cellular protection but consume carbon and energy.

mechanisms.zh: 低温直接限制酶促反应、光合碳同化、细胞分裂和细胞伸长，使组织扩张与全株生长逐步下降。
mechanisms.en: Cold directly constrains enzymatic reactions, photosynthetic carbon assimilation, cell division, and cell expansion, progressively reducing tissue expansion and whole-plant growth.

mechanisms.zh: 持续胁迫下，耐受基因型更可能保持氧化还原和膜稳态；敏感基因型则更易积累损伤。
mechanisms.en: During sustained stress, tolerant genotypes are more likely to preserve redox and membrane homeostasis, whereas sensitive genotypes more readily accumulate injury.

assumptions.zh: 处理为恒定、非冻害且中等强度的低温；未给出具体温度，因此不将坏死视为必然结果。
assumptions.en: Stress is constant, non-freezing, and moderate; because the exact temperature is unspecified, necrosis is not treated as inevitable.

assumptions.zh: 对象为营养生长期、健康且正常供水供肥的水稻幼苗，并与每个时间点同龄未处理植株比较。
assumptions.en: Plants are healthy, adequately watered and nourished vegetative rice seedlings, compared with untreated age-matched plants at each timepoint.

assumptions.zh: 稳定光照仅减少光环境波动，不排除低温对光合、昼夜节律和夜间代谢的影响。
assumptions.en: Stable light reduces variation in light environment but does not remove cold effects on photosynthesis, circadian regulation, or nighttime metabolism.

assumptions.zh: 未指定品种、幼苗叶龄、根区温度和空气湿度，故长期损伤和根—茎相对敏感性的置信度降低。
assumptions.en: Cultivar, seedling leaf age, root-zone temperature, and air humidity are unspecified; confidence is therefore reduced for long-term injury and relative root-shoot sensitivity.

readouts.zh: 在6、12、24、48和72小时测定叶温、相对含水量、电解质渗漏、活性氧/抗氧化状态及可溶性糖。
readouts.en: At 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h, measure leaf temperature, relative water content, electrolyte leakage, reactive-oxygen/antioxidant status, and soluble sugars.

readouts.zh: 在12、24和48小时检测冷响应转录标志、膜脂不饱和度及蛋白质损伤或修复指标。
readouts.en: At 12, 24, and 48 h, assay cold-response transcriptional markers, membrane-lipid unsaturation, and protein-damage or repair indicators.

readouts.zh: 在24、48和72小时测量叶绿素荧光、气体交换、叶绿素含量、根系呼吸或吸收活性。
readouts.en: At 24, 48, and 72 h, measure chlorophyll fluorescence, gas exchange, chlorophyll content, and root respiration or uptake activity.

readouts.zh: 每日记录株高、叶面积、根长、根冠比、鲜重/干重，以及叶尖失绿、卷叶和坏死评分。
readouts.en: Record plant height, leaf area, root length, root-to-shoot ratio, fresh/dry mass, and scores for leaf-tip chlorosis, rolling, and necrosis daily.

design.zh: 设置同龄常温对照，并采用至少两个耐冷性不同的水稻基因型；记录实际叶温与根区温度。在72小时后加入复温恢复组，以区分可逆生长抑制与持续性损伤。
design.en: Include an age-matched warm control and at least two rice genotypes differing in cold tolerance; record actual leaf and root-zone temperatures. Add a rewarming-recovery group after 72 h to distinguish reversible growth inhibition from persistent injury.

title.zh: 中度干旱下水稻幼苗 FRO6 上调的条件性轨迹
title.en: Conditional trajectory of FRO6 upregulation in rice seedlings under moderate drought

summary.zh: 首先预期出现铁还原相关活性与干旱信号的快速耦合，但尚未形成可见表型。
summary.en: A rapid coupling of iron-reduction-related activity and drought signaling is expected before visible phenotypes emerge.

text.zh: FRO6 相关的细胞表面或胞内 Fe(III) 还原能力可能升高，扩大可利用 Fe(II) 池。
text.en: FRO6-associated surface or intracellular Fe(III) reduction may rise, expanding the available Fe(II) pool.

text.zh: 幼苗组织的铁分布与含水状态预计尚无明显重塑。
text.en: Seedling iron distribution and tissue water status are not expected to be substantially remodeled yet.

text.zh: 整体萎蔫、生长和叶片状态预计接近同龄未处理植株。
text.en: Whole-seedling wilting, growth, and leaf status should remain close to age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: FRO6 的功能证据主要可迁移自叶片/叶肉语境；幼苗整体响应的可转移性有限。
text.en: Functional evidence for FRO6 is chiefly transferable from leaf/mesophyll contexts; transferability to the whole seedling is limited.

summary.zh: 铁稳态、氧化还原缓冲与脱水响应转录可能开始共同调整。
summary.en: Iron-homeostasis, redox-buffering, and dehydration-response transcription may begin to adjust together.

text.zh: 可利用 Fe(II) 增加可支持铁蛋白装配，但也可能提高局部氧化还原活性和 ROS 压力。
text.en: More available Fe(II) may support metalloprotein assembly but can also raise local redox activity and ROS pressure.

text.zh: 叶片或叶肉若为主要作用位点，铁还原微区可能增强；全幼苗平均变化仍小。
text.en: If leaves or mesophyll are the principal site, iron-reduction microdomains may intensify; whole-seedling average change should remain small.

text.zh: 尚不预期出现可靠的存活或生物量差异。
text.en: No reliable difference in survival or biomass is expected yet.

text.zh: 缺少具体表达部位、上调幅度和水稻基因型信息，且非叶肉组织外推受限。
text.en: Expression domain, upregulation magnitude, and rice genotype are unspecified, and extrapolation beyond mesophyll is limited.

summary.zh: 细胞可能开始在铁利用收益与铁驱动氧化损伤风险之间进行调节。
summary.en: Cells may begin balancing gains in iron utilization against risks of iron-driven oxidative damage.

text.zh: 铁结合、抗氧化和隔离机制可能被诱导；若缓冲不足，脂质氧化信号也可能上升。
text.en: Iron-binding, antioxidant, and sequestration processes may be induced; if buffering is inadequate, lipid-oxidation signaling may also rise.

text.zh: 叶肉中光合电子传递的铁供应可能改善，但干旱下 ROS 累积可抵消该收益。
text.en: Iron supply to photosynthetic electron transport in mesophyll may improve, but drought-associated ROS accumulation could offset this benefit.

text.zh: 整体外观通常仍稳定，潜在光合差异可能早于肉眼可见变化。
text.en: Overall appearance should usually remain stable; potential photosynthetic differences may precede visible changes.

text.zh: 该双向预测取决于 FRO6 所在亚细胞位置及铁隔离能力，幼苗器官层面证据不足。
text.en: This bidirectional prediction depends on FRO6 subcellular location and iron-sequestration capacity; organ-level seedling evidence is limited.

summary.zh: 在持续中度干旱下，铁稳态重设可能开始影响叶片代谢表现。
summary.en: Under sustained moderate drought, iron-homeostasis resetting may begin to affect leaf metabolic performance.

text.zh: 若 Fe(II) 被有效螯合并递送，铁依赖酶活性可受益；游离铁过多则促氧化损伤。
text.en: If Fe(II) is effectively chelated and delivered, iron-dependent enzymes may benefit; excess free iron would promote oxidative damage.

text.zh: 叶绿素维持和光化学效率可能略受支持，但局部失绿或氧化损伤风险同步增加。
text.en: Chlorophyll maintenance and photochemical efficiency may receive modest support, while risks of local chlorosis or oxidative injury rise concurrently.

text.zh: 相对未处理植株，保水和叶片功能可能改善，但不适配时可表现为更早的胁迫症状。
text.en: Relative to untreated plants, water retention and leaf function may improve, but poor accommodation could instead yield earlier stress symptoms.

text.zh: 效应方向高度依赖铁供应、干旱强度及上调是否发生在叶片/叶肉。
text.en: Effect direction strongly depends on iron supply, drought severity, and whether upregulation occurs in leaves/mesophyll.

summary.zh: 代谢重分配可能将早期铁还原变化连接到光合与抗氧化容量。
summary.en: Metabolic reallocation may connect early iron-reduction changes to photosynthetic and antioxidant capacity.

text.zh: 抗氧化酶系统和铁储存可能增强；若还原铁持续累积，膜脂过氧化可能加重。
text.en: Antioxidant systems and iron storage may increase; if reduced iron continues to accumulate, membrane lipid peroxidation may worsen.

text.zh: 叶肉组织可能形成较强的铁缓冲梯度，组织间铁再分配尚不确定。
text.en: Mesophyll may develop stronger iron-buffering gradients, while intertissue iron redistribution remains uncertain.

text.zh: 蒸腾受限背景下，净光合和叶温可能出现小幅、方向依赖的偏移。
text.en: Against reduced transpiration, net photosynthesis and leaf temperature may show small, direction-dependent shifts.

text.zh: FRO6 在水稻幼苗中的组织表达与对铁转运网络的实际贡献未被本情景限定。
text.en: This scenario does not define FRO6 tissue expression in rice seedlings or its actual contribution to the iron-transport network.

summary.zh: 适应性铁利用若占主导，叶片功能可被维持；氧化负荷若占主导，则损伤开始累积。
summary.en: If adaptive iron utilization dominates, leaf function may be maintained; if oxidative load dominates, injury may begin accumulating.

text.zh: 铁依赖电子传递与 ROS 清除可能协同增强，或因 Fenton 型反应而转为氧化失衡。
text.en: Iron-dependent electron transfer and ROS scavenging may increase together, or shift toward oxidative imbalance through Fenton-type chemistry.

text.zh: 叶片光系统稳定性可能改善；反之，叶尖或高光区域可能先出现氧化敏感性。
text.en: Leaf photosystem stability may improve; alternatively, leaf tips or high-light regions may first show oxidative sensitivity.

text.zh: 叶片相对含水量和膨压维持可能优于未处理植株，也可能因损伤而下降。
text.en: Leaf relative water content and turgor maintenance may exceed untreated plants, or decline if injury predominates.

text.zh: 叶片/叶肉以外的 FRO6 功能转移性有限，因此维持高不确定性。
text.en: FRO6 functional transferability outside leaf/mesophyll contexts is limited; uncertainty therefore remains high.

summary.zh: 组织层面的干旱适应或损伤分化应变得更可检测。
summary.en: Tissue-level drought adaptation or injury divergence should become more detectable.

text.zh: 铁螯合、液泡隔离与抗氧化响应可能限制游离铁；不足时 ROS 标志物上升。
text.en: Iron chelation, vacuolar sequestration, and antioxidant responses may limit free iron; with insufficient control, ROS markers rise.

text.zh: 叶片可出现较高光化学效率与较低氧化负荷，或出现相反的斑驳损伤格局。
text.en: Leaves may show higher photochemical efficiency with lower oxidative burden, or the opposite pattern of patchy injury.

text.zh: 苗高增长通常尚不显著改变，但叶片伸展和萎蔫恢复能力可能开始分离。
text.en: Seedling height growth may still be little changed, but leaf expansion and wilting-recovery capacity may begin to diverge.

text.zh: 缺少转基因构建、表达量与组织特异性信息，不能判断适应与损伤哪一分支占优。
text.en: Without transgene design, expression level, and tissue specificity, the dominant adaptive versus injury branch cannot be determined.

summary.zh: 两天持续处理后，FRO6 上调的净效应可能体现在叶片铁状态与光合耐旱性的耦合上。
summary.en: After two days of treatment, the net effect of FRO6 upregulation may appear in coupling between leaf iron status and photosynthetic drought tolerance.

text.zh: 受控的还原铁通量可能维持铁蛋白与抗氧化代谢；失控通量则提高氧化损伤。
text.en: Controlled reduced-iron flux may sustain metalloproteins and antioxidant metabolism; uncontrolled flux raises oxidative injury.

text.zh: 叶肉中铁可用性和光合容量可能提高，但非叶片组织的响应不能可靠推断。
text.en: Mesophyll iron availability and photosynthetic capacity may improve, but responses in non-leaf tissues cannot be reliably inferred.

text.zh: 相对未处理植株，叶片失水和光抑制可能减轻，或在铁过载情形下加重。
text.en: Relative to untreated plants, leaf water loss and photoinhibition may lessen, or worsen under iron-overload conditions.

text.zh: 预测主要适用于叶片/叶肉；对根、茎及全株资源分配的外推有限。
text.en: Predictions apply mainly to leaves/mesophyll; extrapolation to roots, stems, and whole-plant resource allocation is limited.

summary.zh: 持续干旱可将早期分子差异放大为可测的叶片生理差异。
summary.en: Continued drought can amplify early molecular differences into measurable leaf physiological differences.

text.zh: 若铁缓冲成功，ROS 稳态趋于恢复；若失败，膜完整性和细胞活力下降。
text.en: If iron buffering succeeds, ROS homeostasis trends toward recovery; if it fails, membrane integrity and cell viability decline.

text.zh: 叶片可维持较高的叶绿素荧光参数，或出现电解质渗漏与失绿增加。
text.en: Leaves may maintain higher chlorophyll-fluorescence parameters, or show increased electrolyte leakage and chlorosis.

text.zh: 可见萎蔫程度、叶片卷曲和恢复速度可能开始出现处理间差异。
text.en: Visible wilting, leaf rolling, and recovery rate may begin to differ between treatments.

text.zh: 中度干旱的实际水势、盆栽限制和营养铁状态未说明，限制了预测可靠性。
text.en: Actual water potential, pot restriction, and nutritional iron status under moderate drought are unspecified, limiting reliability.

summary.zh: FRO6 上调的后果可能由叶片代谢状态进一步传递至幼苗生长权衡。
summary.en: Consequences of FRO6 upregulation may be transmitted from leaf metabolic state to seedling growth trade-offs.

text.zh: 维持铁酶功能可支持碳同化与修复；持续 ROS 则会消耗资源并抑制分裂扩张。
text.en: Maintaining iron-enzyme function may support carbon assimilation and repair; sustained ROS consumes resources and suppresses division and expansion.

text.zh: 叶片同化物输出可能得到维持，也可能因光合受损而减少。
text.en: Leaf assimilate export may be maintained, or reduced if photosynthesis is impaired.

text.zh: 叶面积增长与干物质积累相对未处理植株可略有改善或受抑。
text.en: Leaf-area growth and dry-mass accumulation may be modestly improved or suppressed relative to untreated plants.

text.zh: 生长结局受发育阶段、表达负担及根系供水影响，而这些条件均未给定。
text.en: Growth outcome is influenced by developmental stage, expression burden, and root water supply, none of which are specified.

summary.zh: 至此，适应性叶片铁管理与氧化损伤两种轨迹应呈现更清晰的累积差别。
summary.en: By this point, cumulative differences between adaptive leaf iron management and oxidative injury trajectories should become clearer.

text.zh: 铁稳态网络可能达到新的缓冲稳态，或维持游离铁和 ROS 的慢性升高。
text.en: The iron-homeostasis network may reach a new buffered steady state, or sustain chronically elevated free iron and ROS.

text.zh: 叶片铁空间分布可能更均衡，或表现为局部富集并伴随损伤。
text.en: Leaf iron spatial distribution may become more even, or show local enrichment accompanied by injury.

text.zh: 耐旱表现可体现为较慢萎蔫和较好复水潜力；不利分支则表现为早衰倾向。
text.en: Drought performance may appear as slower wilting and better rewatering potential; the adverse branch may show a tendency toward premature senescence.

text.zh: 该长期方向不能仅由 FRO6 上调推定，尤其在非叶肉组织中可转移性有限。
text.en: This later direction cannot be inferred from FRO6 upregulation alone, especially given limited transferability in non-mesophyll tissues.

summary.zh: 三天时，最合理的假设是 FRO6 上调产生条件依赖的叶片耐旱收益或铁相关氧化代价。
summary.en: At three days, the most plausible hypothesis is that FRO6 upregulation yields a context-dependent leaf drought benefit or iron-related oxidative cost.

text.zh: 有益分支表现为受控 Fe(II) 利用和 ROS 缓冲；不利分支表现为铁介导的氧化胁迫。
text.en: The beneficial branch features controlled Fe(II) use and ROS buffering; the adverse branch features iron-mediated oxidative stress.

text.zh: 叶肉功能可能维持较好，或出现光合下降、失绿和膜损伤；非叶片结论仍不稳健。
text.en: Mesophyll function may be better maintained, or show reduced photosynthesis, chlorosis, and membrane injury; non-leaf conclusions remain uncertain.

text.zh: 全幼苗净结果可能是适度耐旱增强或生长受罚，未预设单一方向。
text.en: The whole-seedling net outcome may be modestly enhanced drought tolerance or a growth penalty; no single direction is prespecified.

text.zh: 因剂量、基因型、发育细节及器官特异性未明确，本轨迹为待检验假设而非实验结论。
text.en: Because dose, genotype, developmental detail, and organ specificity are undefined, this trajectory is a testable hypothesis rather than an experimental conclusion.

mechanisms.zh: FRO6 上调可能增强叶片/叶肉中的 Fe(III) 还原，从而改变 Fe(II) 可用性及铁依赖代谢。
mechanisms.en: FRO6 upregulation may enhance Fe(III) reduction in leaves/mesophyll, altering Fe(II) availability and iron-dependent metabolism.

mechanisms.zh: 在干旱下，改善铁供应可能支持光合电子传递和抗氧化酶；但过量还原铁也可能通过促氧化反应增加 ROS。
mechanisms.en: Under drought, improved iron supply may support photosynthetic electron transport and antioxidant enzymes, whereas excess reduced iron may increase ROS through pro-oxidant reactions.

mechanisms.zh: 铁螯合、储存、液泡隔离及叶片内再分配决定适应性收益是否超过氧化代价。
mechanisms.en: Iron chelation, storage, vacuolar sequestration, and intraleaf redistribution determine whether adaptive benefits exceed oxidative costs.

assumptions.zh: FRO6 上调具有生物学效力，且不会造成未定义的大范围转化或表达负担。
assumptions.en: FRO6 upregulation is biologically effective and does not impose an undefined broad transformation or expression burden.

assumptions.zh: 中度干旱足以引发持续脱水与氧化还原调节，但尚未导致普遍不可逆死亡。
assumptions.en: Moderate drought is sufficient to trigger sustained dehydration and redox regulation without causing widespread irreversible death.

assumptions.zh: 该预测主要针对叶片，尤其叶肉细胞；对根、茎及非叶肉幼苗组织的功能转移性有限。
