assumptions.en: This forecast chiefly concerns leaves, especially mesophyll cells; functional transferability to roots, stems, and non-mesophyll seedling tissues is limited.

assumptions.zh: 植株营养充足但未规定铁供给、基因型、上调幅度和组织特异性，因此净效应不预设为正。
assumptions.en: Plants are adequately nourished, but iron supply, genotype, upregulation magnitude, and tissue specificity are unspecified; therefore no positive net effect is presumed.

readouts.zh: 在 6、12、24、48 和 72 h 测定 FRO6 转录/蛋白、Fe(III) 还原活性、Fe(II)/总铁及铁空间分布。
readouts.en: At 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h, measure FRO6 transcript/protein, Fe(III)-reduction activity, Fe(II)/total iron, and iron spatial distribution.

readouts.zh: 测定 ROS、脂质过氧化、抗氧化酶活性、铁螯合/储存相关转录，以及膜完整性指标。
readouts.en: Measure ROS, lipid peroxidation, antioxidant-enzyme activity, iron-chelation/storage-related transcripts, and membrane-integrity indicators.

readouts.zh: 测定叶片相对含水量、气体交换、叶绿素荧光、叶温、叶绿素/失绿、叶片卷曲及复水恢复。
readouts.en: Measure leaf relative water content, gas exchange, chlorophyll fluorescence, leaf temperature, chlorophyll/chlorosis, leaf rolling, and rewatering recovery.

readouts.zh: 在 48 和 72 h 评估叶面积、干物质、生长速率和根冠分配。
readouts.en: At 48 and 72 h, assess leaf area, dry mass, growth rate, and root-to-shoot allocation.

design.zh: 采用同龄未处理、仅干旱、仅 FRO6 上调及 FRO6 上调加干旱的析因设计；在叶片/叶肉与非叶片组织分别取样，并配合复水组。使用多个独立材料或表达梯度，记录土壤水势、组织铁状态和发育阶段，以区分适应性铁利用与铁相关氧化损伤。
design.en: Use an age-matched factorial design comprising untreated, drought-only, FRO6-upregulation-only, and FRO6-upregulation-plus-drought groups; sample leaves/mesophyll separately from non-leaf tissues and include rewatering groups. Use independent materials or expression gradients and document soil water potential, tissue iron status, and developmental stage to distinguish adaptive iron utilization from iron-related oxidative injury.

title.zh: 渐进中度干旱下玉米叶片的72小时条件轨迹
title.en: Conditional 72-hour trajectory of maize leaves under progressive moderate drought

summary.zh: 早期水分亏缺首先触发水势感知和保水反应，尚未预期出现明显结构性损伤。
summary.en: Early water deficit primarily triggers water-status sensing and water-conservation responses, without expected overt structural injury.

text.zh: 膨压和细胞扩张驱动力下降；Ca²⁺、ROS及ABA相关信号短暂增强。
text.en: Turgor and the driving force for cell expansion decline, while transient Ca²⁺, ROS, and ABA-linked signaling rise.

text.zh: 叶片气孔导度和蒸腾开始下降，以限制失水。
text.en: Leaf stomatal conductance and transpiration begin to decline, limiting water loss.

text.zh: 全株耗水速率下降；净碳同化通常仅轻度受限。
text.en: Whole-plant water use declines; net carbon assimilation is usually only mildly constrained.

text.zh: 取决于初始土壤含水量和叶龄；早期信号的机制支持较强。
text.en: This depends on starting soil water status and leaf age; support for early signaling is strong.

summary.zh: 保卫细胞调节加强，并开始向渗透调节和抗氧化转录重编程过渡。
summary.en: Guard-cell regulation strengthens, with a transition toward osmotic adjustment and antioxidant transcriptional reprogramming.

text.zh: 保卫细胞离子外流促进关闭；可溶性糖和兼容溶质调节趋于增强。
text.en: Ion efflux from guard cells promotes closure, while soluble-sugar and compatible-solute regulation increases.

text.zh: 气孔开度进一步降低，叶片蒸腾冷却减弱。
text.en: Stomatal aperture decreases further, reducing transpirational cooling of the leaf.

text.zh: 冠层蒸腾及气孔限制下的光合速率下降。
text.en: Canopy transpiration and photosynthesis under stomatal limitation decline.

text.zh: 气孔动力学受光照、VPD和基因型调节。
text.en: Stomatal dynamics are modulated by light, vapor-pressure deficit, and genotype.

summary.zh: 持续缺水使碳获取受限，叶细胞开始优先维持水分和氧化还原稳态。
summary.en: Sustained water deficit constrains carbon acquisition, and leaf cells prioritize water and redox homeostasis.

text.zh: ABA响应、抗氧化防御及渗透保护相关基因表达预计增强。
text.en: ABA-responsive, antioxidant-defense, and osmoprotective gene expression is expected to increase.

text.zh: 叶肉CO₂供应因气孔关闭而减少，叶温可能开始升高。
text.en: Mesophyll CO₂ supply decreases with stomatal closure, and leaf temperature may begin to rise.

text.zh: 地上部生长的日内增量受抑，水分利用策略转向保守。
text.en: Diurnal shoot-growth increment is restrained, and water-use strategy becomes more conservative.

text.zh: 叶温变化尤其依赖空气湿度、风速和辐射。
text.en: Leaf-temperature change particularly depends on humidity, wind, and radiation.

summary.zh: 在一个昼夜周期内，气孔限制与渗透调节共同形成可逆的中度胁迫表型。
summary.en: Across one diel cycle, stomatal limitation and osmotic adjustment jointly establish a reversible moderate-stress phenotype.

text.zh: 可溶性糖、脯氨酸等渗透调节代谢物积累倾向增强。
text.en: Accumulation of osmotic-adjustment metabolites, including soluble sugars and proline, tends to increase.

text.zh: 叶片相对含水量轻度下降，但通过气孔关闭和渗透调节部分维持。
text.en: Leaf relative water content falls modestly but is partly maintained through stomatal closure and osmotic adjustment.

text.zh: 净光合和叶面积扩张下降，尚不一定出现持久萎蔫。
text.en: Net photosynthesis and leaf-area expansion decline, without necessarily producing persistent wilting.

text.zh: 中度、渐进处理通常允许一定补偿，但实际程度取决于根区供水。
text.en: Moderate progressive stress usually permits compensation, but its extent depends on root-zone water supply.

summary.zh: 若干旱持续，碳同化限制开始从主要气孔限制向代谢限制部分扩展。
summary.en: If drought persists, limitation of carbon assimilation begins to extend from predominantly stomatal to partially metabolic limitation.

text.zh: 光合电子传递的保护性耗能增强；过量还原压力可提高ROS形成风险。
text.en: Protective energy dissipation in photosynthetic electron transport increases, while excess reducing pressure can raise ROS-formation risk.

text.zh: 叶肉同化能力下降，午间气孔关闭和叶温升高更明显。
text.en: Mesophyll assimilation capacity declines, with more evident midday stomatal closure and leaf warming.

text.zh: 整株碳收益和生物量积累速率进一步降低。
text.en: Whole-plant carbon gain and biomass-accumulation rate decline further.

text.zh: 代谢限制出现的时间受实际叶水势和光负荷影响。
text.en: The timing of metabolic limitation depends on actual leaf water potential and light load.

summary.zh: 保护性调节占主导；在维持中度胁迫条件下，叶片可能保持功能但以生长为代价。
summary.en: Protective regulation predominates; under maintained moderate stress, leaves may retain function at the expense of growth.

text.zh: 抗氧化酶活性、热激/保护蛋白及蛋白质稳态维护预计增强。
text.en: Antioxidant enzyme activity, heat-shock/protective proteins, and proteostasis maintenance are expected to increase.

text.zh: 叶片水力传导和细胞扩张受限，年轻叶的伸长更易受抑。
text.en: Leaf hydraulic conductance and cell expansion are constrained, with young-leaf elongation especially inhibited.

text.zh: 株高和叶片伸长速率下降，资源分配更偏向维持而非生长。
text.en: Plant-height and leaf-elongation rates decline, with allocation shifting toward maintenance rather than growth.

text.zh: 不同叶位和发育中的叶片对水力限制的敏感性不同。
text.en: Sensitivity to hydraulic limitation differs among leaf positions and developing leaves.

summary.zh: 重复的昼夜干旱循环可能稳定应激记忆样转录状态，并强化水分节约。
summary.en: Repeated diel drought exposure may stabilize a stress-memory-like transcriptional state and reinforce water saving.

text.zh: ABA信号、脱水保护和膜稳定化相关调控维持较高水平。
text.en: ABA signaling and regulation related to dehydration protection and membrane stabilization remain elevated.

text.zh: 气孔导度维持低位，叶片水势相对对照更低。
text.en: Stomatal conductance remains low, and leaf water potential is lower than in controls.

text.zh: 蒸腾和同化均受抑；相对水分保留优先于最大生产力。
text.en: Both transpiration and assimilation are suppressed; water retention takes priority over maximal productivity.

text.zh: 所谓记忆样状态是条件性预测，需用重复取样的转录动态验证。
text.en: The memory-like state is conditional and requires repeated transcriptomic sampling for validation.

summary.zh: 两天持续干旱后，适应性保护与累积性光合代价并存。
summary.en: After two days of sustained drought, adaptive protection coexists with accumulating photosynthetic costs.

text.zh: 渗透调节和抗氧化能力维持增强，但部分光合蛋白周转压力上升。
text.en: Osmotic adjustment and antioxidant capacity remain elevated, while turnover pressure on some photosynthetic proteins rises.

text.zh: 叶绿素荧光的调节性耗散增强；若水势继续下降，PSII效率可轻度受限。
text.en: Regulated energy dissipation in chlorophyll fluorescence increases; if water potential continues to fall, PSII efficiency may become mildly constrained.

text.zh: 日累计碳同化和叶片扩展持续低于对照。
text.en: Daily cumulative carbon assimilation and leaf expansion remain below control levels.

text.zh: 是否发生PSII功能受限取决于胁迫强度是否仍属中度及光环境。
text.en: Whether PSII function becomes constrained depends on whether stress remains moderate and on the light environment.

summary.zh: 叶片进入维持型稳态：水分保守较稳定，但增长和碳收益的代价持续累积。
summary.en: Leaves enter a maintenance-oriented steady state: water conservation is relatively stable, while costs to growth and carbon gain accumulate.

text.zh: 保护性代谢和应激转录维持高于对照的稳态，而非持续线性上升。
text.en: Protective metabolism and stress transcription remain at a steady state above controls rather than rising linearly.

text.zh: 叶片膨压和气孔导度持续偏低，叶面冷却能力较弱。
text.en: Leaf turgor and stomatal conductance remain low, with reduced capacity for transpirational cooling.

text.zh: 生长速率持续下降，整株水分消耗保持受限。
text.en: Growth rate remains depressed, and whole-plant water consumption stays constrained.

text.zh: 稳态或继续恶化取决于土壤水分下降速率和夜间恢复程度。
text.en: Stabilization versus further deterioration depends on the rate of soil-water decline and overnight recovery.

summary.zh: 若根区水分持续下降，叶片保护能力开始接近其补偿边界。
summary.en: If root-zone water continues to decline, leaf protective capacity begins to approach its compensatory boundary.

text.zh: ROS清除和膜保护仍被诱导，但能量与还原力供应受限的风险增加。
text.en: ROS scavenging and membrane protection remain induced, but risk of limited energy and reductant supply increases.

text.zh: 叶片相对含水量和水力连通性可能进一步下降，局部卷叶风险增加。
text.en: Leaf relative water content and hydraulic connectivity may decline further, increasing the risk of localized leaf rolling.

text.zh: 冠层光合生产力和新生叶生长进一步受抑。
text.en: Canopy photosynthetic productivity and emerging-leaf growth are further restrained.

text.zh: 叶卷曲的出现高度依赖品种、VPD和实际土壤水势。
text.en: Leaf rolling is strongly dependent on cultivar, vapor-pressure deficit, and actual soil water potential.

summary.zh: 在仍为中度的干旱设定下，预期以可逆生理抑制为主，而非广泛细胞死亡。
summary.en: Under a still-moderate drought setting, reversible physiological inhibition is expected to predominate rather than widespread cell death.

text.zh: 细胞维持渗透和氧化还原防御，但蛋白合成与细胞生长活动受抑。
text.en: Cells maintain osmotic and redox defenses, while protein synthesis and growth-related activity are restrained.

text.zh: 叶片气体交换维持低水平，光合限制更可能包含气孔与非气孔成分。
text.en: Leaf gas exchange remains low, and photosynthetic limitation is more likely to include both stomatal and non-stomatal components.

text.zh: 全株生物量积累相对对照持续落后，但存活功能应仍可维持。
text.en: Whole-plant biomass accumulation remains behind controls, while survival functions should still be maintained.

text.zh: 中度胁迫的界限未由土壤或叶水势直接界定，降低后期把握度。
text.en: The boundary of moderate stress is not defined by soil or leaf water potential, reducing late-stage confidence.

summary.zh: 三天后形成以保水、抗氧化和抑制生长为特征的适应性干旱状态；恢复潜力取决于复水时机。
summary.en: By three days, an adaptive drought state characterized by water conservation, antioxidation, and growth suppression is established; recovery potential depends on rewatering timing.

text.zh: 渗透保护、ABA相关调控和抗氧化防御维持在重设后的高水平。
text.en: Osmoprotection, ABA-linked regulation, and antioxidant defense remain at a reset elevated level.

text.zh: 叶片水势、气孔导度和CO₂交换仍低于对照；明显坏死不应是中度处理的主要预测。
text.en: Leaf water potential, stomatal conductance, and CO₂ exchange remain below controls; overt necrosis is not the primary expectation for moderate treatment.

text.zh: 整株生长和累积碳收益降低，水分利用更保守。
text.en: Whole-plant growth and cumulative carbon gain are reduced, with more conservative water use.

text.zh: 后期结果最受土壤含水轨迹、基因型耐旱性和叶片发育状态影响。
text.en: Late outcomes are most influenced by soil-water trajectory, genotype drought tolerance, and leaf developmental state.

mechanisms.zh: 根区与叶片水分亏缺可通过ABA、Ca²⁺和ROS信号促进保卫细胞离子转运与气孔关闭。
mechanisms.en: Root-zone and leaf water deficits can promote guard-cell ion transport and stomatal closure through ABA, Ca²⁺, and ROS signaling.

mechanisms.zh: 气孔关闭降低失水，但同时限制CO₂扩散，随后可引发光合代谢及能量分配调整。
mechanisms.en: Stomatal closure lowers water loss but also restricts CO₂ diffusion, subsequently shifting photosynthetic metabolism and energy allocation.

mechanisms.zh: 渗透调节、抗氧化防御和膜/蛋白保护有助于维持叶细胞功能，但需以生长和碳收益为代价。
mechanisms.en: Osmotic adjustment, antioxidant defense, and membrane/protein protection help maintain leaf-cell function, at the cost of growth and carbon gain.

assumptions.zh: 处理确为渐进、持续的中度干旱，未进入导致广泛不可逆伤害的重度脱水范围。
assumptions.en: The treatment is genuinely progressive and sustained moderate drought, not severe dehydration causing widespread irreversible injury.

assumptions.zh: 预测针对营养生长期、光合活跃的玉米叶片；叶位、叶龄和品种会改变幅度与时序。
assumptions.en: The forecast concerns photosynthetically active maize leaves at the vegetative stage; leaf position, age, and cultivar can alter magnitude and timing.

assumptions.zh: 光周期、养分和温度维持接近基线，且不存在病害、盐胁迫或热胁迫等并发胁迫。
assumptions.en: Photoperiod, nutrition, and temperature remain near baseline, with no concurrent pathogen, salinity, or heat stress.

assumptions.zh: 未指定基因或FRO6操控；本轨迹是器官尺度干旱生理假设，而非基因特异性预测。
assumptions.en: No gene or FRO6 perturbation is specified; this is an organ-scale drought-physiology hypothesis, not a gene-specific prediction.

readouts.zh: 土壤含水量、叶水势、相对含水量和膨压相关指标。
readouts.en: Soil water content, leaf water potential, relative water content, and turgor-related measures.

readouts.zh: 气孔导度、蒸腾、净光合、胞间CO₂浓度及叶温。
readouts.en: Stomatal conductance, transpiration, net photosynthesis, intercellular CO₂ concentration, and leaf temperature.

readouts.zh: 叶绿素荧光参数、ROS/脂质过氧化指标及抗氧化酶活性。
readouts.en: Chlorophyll-fluorescence parameters, ROS/lipid-peroxidation markers, and antioxidant-enzyme activity.

readouts.zh: ABA、可溶性糖、脯氨酸及渗透调节/抗氧化相关转录本。
readouts.en: ABA, soluble sugars, proline, and osmotic-adjustment/antioxidant-related transcripts.

readouts.zh: 叶片伸长、叶面积、生物量累积及可逆叶卷曲评分。
readouts.en: Leaf elongation, leaf area, biomass accumulation, and reversible leaf-rolling scores.

design.zh: 设置同龄、充分灌溉对照与渐进干旱处理，连续记录土壤水分和微气候；在6、12、24、36、48、60和72小时取样，并区分成熟叶与正在伸长的叶片。加入复水恢复组可检验预测的可逆性。
design.en: Use age-matched, well-watered controls and progressive-drought plants while continuously recording soil moisture and microclimate. Sample at 6, 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, and 72 h, distinguishing mature from elongating leaves. Include a rewatering-recovery group to test the predicted reversibility.

title.zh: 玉米叶片中度干旱后复水的72小时恢复轨迹假说
title.en: Hypothesized 72-hour recovery trajectory after rewatering moderately droughted maize leaves

summary.zh: 水分状态可快速回升，但干旱诱导的气孔限制和氧化还原遗留尚未解除。
summary.en: Leaf water status can rebound rapidly, but drought-induced stomatal limitation and redox legacy remain.

text.zh: 细胞膨压与液泡水合上升；ABA/ROS信号及渗透调节物仍偏高。
text.en: Cell turgor and vacuolar hydration rise, while ABA/ROS signaling and osmotic solutes remain elevated.

text.zh: 叶片水势和气孔导度仍低于同期未处理叶，维管补水正在恢复。
text.en: Leaf water potential and stomatal conductance remain below age-matched controls as vascular rehydration recovers.

text.zh: 蒸腾和净光合仍受限，叶片卷曲开始缓解但生长未恢复。
text.en: Transpiration and net photosynthesis remain constrained; leaf rolling begins to ease but growth has not recovered.

text.zh: 复水速率和根系损伤程度会强烈影响早期恢复。
text.en: Early recovery depends strongly on rewatering rate and the extent of root injury.

summary.zh: 水力恢复推动气孔逐步开放，但光合生化能力恢复滞后于水分恢复。
summary.en: Hydraulic recovery promotes progressive stomatal reopening, but photosynthetic biochemistry lags behind water recovery.

text.zh: 保卫细胞离子通量转向开孔状态；抗氧化与修复转录仍维持诱导。
text.en: Guard-cell ion fluxes shift toward opening, while antioxidant and repair transcription remains induced.

text.zh: 叶脉供水改善，叶肉细胞含水量接近正常；气孔响应仍不均一。
text.en: Vein water supply improves and mesophyll hydration approaches normal, but stomatal responses remain heterogeneous.

text.zh: 叶温下降、卷叶减轻；CO₂同化通常仍低于未处理叶。
text.en: Leaf temperature falls and rolling diminishes; CO₂ assimilation usually remains below untreated leaves.

text.zh: 夜间或白天复水将改变气孔与碳同化的相对时序。
text.en: Daytime versus nighttime rewatering can alter the relative timing of stomatal and carbon-assimilation recovery.

summary.zh: 气孔限制继续减弱，叶绿体电子传递和碳代谢进入修复与重协调阶段。
summary.en: Stomatal limitation continues to relax, and chloroplast electron transport and carbon metabolism enter repair and re-coordination.

text.zh: 叶绿体ROS负荷下降，光保护逐渐松弛；部分干旱应答蛋白仍持续存在。
text.en: Chloroplast ROS burden declines and photoprotection progressively relaxes; some drought-response proteins persist.

text.zh: 叶肉气体扩散和细胞间CO₂供应改善，但局部水力与代谢恢复不同步。
text.en: Mesophyll gas diffusion and intercellular CO₂ supply improve, but local hydraulic and metabolic recovery are asynchronous.

text.zh: 净光合明显回升但多仍未达对照；当日生物量积累缺口仍在。
text.en: Net photosynthesis rebounds substantially but commonly remains below controls; the day's biomass-accrual deficit persists.

text.zh: 干旱期间的光抑制强度决定光合恢复速度。
text.en: The severity of drought-period photoinhibition determines the speed of photosynthetic recovery.

summary.zh: 经过一个昼夜周期，水分稳态大体重建，恢复重点转向气孔—叶肉协调与受损组分更新。
summary.en: After one diel cycle, water balance is largely rebuilt, shifting recovery toward stomatal–mesophyll coordination and component renewal.

text.zh: 能量状态改善并支持蛋白质周转；部分膜脂和光系统修复仍在进行。
text.en: Improved energy status supports protein turnover, while repair of some membrane lipids and photosystems continues.

text.zh: 多数叶区膨压接近对照，但气孔斑块性和叶脉周围恢复差异可保留。
text.en: Turgor approaches control levels across most leaf regions, but stomatal patchiness and vein-associated recovery differences may persist.

text.zh: 蒸腾接近正常，而光合和叶片扩张可仍偏低，表现为水分恢复快于生长恢复。
text.en: Transpiration approaches normal, whereas photosynthesis and leaf expansion may remain low, indicating faster water than growth recovery.

text.zh: 叶龄及干旱发生时的叶片扩张状态会影响恢复幅度。
text.en: Leaf age and expansion status during drought affect the magnitude of recovery.

summary.zh: 碳同化逐渐重新耦合于水分供应，代谢资源开始在修复和重新生长之间分配。
summary.en: Carbon assimilation progressively recouples to water supply, and metabolic resources are allocated between repair and renewed growth.

text.zh: 糖信号和渗透调节物开始回调；细胞分裂与伸长相关程序逐步恢复。
text.en: Sugar signaling and osmotic solutes begin to reset, while cell-division and elongation programs progressively resume.

text.zh: 叶肉同化能力改善，但曾强烈失水区域可能仍存在较低导度或代谢限制。
text.en: Mesophyll assimilation capacity improves, but previously strongly dehydrated regions may retain lower conductance or metabolic limitation.

text.zh: 日尺度碳增益继续接近对照，但叶面积扩张仍落后于同期未处理植株。
text.en: Daily carbon gain continues to approach controls, but leaf-area expansion still lags age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: 恢复期的光照和蒸汽压亏缺会决定碳增益是否完全回补。
text.en: Light and vapor-pressure deficit during recovery determine whether carbon gain fully rebounds.

summary.zh: 第二个恢复日中，短期胁迫信号衰退，而结构性损伤或发育停滞的影响更显著。
summary.en: During the second recovery day, acute stress signals recede, while structural damage or developmental arrest becomes more apparent.

text.zh: 水分和基础氧化还原稳态接近对照，修复性蛋白周转仍略高。
text.en: Water status and basal redox homeostasis approach controls, while reparative protein turnover remains modestly elevated.

text.zh: 组织水力连续性基本恢复；气孔密度既定，已形成的组织尺度差异不会迅速逆转。
text.en: Tissue hydraulic continuity is largely restored; fixed stomatal density and established tissue-scale differences do not rapidly reverse.

text.zh: 瞬时光合可接近对照，但累计生长和叶片大小仍保留干旱历史缺口。
text.en: Instantaneous photosynthesis may approach controls, but cumulative growth and leaf size retain a drought-history deficit.

text.zh: 若干旱未造成不可逆叶损伤，此阶段恢复预期较稳定。
text.en: Recovery is expected to be relatively consistent if drought did not cause irreversible leaf injury.

summary.zh: 叶片功能趋于稳定，但复水后的资源再分配可能暂时限制完全的生长补偿。
summary.en: Leaf function trends toward stability, but post-rewatering resource reallocation may temporarily constrain full growth compensation.

text.zh: ABA相关状态逐步回落，光合电子传递和抗氧化网络接近稳态。
text.en: ABA-associated states progressively decline, and photosynthetic electron transport and antioxidant networks approach steady state.

text.zh: 叶片含水和多数气孔行为接近对照，局部恢复异质性减弱。
text.en: Leaf hydration and most stomatal behavior approach controls, with reduced local recovery heterogeneity.

text.zh: 气体交换可近正常，但叶片扩张可能出现有限补偿，且未必消除累计大小差异。
text.en: Gas exchange can be near normal, but leaf expansion may show limited compensation and may not erase cumulative size differences.

text.zh: 补偿生长受同化物供应及源库关系限制。
text.en: Compensatory growth is constrained by assimilate supply and source–sink relations.

summary.zh: 复水两天后，生理恢复与发育遗留可并存：功能接近正常，叶片尺度表型仍较保守。
summary.en: Two days after rewatering, physiological recovery and developmental legacy can coexist: function nears normal while leaf-scale traits remain conservative.

text.zh: 主要代谢池和离子平衡接近对照；先前积累的保护性代谢物可能尚未完全消退。
text.en: Major metabolic pools and ion balance approach controls; previously accumulated protective metabolites may not be fully cleared.

text.zh: 叶肉与表皮的功能协调增强，残余限制更可能来自已建立的组织结构差异。
text.en: Functional coordination between mesophyll and epidermis strengthens; residual limitation is more likely due to established tissue structural differences.

text.zh: 光合日积分可接近对照，但叶面积和累计干物质通常仍较低。
text.en: Daily integrated photosynthesis may approach controls, but leaf area and cumulative dry matter are usually still lower.

text.zh: 对照差异取决于干旱是否抑制了叶片不可逆的早期扩张。
text.en: Control differences depend on whether drought irreversibly curtailed early leaf expansion.

summary.zh: 恢复进入稳态化阶段，新增同化物更可能支持后续器官而非完全重建已损失的叶面积。
summary.en: Recovery enters a stabilization phase, with newly assimilated carbon more likely supporting subsequent organs than fully rebuilding lost leaf area.

text.zh: 细胞渗透与氧化还原状态大体稳定，胁迫记忆相关调控可能低水平保留。
text.en: Cell osmotic and redox states are broadly stable, while stress-memory-associated regulation may persist at low levels.

text.zh: 叶片水力和气体扩散能力总体接近对照。
text.en: Leaf hydraulic and gas-diffusion capacities are broadly near control levels.

text.zh: 现有叶片功能接近正常；植株可将恢复的碳供应转投新叶或根系，叶片自身补偿有限。
text.en: Existing leaf function is near normal; the plant may redirect recovered carbon to new leaves or roots, limiting compensation within the same leaf.

text.zh: 源库分配受植株大小和营养状态影响，未被情景完全限定。
text.en: Source–sink allocation depends on plant size and nutritional status, which are not fully specified.

summary.zh: 多数快速可逆的生理限制应已解除，残余差异主要反映干旱期间形成的发育和碳收支后果。
summary.en: Most rapidly reversible physiological limitations should be relieved; remaining differences chiefly reflect developmental and carbon-balance consequences formed during drought.

text.zh: 细胞水合、离子稳态和基础光合代谢接近未处理状态。
text.en: Cell hydration, ion homeostasis, and basal photosynthetic metabolism are near the untreated state.

text.zh: 叶片整体水力与气孔—叶肉耦合趋于稳定。
text.en: Whole-leaf hydraulics and stomatal–mesophyll coupling trend toward stability.

text.zh: 瞬时气体交换可无明显差异，但累计叶面积、碳增益或干物质仍可能偏低。
text.en: Instantaneous gas exchange may show little difference, but cumulative leaf area, carbon gain, or dry matter may remain lower.

text.zh: 该判断适用于中度、非致死性干旱及持续充足供水。
text.en: This expectation applies to moderate, nonlethal drought followed by sustained adequate watering.

summary.zh: 叶片进入恢复后的新稳态；是否发生补偿取决于剩余生长潜力而非水分即时供应。
summary.en: The leaf enters a post-recovery steady state; compensation depends on remaining growth potential rather than immediate water supply.

text.zh: 快速胁迫应答大多回归基线，保留的调控变化不一定导致功能缺陷。
text.en: Most acute stress responses return toward baseline; retained regulatory changes need not cause functional impairment.

text.zh: 组织功能接近对照，但已固定的叶片长度、宽度或气孔结构不易改变。
text.en: Tissue function is near control levels, but fixed leaf length, width, or stomatal structure is not readily altered.

text.zh: 后续扩张尚有潜力的叶片可部分追赶；接近终止扩张的叶片则保留尺寸缺口。
text.en: Leaves with remaining expansion potential may partly catch up, whereas near-mature leaves retain a size deficit.

text.zh: 叶片发育阶段是预测补偿与否的关键未定因素。
text.en: Leaf developmental stage is a key unresolved determinant of compensation.

summary.zh: 三天时预期形成“功能恢复快、结构与累计生长恢复慢”的状态，而非干旱轨迹的简单逆转。
summary.en: By three days, the expected state is rapid functional recovery but slower structural and cumulative-growth recovery, not a simple reversal of drought.

text.zh: 细胞水分、能量和氧化还原稳态总体接近对照；可能保留温和的胁迫记忆。
text.en: Cell water, energy, and redox homeostasis are broadly near control levels; a mild stress memory may remain.

text.zh: 叶片水力、气孔和叶肉功能大体恢复，但既有组织结构差异持续存在。
text.en: Leaf hydraulic, stomatal, and mesophyll functions are broadly restored, while pre-existing tissue structural differences persist.

text.zh: 叶片即时生理表现可接近对照，但累计叶面积和生物量通常尚未完全追平。
text.en: Immediate leaf physiology may approach controls, but cumulative leaf area and biomass usually have not fully caught up.

text.zh: 中度干旱的定义、基因型和叶龄未细化，限制了对最终补偿的确定性。
text.en: The unspecified definition of moderate drought, genotype, and leaf age limits certainty about final compensation.

mechanisms.zh: 复水首先恢复根—叶水力连续性和细胞膨压，随后才解除气孔及叶肉同化限制。
mechanisms.en: Rewatering first restores root-to-leaf hydraulic continuity and cell turgor, followed by relief of stomatal and mesophyll assimilation limits.

mechanisms.zh: 干旱遗留的ABA、ROS、渗透调节、光保护和蛋白质修复过程可使转录与代谢恢复滞后于水分恢复。
mechanisms.en: Drought legacies in ABA, ROS, osmotic adjustment, photoprotection, and protein repair can make transcriptional and metabolic recovery lag behind water recovery.

mechanisms.zh: 已被抑制的细胞伸长和叶片发育窗口未必可逆，因此叶面积与累计生物量恢复通常慢于气体交换。
mechanisms.en: Suppressed cell elongation and leaf developmental windows may not be reversible, so leaf area and cumulative biomass commonly recover more slowly than gas exchange.

assumptions.zh: 复水充分且持续，根区无积水、缺氧或盐分胁迫。
assumptions.en: Rewatering is complete and sustained, without root-zone waterlogging, hypoxia, or salinity stress.

assumptions.zh: 干旱为中度且未引起广泛坏死、永久性维管损伤或严重根系死亡。
assumptions.en: Drought is moderate and does not cause widespread necrosis, permanent vascular injury, or severe root death.

assumptions.zh: 植株处于营养生长阶段，但具体基因型、叶龄、干旱持续时间和复水时刻未限定。
assumptions.en: Plants are vegetative, but genotype, leaf age, drought duration, and timing of rewatering are unspecified.

assumptions.zh: 所有方向均相对同龄、同环境、持续正常供水的未处理植株。
assumptions.en: All directions are relative to age-matched, identically grown plants receiving continuous normal watering.

readouts.zh: 叶水势、相对含水量、膨压或叶片厚度变化。
readouts.en: Leaf water potential, relative water content, turgor, or changes in leaf thickness.

readouts.zh: 气孔导度、蒸腾、叶温及热成像。
readouts.en: Stomatal conductance, transpiration, leaf temperature, and thermal imaging.

readouts.zh: 净光合、叶肉导度、叶绿素荧光和光系统II效率。
readouts.en: Net photosynthesis, mesophyll conductance, chlorophyll fluorescence, and photosystem II efficiency.

readouts.zh: ABA、可溶性糖、脯氨酸、ROS/抗氧化状态及修复相关转录标记。
readouts.en: ABA, soluble sugars, proline, ROS/antioxidant status, and repair-associated transcriptional markers.

readouts.zh: 叶片长度、宽度、面积、干物质，以及后续新叶和根系生长。
readouts.en: Leaf length, width, area, dry matter, and growth of subsequent leaves and roots.

design.zh: 设置持续灌溉同龄对照、干旱未复水对照和复水组；在复水前及6、12、24、36、48、72小时重复测定，并记录叶龄、土壤含水量、光照和蒸汽压亏缺。将即时气体交换与累计叶面积/生物量并行分析，以区分功能恢复和发育补偿。
design.en: Include age-matched continuously watered controls, droughted non-rewatered controls, and rewatered plants. Measure before rewatering and at 6, 12, 24, 36, 48, and 72 h, while recording leaf age, soil water content, irradiance, and vapor-pressure deficit. Analyze instantaneous gas exchange alongside cumulative leaf area and biomass to distinguish functional recovery from developmental compensation.

title.zh: 玉米叶片对非冻害冷胁迫的72小时条件性轨迹
title.en: Conditional 72-hour trajectory of maize leaves under non-freezing cold stress

summary.zh: 快速冷感知优先发生，尚未预期出现明显叶片表型。
summary.en: Rapid cold perception is expected to precede visible leaf phenotypes.

text.zh: Ca²⁺、ROS和膜脂重塑信号增强；酶促代谢与光合电子利用开始受限。
text.en: Ca²⁺, ROS, and membrane-lipid remodeling signals rise; enzymatic metabolism and photosynthetic electron use begin to be constrained.

text.zh: 气孔导度和叶片蒸腾可能初步下降，以限制水分与能量失衡。
text.en: Stomatal conductance and leaf transpiration may begin to decline, limiting water and energy imbalance.

text.zh: 整株生长外观通常接近对照，仅有轻微生长减速的可能。
text.en: Whole-plant appearance should remain near the control, with only possible slight growth slowing.

text.zh: 早期信号的机制支持较强，但幅度取决于温度和基因型。
text.en: Mechanistic support for early signaling is strong, but magnitude depends on temperature and genotype.

summary.zh: 冷响应转录和抗氧化调节逐步接续早期信号。
summary.en: Cold-responsive transcription and antioxidant adjustment progressively follow early signaling.

text.zh: 冷响应基因表达、渗透保护物合成和抗氧化能力趋于增强，而蛋白合成与碳同化效率下降。
text.en: Cold-responsive gene expression, osmoprotectant synthesis, and antioxidant capacity tend to increase, while protein synthesis and carbon-assimilation efficiency decline.

text.zh: 叶片CO₂吸收和光化学效率可能开始降低，但组织完整性大多仍维持。
text.en: Leaf CO₂ uptake and photochemical efficiency may begin to decline, while tissue integrity is largely retained.

text.zh: 叶片扩展和整株相对生长速率可能轻度下降。
text.en: Leaf expansion and whole-plant relative growth rate may decline slightly.

text.zh: 响应时序合理，但转录启动速度受昼夜节律和处理温度影响。
text.en: The timing is plausible, but transcriptional onset is influenced by circadian state and treatment temperature.

summary.zh: 代谢重分配开始稳定，光合抑制与防御投入并存。
summary.en: Metabolic reallocation begins to stabilize, with photosynthetic inhibition coexisting with defensive investment.

text.zh: 可溶性糖和兼容溶质积累倾向增强；叶绿体电子传递受冷限制，ROS产生压力持续。
text.en: Soluble-sugar and compatible-solute accumulation tend to increase; chloroplast electron transport is cold-limited and ROS pressure persists.

text.zh: 净光合速率可能进一步下降，叶片水分状态通常仍可由气孔调节部分缓冲。
text.en: Net photosynthesis may decline further, while leaf water status can usually still be partly buffered through stomatal regulation.

text.zh: 新生叶和伸长区生长减慢比成熟叶外观变化更早显现。
text.en: Growth slowing is likely to emerge earlier in newly developing leaves and elongation zones than in mature-leaf appearance.

text.zh: 预测假定胁迫为中等且非冻害；更低温度可加速损伤。
text.en: This projection assumes moderate, non-freezing stress; lower temperatures could accelerate injury.

summary.zh: 一个昼夜周期后，冷适应与持续的碳限制形成可检测平衡。
summary.en: After one diel cycle, cold acclimation and sustained carbon limitation form a detectable balance.

text.zh: 膜稳定化、抗氧化和冷保护代谢增强；细胞分裂与细胞伸长相关过程受抑。
text.en: Membrane stabilization, antioxidant defense, and cryoprotective metabolism increase; processes supporting cell division and expansion are suppressed.

text.zh: 叶绿素荧光反映的PSII效率及碳同化预计低于对照，气孔限制仍明显。
text.en: PSII efficiency and carbon assimilation are expected to be below the control, with substantial stomatal limitation remaining.

text.zh: 叶面积形成和生物量积累开始出现可见的相对滞后。
text.en: Leaf-area production and biomass accumulation begin to show a visible relative lag.

text.zh: 稳定光照降低了光环境混杂，但品种耐冷性仍可改变结果。
text.en: Stable light reduces light-environment confounding, but cultivar cold tolerance can still alter outcomes.

summary.zh: 若冷胁迫持续，防御性代谢成本将更明显地挤占生长资源。
summary.en: If cold stress persists, defensive metabolic costs increasingly divert resources away from growth.

text.zh: 抗氧化和渗透调节维持较高水平；糖利用、细胞壁松弛和生物合成通量受限。
text.en: Antioxidant and osmotic adjustment remain elevated; sugar use, cell-wall loosening, and biosynthetic flux are constrained.

text.zh: 叶片源强度下降，向生长组织输出的可利用碳可能减少。
text.en: Leaf source strength declines, potentially reducing available carbon export to growing tissues.

text.zh: 株高增长、叶片伸展和干物质积累预计持续低于同龄对照。
text.en: Plant-height gain, leaf expansion, and dry-matter accumulation are expected to remain below age-matched controls.

text.zh: 资源分配的方向性较可信，但其程度受源库关系和发育阶段影响。
text.en: The direction of resource reallocation is plausible, but its extent depends on source-sink relations and developmental stage.

summary.zh: 适应性调节可能部分缓冲氧化损伤，但不能完全恢复冷抑制的代谢速率。
summary.en: Acclimatory adjustment may partly buffer oxidative damage but cannot fully restore cold-suppressed metabolic rates.

text.zh: ROS清除与膜保护可能趋于稳态；线粒体呼吸和叶绿体碳代谢仍受温度动力学限制。
text.en: ROS scavenging and membrane protection may approach a new steady state; mitochondrial respiration and chloroplast carbon metabolism remain kinetically cold-limited.

text.zh: 叶片光合能力可能在较低平台稳定，未预期在非冻害条件下出现普遍坏死。
text.en: Leaf photosynthetic capacity may stabilize at a lower plateau, without widespread necrosis expected under non-freezing conditions.

text.zh: 整株生长抑制累积，叶片大小差异逐渐比短暂萎蔫更易察觉。
text.en: Whole-plant growth inhibition accumulates, and differences in leaf size become more evident than transient wilting.

text.zh: 该平台式响应假定根系供水和养分供应未受冷胁迫严重破坏。
text.en: This plateau-like response assumes root water and nutrient supply are not severely impaired by cold.

summary.zh: 持续冷处理下，叶片维持防御而以生产力为代价。
summary.en: Under sustained cold, leaves maintain defense at the expense of productivity.

text.zh: 保护性糖、抗氧化物和膜脂调整持续；细胞周期推进及伸长驱动力偏低。
text.en: Protective sugars, antioxidants, and membrane-lipid adjustment persist; cell-cycle progression and expansion drive remain low.

text.zh: 叶片气体交换和光合产物输出维持低于对照的状态，组织损伤程度取决于耐冷性。
text.en: Leaf gas exchange and photosynthate export remain below control levels, while tissue injury depends on cold tolerance.

text.zh: 营养生长期冠层扩张减慢，整株碳收益减少。
text.en: Vegetative canopy expansion slows and whole-plant carbon gain is reduced.

text.zh: 持续暴露后的损伤阈值在不同玉米基因型间差异较大。
text.en: Damage thresholds during prolonged exposure vary substantially among maize genotypes.

summary.zh: 第二天内，适应不足的叶片可能由可逆抑制转向局部胁迫损伤。
summary.en: During the second day, insufficiently acclimated leaves may shift from reversible inhibition toward localized stress injury.

text.zh: 耐冷细胞可维持氧化还原缓冲；敏感细胞可能出现脂质过氧化和光抑制加重。
text.en: Cold-tolerant cells may sustain redox buffering; sensitive cells may show increased lipid peroxidation and photoinhibition.

text.zh: 整体叶片功能仍以下降为主，但叶尖或较老区域可能开始出现不均一的失绿或伤害。
text.en: Overall leaf function remains depressed, but uneven chlorosis or injury may begin in tips or older regions.

text.zh: 生物量和叶面积的相对差距扩大；严重表型并非中等处理下的必然结果。
text.en: Relative deficits in biomass and leaf area widen; severe phenotypes are not inevitable under moderate treatment.

text.zh: 局部可见损伤尤其依赖实际温度、叶龄和基因型。
text.en: Localized visible injury especially depends on actual temperature, leaf age, and genotype.

summary.zh: 冷适应网络仍在运行，但持续低温限制恢复性生长。
summary.en: The cold-acclimation network remains active, but sustained low temperature limits restorative growth.

text.zh: 保护性代谢维持消耗碳和还原力；蛋白周转与修复可部分抵消、但未必消除光系统压力。
text.en: Protective metabolism continues to consume carbon and reducing power; protein turnover and repair may partly, but not necessarily fully, relieve photosystem stress.

text.zh: 叶片光能利用和碳固定预计维持受抑，源叶对生长库的支持偏弱。
text.en: Leaf light-energy use and carbon fixation are expected to remain suppressed, weakening source-leaf support for growing sinks.

text.zh: 叶片出叶、伸长及整株相对生长继续落后于对照。
text.en: Leaf emergence, elongation, and whole-plant relative growth continue to lag behind the control.

text.zh: 预测不包含复温；若复温，恢复动力学可能与持续冷处理不同。
text.en: This projection excludes rewarming; recovery dynamics could differ substantially after rewarming.

summary.zh: 长期冷限制使生产与防御之间的权衡进一步累积。
summary.en: Prolonged cold limitation further accumulates the trade-off between production and defense.

text.zh: 耐受性相关稳态可维持，但碳代谢、离子稳态和膜修复的负担增加。
text.en: Tolerance-associated homeostasis may persist, but burdens on carbon metabolism, ion balance, and membrane repair increase.

text.zh: 成熟叶的净碳增益降低，较幼叶片因发育需求高而可能更易表现生长受限。
text.en: Net carbon gain in mature leaves declines, while younger leaves may show stronger growth limitation because of high developmental demand.

text.zh: 植株大小和冠层截光潜力的相对下降更加明确。
text.en: Relative reductions in plant size and canopy light-interception potential become more evident.

text.zh: 叶龄差异和未指定的夜间温度使器官层预测不够确定。
text.en: Leaf-age differences and unspecified nighttime temperature reduce certainty at the organ level.

summary.zh: 若无缓解，冷处理将维持低生产力的适应状态，并增加敏感叶区损伤风险。
summary.en: Without relief, cold treatment maintains a low-productivity acclimated state and increases injury risk in sensitive leaf regions.

text.zh: 防御信号和修复持续存在；在耐受不足区域，氧化压力可能超过局部清除能力。
text.en: Defense signaling and repair persist; in insufficiently tolerant regions, oxidative pressure may exceed local scavenging capacity.

text.zh: 叶片整体代谢仍降低，而局部褪绿、叶尖干枯或光系统损伤的风险上升。
text.en: Whole-leaf metabolism remains reduced, while risks of localized chlorosis, tip desiccation, or photosystem injury rise.

text.zh: 持续的生长滞后预计成为主要整株表型。
text.en: Persistent growth retardation is expected to be the dominant whole-plant phenotype.

text.zh: 是否出现明显伤害无法仅由“中等冷胁迫”确定。
text.en: Whether clear injury appears cannot be determined from “moderate cold stress” alone.

summary.zh: 三天后，预期形成以适应维持、光合受限和累积生长损失为特征的状态。
summary.en: After three days, an acclimation-maintenance state marked by limited photosynthesis and accumulated growth loss is expected.

text.zh: 冷保护、抗氧化和膜修复仍被维持；碳同化与生长代谢持续低于对照，敏感细胞可有损伤。
text.en: Cryoprotection, antioxidant defense, and membrane repair remain active; carbon assimilation and growth metabolism stay below control levels, with injury possible in sensitive cells.

text.zh: 叶片功能总体下降，耐冷材料可能保持完整，而敏感材料可出现区域性失绿或坏死。
text.en: Leaf function is overall reduced; cold-tolerant material may remain intact, whereas sensitive material may develop regional chlorosis or necrosis.

text.zh: 整株叶面积、株高和干物质积累预计低于同龄未处理植株。
text.en: Whole-plant leaf area, height, and dry-matter accumulation are expected to be below age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: 72小时结果高度依赖温度设定、栽培品种、叶龄及根区温度。
text.en: The 72-hour outcome depends strongly on temperature setting, cultivar, leaf age, and root-zone temperature.

mechanisms.zh: 低温改变膜流动性并触发Ca²⁺、ROS及激素相关信号，继而重编程冷响应转录。
mechanisms.en: Cold alters membrane fluidity and triggers Ca²⁺, ROS, and hormone-associated signaling, followed by cold-responsive transcriptional reprogramming.

mechanisms.zh: 叶绿体酶促碳同化和电子利用受温度限制，增加光抑制与氧化压力风险。
mechanisms.en: Chloroplast enzymatic carbon assimilation and electron use are temperature-limited, increasing risks of photoinhibition and oxidative stress.

mechanisms.zh: 糖、兼容溶质、抗氧化体系及膜脂重塑有助于维持细胞稳态，但消耗本可支持生长的资源。
mechanisms.en: Sugars, compatible solutes, antioxidant systems, and membrane-lipid remodeling help maintain cellular homeostasis but consume resources otherwise available for growth.

mechanisms.zh: 气孔调节和较低的叶片碳输入共同降低源强度，限制叶片扩展及整株生物量积累。
mechanisms.en: Stomatal regulation and lower leaf carbon input jointly reduce source strength, limiting leaf expansion and whole-plant biomass accumulation.

assumptions.zh: 处理温度保持在非冻害范围，强度为中等，且72小时内光照稳定。
assumptions.en: Treatment temperature remains non-freezing and moderate, with stable light throughout the 72-hour period.

assumptions.zh: 植株为营养生长期、养分和水分充足，根区未发生额外胁迫。
assumptions.en: Plants are vegetative, adequately supplied with water and nutrients, and lack additional root-zone stress.

assumptions.zh: 未指定栽培品种、精确温度、叶龄和昼夜温度，因此损伤阈值及后期表型不确定。
assumptions.en: Cultivar, exact temperature, leaf age, and day-night temperature are unspecified; therefore injury thresholds and late phenotypes remain uncertain.

assumptions.zh: 方向均相对同龄、未处理玉米植株；该轨迹为可检验假设而非实验结论。
assumptions.en: All directions are relative to age-matched untreated maize plants; this trajectory is a testable hypothesis, not an experimental conclusion.

readouts.zh: 6–24小时：叶片温度、气孔导度、蒸腾、净光合速率、叶绿素荧光和叶片含水状态。
readouts.en: 6–24 h: leaf temperature, stomatal conductance, transpiration, net photosynthesis, chlorophyll fluorescence, and leaf water status.

readouts.zh: 6–48小时：Ca²⁺/ROS相关指标、抗氧化酶活性、脂质过氧化、可溶性糖及膜脂组成。
readouts.en: 6–48 h: Ca²⁺/ROS-associated markers, antioxidant enzyme activity, lipid peroxidation, soluble sugars, and membrane-lipid composition.

readouts.zh: 12–72小时：冷响应转录、PSII效率、叶绿素含量、失绿/坏死评分、叶面积、株高和干物质。
readouts.en: 12–72 h: cold-responsive transcripts, PSII efficiency, chlorophyll content, chlorosis/necrosis scoring, leaf area, plant height, and dry matter.

design.zh: 采用同龄未处理对照，并记录叶龄、冠层位置、叶温和根区温度；在6、12、24、48和72小时进行重复取样。加入复温恢复组可区分可逆抑制与累积损伤，并比较耐冷与敏感基因型以检验基因型依赖性。
design.en: Use age-matched untreated controls and record leaf age, canopy position, leaf temperature, and root-zone temperature; sample repeatedly at 6, 12, 24, 48, and 72 h. Add a rewarming-recovery group to distinguish reversible inhibition from accumulated injury, and compare cold-tolerant and sensitive genotypes to test genotype dependence.

title.zh: 中度干旱下玉米叶片FRO6上调的72小时条件轨迹
title.en: A 72-hour conditional trajectory for FRO6 upregulation in maize leaves under moderate drought

summary.zh: 首先出现铁氧化还原与干旱信号的早期耦合，尚无可见叶片性状改变。
summary.en: Early coupling of iron-redox and drought signaling is expected, without visible leaf-trait change.

text.zh: FRO6相关的Fe(III)还原潜力升高；干旱诱导的ROS瞬态也可能增强。
text.en: FRO6-associated Fe(III)-reduction capacity rises, while drought-induced transient ROS may also increase.

text.zh: 叶肉总体铁分布和组织含水状态预计尚接近对照。
text.en: Bulk mesophyll iron distribution and tissue water status are expected to remain near control.

text.zh: 叶片外观、面积扩张和气体交换通常尚无稳定差异。
text.en: Leaf appearance, area expansion, and gas exchange should show no consistent difference yet.

text.zh: 玉米叶片中FRO6功能转移证据有限；需确认表达构建和细胞定位。
text.en: Functional transferability of FRO6 to maize leaves is limited; construct expression and localization require confirmation.

summary.zh: 铁还原增强可能开始改变局部可利用铁池，并触发红氧缓冲转录响应。
summary.en: Enhanced iron reduction may begin to alter local bioavailable iron pools and induce redox-buffering transcriptional responses.

text.zh: 可还原铁利用和抗氧化相关转录响应预计上升。
text.en: Reducible iron utilization and antioxidant-associated transcriptional responses are expected to increase.

text.zh: 组织尺度总铁含量大多不变，但叶肉细胞间铁状态可开始分化。
text.en: Bulk tissue iron content should remain largely unchanged, though mesophyll iron status may begin to diverge among cells.

text.zh: 尚不预期出现可靠的叶片保绿或耐旱表型。
text.en: A reliable stay-green or drought-tolerance phenotype is not yet expected.

text.zh: 效应取决于FRO6是否位于叶肉细胞并能影响铁可及性。
text.en: The effect depends on whether FRO6 is active in mesophyll cells and can alter iron accessibility.

summary.zh: 若还原产生的铁能被安全螯合，细胞可用铁与防御代谢开始协调。
summary.en: If reduced iron is safely chelated, cellular iron availability and defense metabolism begin to coordinate.

text.zh: 铁依赖代谢支持可能增加，但未被螯合的还原铁会提高Fenton型氧化压力风险。
text.en: Support for iron-dependent metabolism may increase, but unchelated reduced iron raises the risk of Fenton-type oxidative stress.

text.zh: 叶肉中铁螯合、转运和抗氧化网络的空间性响应预计增强。
text.en: Spatial responses of iron chelation, transport, and antioxidant networks in mesophyll are expected to strengthen.

text.zh: 蒸腾受干旱调控的变化可能先于光合差异，但整体叶片表现仍接近对照。
text.en: Drought-regulated transpiration may change before photosynthetic differences, while overall leaf performance remains near control.

text.zh: FRO6上调可能改善或加重氧化负担，取决于螯合与抗氧化容量。
text.en: FRO6 upregulation may relieve or worsen oxidative burden depending on chelation and antioxidant capacity.

summary.zh: 红氧稳态调节进入可测阶段，叶肉代谢可能开始获得轻度铁供应优势。
summary.en: Redox-homeostatic adjustment enters a measurable phase, and mesophyll metabolism may begin to gain a modest iron-supply advantage.

text.zh: 在螯合充分的条件下，铁辅因子需求相关酶活与ROS清除能力可能提高。
text.en: With sufficient chelation, activity of iron-cofactor-demanding enzymes and ROS-scavenging capacity may increase.

text.zh: 叶片可利用铁信号可增强，但总铁不一定增加，且局部氧化斑风险仍存在。
text.en: Leaf bioavailable-iron signaling may rise without higher total iron, while localized oxidative-risk zones may persist.

text.zh: 相对对照，光合维持可能略有改善；若氧化压力占优则可能无改善或轻度下降。
text.en: Relative to control, photosynthetic maintenance may modestly improve; if oxidative stress dominates, it may not improve or may slightly decline.

text.zh: 尚缺少剂量和表达幅度信息，方向性分支不能排除。
text.en: Dose and expression magnitude are unspecified, so directional branching cannot be excluded.

summary.zh: 干旱引起的气孔限制逐渐成为主要约束，FRO6效应更可能表现为叶肉保护而非增产。
summary.en: Drought-driven stomatal limitation becomes a dominant constraint; FRO6 effects are more likely to manifest as mesophyll protection than yield gain.

text.zh: 叶绿体和细胞质抗氧化缓冲预计增强，以限制持续ROS积累。
text.en: Chloroplast and cytosolic antioxidant buffering is expected to strengthen, limiting sustained ROS accumulation.

text.zh: 叶肉细胞完整性和光合蛋白保护可能优于干旱对照。
text.en: Mesophyll integrity and protection of photosynthetic proteins may be better than in drought controls.

text.zh: 单位叶面积的光化学效率和叶绿素保持可能出现轻度相对改善。
text.en: Photochemical efficiency and chlorophyll retention per leaf area may show modest relative improvement.

text.zh: 该预测以适度上调、无明显铁过载且叶肉表达为前提。
text.en: This projection assumes moderate upregulation, no marked iron overload, and mesophyll expression.

summary.zh: 若红氧缓冲持续有效，FRO6上调可部分缓冲干旱对光系统和膜系统的损伤。
summary.en: If redox buffering remains effective, FRO6 upregulation can partly buffer drought damage to photosystems and membranes.

text.zh: ROS清除、膜脂保护和铁依赖电子传递的维持预计增强。
text.en: ROS detoxification, membrane-lipid protection, and maintenance of iron-dependent electron transfer are expected to increase.

text.zh: 叶片氧化损伤累积可能低于干旱对照，叶肉功能异质性减弱。
text.en: Accumulated oxidative damage may be lower than in drought controls, with reduced mesophyll functional heterogeneity.

text.zh: 叶绿素荧光表现和相对含水状态可能较干旱对照更易维持。
text.en: Chlorophyll-fluorescence performance and relative water status may be better maintained than in drought controls.

text.zh: 水分状态改善应视为间接效应，而非FRO6直接控制气孔的假设。
text.en: Improved water status should be viewed as an indirect effect, not as evidence that FRO6 directly controls stomata.

summary.zh: 保护性重编程可达到短期平台，但铁还原持续偏高也开始带来潜在代价。
summary.en: Protective reprogramming may reach a short-term plateau, but persistently high iron reduction also begins to impose potential costs.

text.zh: 抗氧化能力维持较高，同时铁稳态负反馈和过量还原铁的隔离需求上升。
text.en: Antioxidant capacity remains high, while iron-homeostasis feedback and sequestration demand for excess reduced iron rise.

text.zh: 整体叶肉保护可能持续，但细胞类型间铁分配不均的风险增加。
text.en: Overall mesophyll protection may persist, but risk of uneven iron partitioning among cell types increases.

text.zh: 叶片保绿和光化学效率预计仍略优于干旱对照。
text.en: Leaf greenness and photochemical efficiency are expected to remain modestly better than in drought controls.

text.zh: 长期结果取决于铁隔离、螯合和运输网络能否匹配FRO6活性。
text.en: Longer-term outcome depends on whether iron sequestration, chelation, and transport networks match FRO6 activity.

summary.zh: 叶片层面的获益与铁稳态代价开始同时显现，系统进入维持或失衡的分岔期。
summary.en: Leaf-level benefits and iron-homeostasis costs begin to coexist, placing the system at a maintenance-versus-imbalance branch point.

text.zh: 若螯合充分，光合细胞维持受益；若不足，ROS和脂质过氧化可重新升高。
text.en: With sufficient chelation, photosynthetic cells retain benefits; if insufficient, ROS and lipid peroxidation can rise again.

text.zh: 叶片平均损伤可能较低，但潜在的局部坏死或黄化微区不能排除。
text.en: Average leaf damage may be lower, but localized necrotic or chlorotic microzones cannot be excluded.

text.zh: 净光合和保绿可能保持优势，也可能因铁失衡而趋于平台。
text.en: Net photosynthesis and greenness may retain an advantage or plateau because of iron imbalance.

text.zh: 缺乏叶片铁状态和FRO6表达强度数据，48小时后分岔不确定性升高。
text.en: Without leaf iron-status and FRO6-expression data, uncertainty in the post-48-hour branch increases.

summary.zh: 在适度干旱下，适配性铁稳态可支持持续保护；失配则转向氧化负担。
summary.en: Under moderate drought, adaptive iron homeostasis can sustain protection; mismatch instead shifts the system toward oxidative burden.

text.zh: 铁利用效率可能维持较高，但持续还原负荷会增加抗氧化与隔离的代谢成本。
text.en: Iron-use efficiency may remain high, but persistent reductive flux increases metabolic costs of antioxidant defense and sequestration.

text.zh: 功能性叶肉面积可被保留，同时局部铁稳态压力可能扩大。
text.en: Functional mesophyll area may be retained while local iron-homeostasis stress may expand.

text.zh: 叶片性能相对优势预计变小；是否持续优于对照取决于铁稳态适配。
text.en: The relative leaf-performance advantage is expected to narrow; persistence above control depends on iron-homeostasis adaptation.

text.zh: 预测对启动子强度、基因剂量和玉米FRO6同源蛋白功能尤其敏感。
text.en: The projection is especially sensitive to promoter strength, gene dosage, and the function of the maize FRO6 homolog.

summary.zh: 持续干旱使水分限制加强，FRO6上调更可能维持细胞完整性，而非完全恢复碳同化。
summary.en: As drought persists, FRO6 upregulation is more likely to preserve cellular integrity than fully restore carbon assimilation.

text.zh: 在未发生铁毒性的叶肉细胞中，膜稳定性和ROS解毒能力预计仍相对较高。
text.en: In mesophyll cells without iron toxicity, membrane stability and ROS-detoxification capacity are expected to remain relatively high.

text.zh: 叶片损伤扩展可能受抑，但组织含水下降仍会限制大部分代谢活动。
text.en: Spread of leaf damage may be restrained, but declining tissue water content still limits much metabolic activity.

text.zh: 相对干旱对照可表现为较低黄化或较高Fv/Fm，但气孔限制下净同化未必增加。
text.en: Relative to drought controls, lower chlorosis or higher Fv/Fm may occur, but net assimilation need not increase under stomatal limitation.

text.zh: 此处将FRO6作用限定为叶片/叶肉情境；向其他器官外推性有限。
text.en: Here, FRO6 action is restricted to a leaf/mesophyll context; transferability to other organs is limited.

summary.zh: 响应进入慢性维持阶段，保护效应需与持续的资源和铁稳态成本平衡。
summary.en: The response enters a chronic-maintenance phase in which protection must be balanced against continuing resource and iron-homeostasis costs.

text.zh: 防御网络仍活跃，但代谢资源可能从生长和修复以外的过程重新分配。
text.en: Defense networks remain active, but metabolic resources may be reallocated away from growth and other processes.

text.zh: 叶肉完整性可能仍较好，但衰老相关重编程可开始抵消早期保护。
text.en: Mesophyll integrity may remain better, but senescence-associated reprogramming can begin to offset early protection.

text.zh: 叶片扩张和生物量积累预计受干旱抑制；FRO6主要影响损伤幅度而非消除抑制。
text.en: Leaf expansion and biomass accumulation are expected to be drought-suppressed; FRO6 chiefly affects damage magnitude rather than removing suppression.

text.zh: 长期叶片结果受未指定的干旱持续性、根系供水和铁营养状态影响。
text.en: Longer-term leaf outcome is influenced by unspecified drought duration, root water supply, and iron nutritional status.

summary.zh: 72小时终点的最稳健假设是：适度FRO6上调可减轻部分叶片氧化损伤，但不能保证提高整体耐旱生长。
summary.en: The most robust 72-hour hypothesis is that moderate FRO6 upregulation can lessen some leaf oxidative damage, but cannot guarantee improved whole-plant drought growth.

text.zh: 铁利用与抗氧化保护可能仍高于对照，但铁过还原相关压力可限制持续获益。
text.en: Iron utilization and antioxidant protection may remain above control, but excess-reduction-associated iron stress can limit sustained benefit.

text.zh: 叶片平均功能保存可能较好，同时铁分布和局部氧化损伤的异质性可能增加。
text.en: Average leaf-function preservation may be better, while heterogeneity in iron distribution and local oxidative damage may increase.

text.zh: 预计保绿或光系统维持略有改善，但叶面积增长、整株生物量和最终产量不应据此推断增加。
text.en: Slightly improved greenness or photosystem maintenance is expected, but increased leaf growth, whole-plant biomass, or final yield should not be inferred.

text.zh: 该叶片/叶肉条件轨迹不等同于整株或非叶片器官预测，外推性有限。
text.en: This leaf/mesophyll conditional trajectory is not a whole-plant or non-leaf-organ prediction; transferability is limited.

mechanisms.zh: FRO6上调可能提高局部Fe(III)还原和可利用铁信号，从而影响铁辅因子依赖代谢。
mechanisms.en: FRO6 upregulation may increase local Fe(III) reduction and bioavailable-iron signaling, affecting iron-cofactor-dependent metabolism.

mechanisms.zh: 在干旱下，铁可及性改善可支持抗氧化系统和光合电子传递；但游离还原铁也可能放大ROS相关损伤。
mechanisms.en: During drought, improved iron accessibility may support antioxidant systems and photosynthetic electron transport, whereas free reduced iron may also amplify ROS-related injury.

mechanisms.zh: 最终方向取决于铁螯合、液泡或细胞器隔离、跨膜运输及叶肉细胞表达是否与还原通量匹配。
mechanisms.en: The final direction depends on whether iron chelation, vacuolar or organellar sequestration, transmembrane transport, and mesophyll expression match the reductive flux.

assumptions.zh: FRO6上调发生于玉米叶片，且在叶肉细胞中具有功能性表达；玉米同源蛋白具有与FRO类铁还原酶相近的高层级功能。
assumptions.en: FRO6 upregulation occurs in maize leaves with functional mesophyll expression, and the maize homolog has a high-level function comparable to FRO-family iron reductases.

assumptions.zh: 干旱为中度且持续，植株处于营养充足的营养生长期；未叠加病害、盐胁迫或严重缺铁。
assumptions.en: Drought is moderate and sustained, plants are adequately nourished at the vegetative stage, and no disease, salinity, or severe iron deficiency is superimposed.

assumptions.zh: 上调幅度适中，不造成强烈铁过载；对非叶片或非叶肉情境的转移性有限，应采用高不确定性。
assumptions.en: Upregulation is moderate and does not cause strong iron overload; transferability beyond leaf or mesophyll contexts is limited and warrants high uncertainty.

readouts.zh: 在6、12、24、36、48和72小时测定FRO6转录/蛋白丰度及亚细胞定位。
readouts.en: Measure FRO6 transcript/protein abundance and subcellular localization at 6, 12, 24, 36, 48, and 72 h.

readouts.zh: 测定叶片总铁、可交换或还原态铁、铁螯合相关标志物，以及叶肉空间铁分布。
readouts.en: Measure leaf total iron, exchangeable or reduced iron, iron-chelation markers, and spatial iron distribution in mesophyll.

readouts.zh: 测定ROS、脂质过氧化、抗氧化酶活性与还原力指标，以区分保护和铁驱动氧化压力。
readouts.en: Measure ROS, lipid peroxidation, antioxidant-enzyme activity, and reducing-power indicators to distinguish protection from iron-driven oxidative stress.

readouts.zh: 测定叶片相对含水量、气孔导度、净光合、叶绿素含量及叶绿素荧光参数。
readouts.en: Measure leaf relative water content, stomatal conductance, net photosynthesis, chlorophyll content, and chlorophyll-fluorescence parameters.

readouts.zh: 设置干旱空载体、充分浇水空载体、充分浇水FRO6上调和干旱FRO6上调对照；必要时加入铁螯合或补铁处理。
readouts.en: Include drought vector controls, well-watered vector controls, well-watered FRO6-upregulation controls, and drought FRO6-upregulation plants; add iron-chelation or iron-supplementation treatments where appropriate.

design.zh: 采用同龄、同叶位植株的时间序列析因设计，至少覆盖早期信号（6–18小时）、功能建立（24–42小时）和慢性响应（48–72小时）。将叶肉细胞或叶片分区读数与整叶气体交换配对，并以表达水平和铁状态对样本分层，检验获益是否依赖铁稳态匹配。
design.en: Use a same-age, same-leaf-position factorial time-series design spanning early signaling (6–18 h), functional establishment (24–42 h), and chronic response (48–72 h). Pair mesophyll-cell or leaf-sector readouts with whole-leaf gas exchange, and stratify samples by expression level and iron status to test whether benefit depends on matched iron homeostasis.

title.zh: 玉米根在渐进中度干旱下的72小时条件轨迹
title.en: Conditional 72-hour trajectory of maize roots under progressive moderate drought

summary.zh: 根首先感知土壤水势下降，水力与激素信号先于明显形态改变。
summary.en: Roots first sense declining soil water potential; hydraulic and hormonal signals precede visible morphological change.

text.zh: 细胞膨压开始下降；Ca²⁺、ROS和ABA相关信号短暂增强。
text.en: Cell turgor begins to decline; Ca²⁺, ROS, and ABA-associated signaling transiently increase.

text.zh: 根组织结构基本稳定，但根尖水分梯度开始改变。
text.en: Root tissue structure is largely stable, but water gradients near the tip begin to shift.

text.zh: 根系瞬时吸水能力略降，整体根形态尚无可见变化。
text.en: Instantaneous root water uptake slightly declines, with no visible whole-root morphological change yet.

text.zh: 早期应答具有较强机制支持，但实际幅度取决于基质水势下降速率。
text.en: Early responses are mechanistically well supported, but their magnitude depends on the rate of substrate water-potential decline.

summary.zh: ABA主导的保水程序和渗透调节转录开始建立。
summary.en: An ABA-dominated water-conservation program and osmotic-adjustment transcription begin to establish.

text.zh: ABA信号、抗氧化和兼容溶质相关转录上调；细胞扩张受限。
text.en: ABA signaling and antioxidant- and compatible-solute-related transcription increase, while cell expansion becomes constrained.

text.zh: 伸长区细胞伸长开始减慢，皮层与维管周围水分再分配增强。
text.en: Cell elongation in the elongation zone starts to slow, with increased water redistribution across cortex and vascular-adjacent tissues.

text.zh: 主根延伸速率可能轻度下降，根系导水能力开始受限。
text.en: Primary-root extension may decline modestly, and root hydraulic capacity begins to be constrained.

text.zh: 取决于根区含水量及基因型的ABA敏感性。
text.en: This depends on root-zone water content and genotype-specific ABA sensitivity.

summary.zh: 持续失水使生长抑制与防御性代谢调节并行。
summary.en: Sustained water loss couples growth restraint with defensive metabolic adjustment.

text.zh: 渗透保护物合成和ROS清除能力增强；持续低膨压抑制细胞增大。
text.en: Osmoprotectant synthesis and ROS-scavenging capacity increase; persistently low turgor inhibits cell enlargement.

text.zh: 根尖分生和伸长活动减弱，而内皮层屏障调节可能开始加强。
text.en: Meristematic and elongation activities weaken, while endodermal barrier regulation may begin to strengthen.

text.zh: 根系净生长趋缓，单位根长吸水贡献下降。
text.en: Net root growth slows, reducing water-uptake contribution per unit root length.

text.zh: 屏障形成的时序会随土壤质地和根轴位置而变。
text.en: Barrier-formation timing can vary with soil texture and position along the root axis.

summary.zh: 根在维持水分运输与限制失水之间进入调节平衡。
summary.en: Roots enter a regulatory balance between maintaining water transport and limiting water loss.

text.zh: 水通道蛋白活性和膜运输发生重调；代谢资源由生长转向维持。
text.en: Aquaporin activity and membrane transport are retuned; metabolic resources shift from growth toward maintenance.

text.zh: 内皮层和外皮层的屏障相关调节增强，但轴向输水阻力可能上升。
text.en: Barrier-associated regulation in endodermis and exodermis strengthens, but axial water-transport resistance may rise.

text.zh: 根系水力导度及地上部水分供应可能下降，根冠生长差异开始显现。
text.en: Root hydraulic conductance and water supply to shoots may decline, and differences among root axes begin to emerge.

text.zh: 中度胁迫下，水通道调控可呈双向变化，因此整体方向存在差异。
text.en: Under moderate stress, aquaporin regulation can be bidirectional, creating variation in the net response.

summary.zh: 资源分配进一步偏向存活和根部水分觅取，而非快速生物量积累。
summary.en: Resource allocation further favors survival and root water foraging rather than rapid biomass accumulation.

text.zh: 可溶性糖、氨基酸及离子渗透调节积累增强。
text.en: Accumulation of soluble sugars, amino acids, and ions for osmotic adjustment increases.

text.zh: 成熟根区屏障增强；新生侧根原基启动和外生长受到抑制。
text.en: Barriers strengthen in mature root zones, while initiation and emergence of new lateral-root primordia are restrained.

text.zh: 总根生长下降，但较深根轴的相对维持或优先延伸可能提高。
text.en: Total root growth declines, but deeper root axes may be relatively maintained or preferentially extended.

text.zh: 根系构型重分配高度依赖基因型、容器深度和水分垂直分布。
text.en: Root-architecture reallocation strongly depends on genotype, container depth, and vertical water distribution.

summary.zh: 长期信号逐步固定为耐旱型生理状态，生长代价变得更明显。
summary.en: Persistent signaling progressively consolidates a drought-acclimated physiological state, with clearer growth costs.

text.zh: 抗氧化酶活性、渗透调节与蛋白稳态维持增强。
text.en: Antioxidant enzyme activity, osmotic adjustment, and protein-homeostasis maintenance increase.

text.zh: 内皮层/外皮层疏水屏障和木质部调节预计增强。
text.en: Hydrophobic barriers in endodermis/exodermis and xylem regulation are expected to increase.

text.zh: 根系总体延伸和根冠扩张受抑，水分吸收对剩余湿润区域更敏感。
text.en: Overall root extension and root-system expansion are inhibited, making water uptake more dependent on remaining moist zones.

text.zh: 屏障增强有助于保水，却可能进一步限制径向吸水。
text.en: Stronger barriers may conserve water but can also further limit radial water uptake.

summary.zh: 根部适应与水力限制同时存在，组织功能出现空间分化。
summary.en: Root acclimation and hydraulic limitation coexist, producing spatial differentiation of tissue function.

text.zh: 较湿区域细胞仍维持代谢，较干区域细胞生长与分裂明显受抑。
text.en: Cells in wetter zones retain metabolism, whereas growth and division are strongly inhibited in drier zones.

text.zh: 根尖活性向可利用水分区域偏移；干燥区成熟组织屏障作用占优。
text.en: Root-tip activity shifts toward water-accessible zones; barrier function dominates in mature tissue within dry zones.

text.zh: 根系空间探索可能更集中于湿润层，但总吸水量通常低于对照。
text.en: Root foraging may become concentrated in wetter layers, but total water uptake is usually below control.

text.zh: 若土壤水分均一，空间分化和定向觅水将明显减弱。
text.en: If soil moisture is uniform, spatial differentiation and directed water foraging will be substantially weaker.

summary.zh: 中度干旱下的根部驯化状态基本形成，但持续生长受到代谢和水力双重约束。
summary.en: A root drought-acclimation state is largely established, but continued growth is constrained by both metabolism and hydraulics.

text.zh: 保护性代谢维持较高水平，生物合成和细胞周期活动继续降低。
text.en: Protective metabolism remains elevated, while biosynthesis and cell-cycle activity continue to decline.

text.zh: 伸长区长度和细胞产生速率下降，根组织更新变慢。
text.en: Elongation-zone length and cell-production rate decline, slowing root tissue renewal.

text.zh: 根干物质积累和根系体积增长低于同龄对照。
text.en: Root dry-matter accumulation and root-system volume growth fall below age-matched controls.

text.zh: 在适度而非致死胁迫下，根通常仍保持部分生长能力。
text.en: Under moderate rather than lethal stress, roots generally retain partial growth capacity.

summary.zh: 若干旱持续，维持成本累积并限制适应性生长的收益。
summary.en: If drought persists, maintenance costs accumulate and limit gains from adaptive growth.

text.zh: 能量更多用于离子稳态和修复；碳同化物输入不足时呼吸负担上升。
text.en: More energy is used for ion homeostasis and repair; respiratory burden rises if carbon supply becomes limiting.

text.zh: 维管运输与周围皮层的功能协调减弱，局部组织老化风险增加。
text.en: Functional coordination between vascular transport and surrounding cortex weakens, increasing risk of local tissue aging.

text.zh: 根系吸水效率和生物量生产效率进一步降低。
text.en: Root water-uptake efficiency and biomass-production efficiency decline further.

text.zh: 地上部光合受限程度将决定根部碳饥饿是否显著。
text.en: The extent of shoot photosynthetic limitation determines whether root carbon starvation becomes substantial.

summary.zh: 根系统进入稳定但受限的耐旱维持阶段。
summary.en: The root system enters a stable but constrained drought-maintenance phase.

text.zh: 渗透和抗氧化防御维持高位，新增应答转录趋于平稳。
text.en: Osmotic and antioxidant defenses remain elevated, while new response transcription tends to plateau.

text.zh: 已形成的组织屏障和低伸长状态持续存在。
text.en: Established tissue barriers and the low-elongation state persist.

text.zh: 根系继续缓慢生长或近乎停滞，整体水分获取受限。
text.en: Root systems continue growing slowly or nearly arrest, with constrained overall water acquisition.

text.zh: 是否达到稳态取决于处理是否真正保持中度且均一。
text.en: Whether a steady state is reached depends on whether stress remains genuinely moderate and uniform.

summary.zh: 持续胁迫使根部性状由可逆调节逐渐转向结构性限制。
summary.en: Continued stress shifts root traits from reversible regulation toward structural constraint.

text.zh: 细胞分裂和扩张潜能继续下降，部分区域修复能力受限。
text.en: Cell division and expansion potential continue to fall, and repair capacity becomes limited in some regions.

text.zh: 成熟区的屏障性和机械强化预计持续，但新组织形成不足。
text.en: Barrier properties and mechanical reinforcement in mature zones are expected to persist, while new tissue formation is insufficient.

text.zh: 可塑性下降，新增侧根和根系体积扩张受到更强抑制。
text.en: Plasticity declines, with stronger suppression of new lateral roots and root-system volume expansion.

text.zh: 结构性后果的程度取决于实际水势、温度和根际氧气状态。
text.en: The extent of structural consequences depends on actual water potential, temperature, and rhizosphere oxygen status.

summary.zh: 72小时后，预期形成以保水、维持和受限生长为特征的根部耐旱表型。
summary.en: By 72 h, a root drought phenotype characterized by water conservation, maintenance, and constrained growth is expected.

text.zh: 保护性代谢维持增强，但生长相关细胞活动持续低于对照。
text.en: Protective metabolism remains enhanced, but growth-related cellular activity stays below control.

text.zh: 成熟根屏障增强而根尖生长区缩小，组织间功能异质性扩大。
text.en: Mature-root barriers are stronger while growing tip zones are smaller, increasing functional heterogeneity among tissues.

text.zh: 总根生物量、根系扩张和水力供给预计低于对照；深层觅水优势仅在存在水分梯度时可能出现。
text.en: Total root biomass, root-system expansion, and hydraulic supply are expected to be below control; deeper-water foraging advantage is possible only when a moisture gradient exists.

text.zh: 该终点为条件性假设，尤其受基因型和根区水分空间格局影响。
text.en: This endpoint is conditional, especially on genotype and the spatial pattern of root-zone moisture.

mechanisms.zh: 根区水势下降通过水力信号、Ca²⁺/ROS波动和ABA通路快速限制细胞膨压与伸长。
mechanisms.en: Declining root-zone water potential rapidly limits cell turgor and elongation through hydraulic signals, Ca²⁺/ROS transients, and ABA pathways.

mechanisms.zh: 渗透调节、抗氧化防御和膜运输重调有助于维持细胞稳态，但消耗原本可用于生长的资源。
mechanisms.en: Osmotic adjustment, antioxidant defense, and retuned membrane transport support cellular homeostasis but consume resources otherwise available for growth.

mechanisms.zh: 内皮层和外皮层屏障强化可减少非选择性水分流失，却可能增加径向吸水阻力。
mechanisms.en: Strengthened endodermal and exodermal barriers can reduce nonselective water loss but may increase resistance to radial water uptake.

mechanisms.zh: 根系构型变化依赖水分空间分布；只有较深或局部湿润土层存在时，定向觅水才可能补偿部分生长损失。
mechanisms.en: Root-architecture change depends on the spatial distribution of water; directed foraging can offset some growth loss only when deeper or localized moist soil is available.

assumptions.zh: 处理为持续72小时的渐进、中度干旱，而非快速脱水、复水或致死胁迫。
assumptions.en: Treatment is progressive, moderate drought maintained for 72 h, not rapid desiccation, rewatering, or lethal stress.

assumptions.zh: 植株处于营养生长期，养分、温度、光周期和根际氧气均未成为额外限制因素。
assumptions.en: Plants are vegetative, with nutrients, temperature, photoperiod, and rhizosphere oxygen not imposing additional limitations.

assumptions.zh: 未指定玉米基因型、土壤/基质、容器深度和水分垂直梯度，因此根系构型预测的可迁移性有限。
assumptions.en: Maize genotype, soil/substrate, container depth, and vertical moisture gradient are unspecified, limiting transferability of root-architecture predictions.

assumptions.zh: 所有方向均相对于同龄、同环境且充分供水的未处理植株。
assumptions.en: All directions are relative to untreated, age-matched, well-watered plants in the same environment.

readouts.zh: 根区基质水势、含水量和不同深度的水分剖面。
readouts.en: Root-zone substrate water potential, water content, and moisture profiles across depth.

readouts.zh: 根系水力导度、蒸腾/吸水通量及叶水势，以连接根部与整株水分状态。
readouts.en: Root hydraulic conductance, transpiration/water-uptake flux, and leaf water potential to link root and whole-plant water status.

readouts.zh: 根尖细胞长度、分生区大小、伸长区长度和侧根密度。
readouts.en: Root-tip cell length, meristem size, elongation-zone length, and lateral-root density.

readouts.zh: ABA、可溶性糖、脯氨酸等渗透调节指标，以及ROS和抗氧化酶活性。
readouts.en: ABA, soluble sugars, proline and other osmotic-adjustment markers, plus ROS and antioxidant-enzyme activity.

readouts.zh: 内皮层/外皮层屏障相关染色或成像，以及根系深度、长度、体积和干物质。
readouts.en: Endodermal/exodermal barrier-associated staining or imaging, together with root depth, length, volume, and dry mass.

design.zh: 设置充分供水同龄对照，并在6、12、24、36、48、60和72小时重复采样；同步记录实际水势。若检验定向觅水，应采用具有已测定垂直水分梯度的深柱系统，并与均一干旱处理比较。
design.en: Include age-matched well-watered controls and repeated sampling at 6, 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, and 72 h while recording actual water potential. To test directed water foraging, use deep columns with a measured vertical moisture gradient and compare them with uniform drought.

title.zh: 玉米中度干旱后复水的根系恢复轨迹
title.en: Root recovery trajectory after rewatering in moderately droughted maize

summary.zh: 复水首先解除部分水分限制，但干旱诱导的信号与代谢状态尚未消退。
summary.en: Rewatering first relieves part of the water limitation, while drought-induced signaling and metabolic states persist.

text.zh: 根细胞水势和膨压迅速回升；Ca²⁺、ROS及ABA相关信号仍可能高于同龄对照。
text.en: Root-cell water potential and turgor rebound rapidly; Ca²⁺, ROS, and ABA-associated signaling may remain above age-matched controls.

text.zh: 根系导水与伸长区扩张开始恢复，但仍低于未干旱根。
text.en: Root hydraulic function and elongation-zone expansion begin to recover, but remain below undrought roots.

text.zh: 全株蒸腾、叶水分状态和生长抑制缓解，但总体仍落后于对照。
text.en: Whole-plant transpiration, leaf hydration, and growth inhibition ease, but remain behind controls overall.

text.zh: 快速水分恢复较可靠；恢复速度受土壤复湿均匀性和干旱持续时间影响。
text.en: Rapid water-status recovery is well supported; its pace depends on uniformity of soil rewetting and drought duration.

summary.zh: 根部进入早期水力和离子稳态重建阶段。
summary.en: Roots enter an early phase of hydraulic and ionic homeostasis rebuilding.

text.zh: 水通道蛋白调控、膜电位和离子通量趋于正常，但氧化还原缓冲仍在重设。
text.en: Aquaporin regulation, membrane potential, and ion fluxes move toward normal, while redox buffering is still being reset.

text.zh: 皮层至中柱的径向水流改善；先前收缩的伸长区仍限制根轴增长。
text.en: Radial water flow from cortex to stele improves; the previously contracted elongation zone still limits axial root growth.

text.zh: 气孔行为和碳同化可继续恢复，但干旱期形成的生长缺口仍存在。
text.en: Stomatal behavior and carbon assimilation can continue recovering, but the growth deficit formed during drought remains.

text.zh: 取决于根温、复水后的氧扩散和基因型的水力调节能力。
text.en: This depends on root temperature, oxygen diffusion after rewetting, and genotype-specific hydraulic regulation.

summary.zh: 应激转录程序开始转向修复与再生长程序。
summary.en: Stress transcriptional programs begin shifting toward repair and renewed growth.

text.zh: ABA响应与防御性转录逐步衰减，同时细胞壁松弛、蛋白周转和能量代谢相关程序增强。
text.en: ABA-responsive and defensive transcription gradually declines, while programs for wall loosening, protein turnover, and energy metabolism increase.

text.zh: 存活伸长区的细胞扩张恢复，但受损或过早分化的区域难以立即逆转。
text.en: Cell expansion resumes in surviving elongation zones, but damaged or prematurely differentiated regions do not reverse immediately.

text.zh: 地上部萎蔫通常明显减轻；根—冠生长协调仍低于持续供水植株。
text.en: Shoot wilting is usually markedly reduced; root–shoot growth coordination remains below continuously watered plants.

text.zh: 转录转换的时间窗合理，但其幅度受干旱前累积损伤影响。
text.en: The timing of transcriptional switching is plausible, but its magnitude depends on accumulated pre-rewatering damage.

summary.zh: 根伸长恢复开始转化为可观察的组织生长。
summary.en: Restored root elongation begins to translate into observable tissue growth.

text.zh: 分生区细胞周期进入和伸长区细胞扩张相对干旱末期增加。
text.en: Cell-cycle entry in the meristem and cell expansion in the elongation zone increase relative to drought end state.

text.zh: 主根与既有侧根的延伸加快，但根长增量通常仍低于同龄未处理对照。
text.en: Primary and existing lateral roots extend faster, but root-length gain is usually still below age-matched untreated controls.

text.zh: 全株净生长重新启动，但不能补回此前丧失的发育时间。
text.en: Net whole-plant growth restarts, but cannot recover developmental time lost earlier.

text.zh: 假定复水未造成积水或缺氧，并且根尖在干旱中保持存活。
text.en: This assumes rewatering does not cause waterlogging or hypoxia and that root tips survived drought.

summary.zh: 水力恢复与碳、氮需求的重新耦合增强。
summary.en: Hydraulic recovery becomes increasingly coupled to renewed carbon and nitrogen demand.

text.zh: 呼吸底物利用和营养转运增强；部分细胞仍维持抗氧化与渗透调节投入。
text.en: Respiratory substrate use and nutrient transport increase; some cells still invest in antioxidant and osmotic adjustment.

text.zh: 根系导水率与吸收表面积继续改善，但内皮层屏障变化可留下水力滞后。
text.en: Root hydraulic conductivity and absorptive surface continue improving, but endodermal barrier changes can leave hydraulic lag.

text.zh: 养分吸收和冠部恢复可加快，但生物量及根冠比仍带有干旱遗留效应。
text.en: Nutrient uptake and shoot recovery can accelerate, but biomass and root-to-shoot ratio still carry drought legacy effects.

text.zh: 营养吸收恢复尤其依赖复水后根际氧气和可利用养分。
text.en: Nutrient-uptake recovery especially depends on post-rewatering rhizosphere oxygen and nutrient availability.

summary.zh: 根分生组织活性趋于稳定，开始重建根系分枝潜力。
summary.en: Root meristem activity stabilizes and begins rebuilding branching potential.

text.zh: 细胞分裂、核糖体生物发生和细胞壁合成相对干旱期升高。
text.en: Cell division, ribosome biogenesis, and cell-wall synthesis rise relative to the drought period.

text.zh: 侧根原基的启动或伸出可能恢复，但其数量和空间分布仍可能偏离对照。
text.en: Lateral-root primordium initiation or emergence may recover, but number and spatial distribution can still differ from controls.

text.zh: 根系对冠部再生长的支持增强，但全株体量仍低于同龄对照。
text.en: Root support for shoot regrowth strengthens, but whole-plant size remains below age-matched controls.

text.zh: 侧根响应对发育区段、土壤阻力及玉米基因型较敏感。
text.en: Lateral-root responses are sensitive to developmental zone, soil resistance, and maize genotype.

summary.zh: 恢复从短期生理调节延伸至根系结构重塑。
summary.en: Recovery extends from short-term physiological adjustment to root-system structural remodeling.

text.zh: 新生长区域以扩张和合成为主，较老区域仍可能保留木栓化或防御性状态。
text.en: Newly growing regions prioritize expansion and biosynthesis, whereas older regions may retain suberized or defensive states.

text.zh: 新根和侧根增强吸收能力，但既有根段的屏障强化可能限制部分径向流动。
text.en: New and lateral roots enhance uptake capacity, but reinforced barriers in pre-existing segments may restrict some radial flow.

text.zh: 水分供应大体恢复后，生长限制逐步转向先前干旱造成的结构与碳分配遗留。
text.en: Once water supply is broadly restored, growth limitation increasingly reflects structural and carbon-allocation legacies of prior drought.

text.zh: 木栓化与新根形成的相对贡献尚取决于根龄组成。
text.en: The relative contributions of suberization and new-root formation depend on root-age composition.

summary.zh: 根—冠资源交换趋于再平衡，但恢复并非干旱过程的简单逆转。
summary.en: Root–shoot resource exchange approaches re-equilibration, but recovery is not a simple reversal of drought.

text.zh: 多数根细胞的水分和离子稳态接近基线，局部修复与防御代谢仍持续。
text.en: Water and ion homeostasis in most root cells approaches baseline, while localized repair and defense metabolism persists.

text.zh: 根系吸水和养分输送接近正常化，但总活性根长度仍可能不足。
text.en: Root water uptake and nutrient transport near normalization, but total active-root length may still be insufficient.

text.zh: 叶水分状态可接近对照，而累计生物量和根系构型仍低于对照。
text.en: Leaf water status may approach controls, whereas accumulated biomass and root-system architecture remain below controls.

text.zh: 若复水量过大造成短暂缺氧，该阶段可转为二次胁迫。
text.en: If excessive rewatering causes transient hypoxia, this stage can shift into secondary stress.

summary.zh: 新形成的根组织开始承担更多吸收与生长功能。
summary.en: Newly formed root tissues begin taking on more uptake and growth functions.

text.zh: 新根区域的蛋白合成、膜运输和细胞壁沉积相对干旱期提高。
text.en: Protein synthesis, membrane transport, and cell-wall deposition in new root regions rise relative to drought.

text.zh: 侧根和根毛功能可能增加有效吸收面积，但发育数量仍未必达到对照。
text.en: Lateral-root and root-hair function may increase effective absorptive area, but developmental abundance may not yet reach controls.

text.zh: 植株可将更多同化物重新投入生长，但早期保守性分配造成的差距仍在。
text.en: The plant can redirect more assimilate to growth, but gaps caused by earlier conservative allocation remain.

text.zh: 根毛与侧根的恢复强度受土壤质地、磷供应和根际微环境影响。
text.en: Recovery of root hairs and lateral roots is affected by soil texture, phosphorus supply, and the rhizosphere microenvironment.

summary.zh: 恢复进入以功能补偿为主、以结构遗留为限的阶段。
summary.en: Recovery enters a phase dominated by functional compensation but constrained by structural legacy.

text.zh: 基础渗透、氧化还原与能量状态趋于稳态；仅残留损伤区域保持修复负荷。
text.en: Basal osmotic, redox, and energy states approach steady state; only residual damaged regions retain repair burden.

text.zh: 单位根长的吸收能力可接近或局部高于对照，但根系总规模仍偏小。
text.en: Uptake capacity per unit root length can approach or locally exceed controls, while total root-system scale remains smaller.

text.zh: 资源获取功能改善，但全株生物量和潜在产量相关的发育进程仍落后。
text.en: Resource-acquisition function improves, but whole-plant biomass and yield-relevant developmental progress remain behind.

text.zh: 功能补偿的程度取决于复水后冠部碳供应是否充足。
text.en: The extent of functional compensation depends on whether post-rewatering shoot carbon supply is sufficient.

summary.zh: 根系恢复速度放缓，差异主要表现为干旱记忆和结构性后果。
summary.en: The pace of root recovery slows, and differences are expressed mainly as drought memory and structural consequences.

text.zh: 多数活跃细胞接近未处理稳态，但表观调控和代谢记忆可能维持响应阈值变化。
text.en: Most active cells approach untreated steady state, but epigenetic regulation and metabolic memory may retain altered response thresholds.

text.zh: 根尖数量、侧根布局和老根屏障性质仍可能与对照不同。
text.en: Root-tip number, lateral-root layout, and barrier properties of older roots may still differ from controls.

text.zh: 短期生理恢复不等同于生长追平；累计大小差异预计仍可检测。
text.en: Short-term physiological recovery does not equal growth catch-up; accumulated size differences are expected to remain detectable.

text.zh: 干旱记忆的持续时间因基因型及胁迫历史而异。
text.en: The persistence of drought memory varies with genotype and stress history.

summary.zh: 三天内可实现较强的功能恢复，但根系结构和全株生长通常保留干旱遗留。
summary.en: Substantial functional recovery can occur within three days, but root structure and whole-plant growth usually retain drought legacy.

text.zh: 大多数根细胞的即时水分胁迫信号接近基线，残留信号集中于受损或重塑区域。
text.en: Immediate water-stress signaling in most root cells nears baseline, with residual signaling concentrated in damaged or remodeling regions.

text.zh: 根系功能可大幅恢复，但总根长、分枝构型及根龄结构仍可能低于或不同于对照。
text.en: Root function can recover substantially, but total root length, branching architecture, and root-age structure may remain lower than or different from controls.

text.zh: 全株水分状态可近似正常，而累计生物量和后续发育潜力仍可能存在负遗留。
text.en: Whole-plant water status can be near normal, whereas cumulative biomass and later developmental potential may retain negative legacy.

text.zh: 该终点适用于中度干旱后充分复水；更重或更久的干旱会降低恢复程度。
text.en: This endpoint applies to full rewatering after moderate drought; more severe or prolonged drought would reduce recovery.

mechanisms.zh: 复水先恢复根—土水势梯度和细胞膨压，随后才逐步解除ABA、Ca²⁺和ROS介导的干旱应答。
mechanisms.en: Rewatering first restores the root–soil water-potential gradient and cell turgor, and only subsequently relaxes ABA-, Ca²⁺-, and ROS-mediated drought responses.

mechanisms.zh: 水通道蛋白调节、膜离子运输和内皮层屏障状态共同决定根系导水恢复是否快于结构生长恢复。
mechanisms.en: Aquaporin regulation, membrane ion transport, and endodermal barrier status jointly determine whether root hydraulic recovery outpaces structural growth recovery.

mechanisms.zh: 新根、侧根和根毛可带来功能补偿，但干旱期间损失的根长、发育时间和碳分配通常不能在72小时内完全补回。
mechanisms.en: New roots, lateral roots, and root hairs can provide functional compensation, but root length, developmental time, and carbon allocation lost during drought are usually not fully regained within 72 h.

assumptions.zh: 复水为充分但不积水的均匀补水，根际未发生持续缺氧。
assumptions.en: Rewatering is uniform and sufficient without waterlogging, and does not cause sustained rhizosphere hypoxia.

assumptions.zh: 玉米处于营养生长期，干旱为中度且根尖大多存活；未指定基因型，因此分枝和记忆效应存在不确定性。
assumptions.en: Maize is vegetative, drought is moderate, and most root tips survive; because genotype is unspecified, branching and memory effects are uncertain.

assumptions.zh: 预测描述常规复水生理，不代表特定基因或转基因材料的效应。若意图推断FRO6，其叶片/叶肉相关证据向玉米根转移有限，应采用高不确定性并直接测定根部表达与功能。
assumptions.en: The forecast describes general rewatering physiology, not effects of a specific gene or transgenic line. If FRO6 inference is intended, transfer from leaf/mesophyll contexts to maize roots is limited; high uncertainty and direct root expression and functional measurements are required.

readouts.zh: 在0、6、12、24、36、48和72小时测定土壤与根水势、根系水力导度、蒸腾和叶水分状态。
readouts.en: Measure soil and root water potential, root hydraulic conductance, transpiration, and leaf water status at 0, 6, 12, 24, 36, 48, and 72 h.

readouts.zh: 量化根尖细胞活力、ROS/氧化还原状态、ABA及相关转录响应，并测定水通道蛋白和离子转运相关表达或活性。
readouts.en: Quantify root-tip cell viability, ROS/redox status, ABA and associated transcriptional responses, and aquaporin- and ion-transport-related expression or activity.

readouts.zh: 追踪主根延伸、侧根出现、根毛、总根长、活性根比例及根—冠生物量分配。
readouts.en: Track primary-root extension, lateral-root emergence, root hairs, total root length, active-root fraction, and root–shoot biomass allocation.

readouts.zh: 测定硝酸盐、磷和钾吸收，以及根际氧气，以区分真实恢复与复水缺氧造成的二次胁迫。
readouts.en: Measure nitrate, phosphorus, and potassium uptake together with rhizosphere oxygen to distinguish genuine recovery from secondary stress caused by rewatering hypoxia.

design.zh: 设置同龄持续供水对照、持续干旱对照和复水处理；按根龄或根段分层取样，并记录土壤含水量和氧气。若检验FRO6相关假设，需加入根特异表达/功能测定，而不应由叶片结果外推。
design.en: Include age-matched continuously watered, continued-drought, and rewatered groups; sample by root age or segment and record soil moisture and oxygen. To test an FRO6-related hypothesis, add root-specific expression and functional assays rather than extrapolating from leaf results.

title.zh: 玉米根对非冻结冷胁迫的72小时条件轨迹
title.en: Conditional 72-hour trajectory of maize roots under non-freezing cold stress

summary.zh: 冷感知首先触发快速信号，而根系宏观生长通常尚未明显改变。
summary.en: Cold perception first triggers rapid signaling, while macroscopic root growth is usually not yet clearly altered.

text.zh: 膜刚性变化诱导Ca²⁺瞬变、ROS信号和蛋白磷酸化；细胞伸长的能量需求开始受限。
text.en: Membrane rigidification induces Ca²⁺ transients, ROS signaling, and protein phosphorylation; energy supply for cell expansion begins to be constrained.

text.zh: 根尖分生区和伸长区结构大体保持，但局部水力传导与细胞壁松弛可开始下降。
text.en: Root-tip meristem and elongation-zone structure remains broadly intact, although local hydraulic conductance and wall loosening may begin to decline.

text.zh: 主根伸长和全株外观多接近对照，仅可能出现轻微生长减速。
text.en: Primary-root elongation and whole-plant appearance remain close to control, with at most a slight slowing of growth.

text.zh: 早期信号具有较强机制支持，但实际温度和基因型未说明。
text.en: Early signaling has strong mechanistic support, but actual temperature and genotype are unspecified.

summary.zh: 快速信号逐步转入转录和代谢重编程，根伸长抑制开始可测。
summary.en: Rapid signaling transitions into transcriptional and metabolic reprogramming, and inhibited root elongation may become measurable.

text.zh: 冷响应转录、渗透保护物合成、抗氧化调控和脂质重塑相关过程增强。
text.en: Cold-responsive transcription, osmoprotectant synthesis, antioxidant regulation, and lipid-remodeling processes increase.

text.zh: 伸长区细胞扩张减慢，根尖组织的生长通量开始低于对照。
text.en: Cell expansion in the elongation zone slows, and growth flux through root-tip tissues begins to fall below control.

text.zh: 主根增量长度预计低于同龄未处理植株。
text.en: Incremental primary-root length is expected to be lower than in age-matched untreated plants.

text.zh: 响应方向较可靠，但起效时间受根区温度和培养条件影响。
text.en: The response direction is reasonably supported, but onset depends on root-zone temperature and growth conditions.

summary.zh: 保护性代谢与生长抑制并存，细胞状态由急性响应转向早期适应。
summary.en: Protective metabolism and growth inhibition coexist as cellular state shifts from acute response toward early adjustment.

text.zh: 抗氧化和膜稳态能力增强，但线粒体呼吸、离子运输及细胞壁扩张效率下降。
text.en: Antioxidant capacity and membrane stabilization increase, while mitochondrial respiration, ion transport, and cell-wall expansion efficiency decline.

text.zh: 根尖伸长区缩短或细胞产生速率下降；侧根起始可能被延后。
text.en: The root-tip elongation zone may shorten or cell production may decline; lateral-root initiation may be delayed.
